We're sputtering.

Peter,

I'm going to cut straight to it. Our fundraising is sputtering, and we're just not in a position that we need to be.

**I just got to Washington and since DAY 1 on the job, I 've made it clear to the Left that I'm not here to make friends. **

I'm here to fight for Ohio, all Americans, and our God-given rights and freedoms.

Look, there's a laundry list of things that I could say our country needs to be doing right now, securing the Southern Border being one of the top priorities, but I just need you to do one thing: **_[RUSH YOUR SUPPORT.](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=5c4fcf7e5c0641fb9cc40f716d3f14ac&_e=Z9AP9Wndy390UpGh0RCD_aHoytuTTEkBdDxzyaAN3y636FWmJ5Cm1Vuq_BWZVcTHg81-7va5vuEDArvKgmJ7VuIaWGfDyYhnru_WdC-X8ycn12LE0g8ZqGwnQaTzfUNX57JAtwPbrrW0DllPcurx2e9qMy9bsD5jdjKlaEg6sPJ2EUJWD1dqybcdYQ3UgccfYoiJVspdxyrgp4s7nTkGGzl7SRHwy-Phzs8UAQtc6GO_1JfM7WigE5XkyycYtLZzBun0VqsBPhkfwpiTzWMVmtNKMUAb7u6rB5Mm8oKtXhglrUfAaB36mYc10yeT23y3KBouoDjB7tkpGeA6m76ACeX119Kp8MeHdxoPR6zJi5vA5fpQ1r4hDehnX3FKrrimbHwnUpXb1ZuFjQGwMjfsGHqMUs4D2LTAxJ82jWow-Nhx_G4Q8NVzNImTGP9mINGf7cpyo2WrBMY8QQk-2nYHxK7IYybr7b-ead2V-m_JUFfLtMoK7b2jWbzyimV8-poH-JjVhAuKpVNuZMPwnj5Q2Uk8K-kv3Y4e8NeHdP3Uxlk%3D)_**

name: Tammy Baldwin
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
|
#
Peter, When I say that this campaign is powered by grassroots supporters like you, _I mean it._ Last year, our average online donation was **$17.58**. That’s a number I’m proud of, Peter. Every time someone chips in, whether it’s $5, $20, or $50, that contribution goes towards our important work to hold onto the Democratic Senate majority and elect Dems across Wisconsin. you're willing to fight for yourself? — Bernie Sanders

potent idea.

The ruling class counts on our lack of solidarity and prejudice to divide
us and prevent structural change. But, as Bernie pointed out, if we are
willing to love and fight for people we don't know, their divisive tactics
are no match for our shared solidarity.

body:
We advanced 100 judges.
#
Senate Democrats are not wasting a moment, Peter.
Today, we hit a huge milestone. **We have now confirmed 100 of President Biden’s highly-qualified judicial nominees to the federal bench.**
It’s thanks to your hard work growing our majority that the GOP can’t stand in our way. This is the kind of progress we fought for in the last election — _and we are just getting started_.
**[I’ll keep this short: will you contribute $5 right now to help me keep the Senate blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58734160/392062407/-735864606?refcode=dd_em_230214_1_t1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOGMyMDY2ZS1jOWFjLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tm_XK3-9oBYe6YsabSb39FIGT4CJLcS_RQsgCzPL_6E=)**
My best,

**But now, the Democratic Senate that we worked so hard for is IN DANGER of falling _back_ into Mitch McConnell's hands. Here’s what we’re up against:**

\-- Republicans are launching MAJOR attacks on Social Security, Medicare, and reproductive rights.
\-- **And even though our TRIPLE-IMPACT MATCH offer is active, not enough Democrats in PA are helping us fight back.**
This needs to be your top priority today because we are NOT on track to raise the funds required to defend our Senate majority and re-elect Democrats in key states.

name: Lauren via Democrats.org
subject: Do you know who is a part of this grassroots team?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, **[www
body:
I wanted to provide insight on the philosophy behind our strategy: 98% of donations to the DNC come from grassroots supporters like you, and our average online gift is $30! Take a look: | |
---
How many of the DNC’s donations do you think come from grassroots donors giving $15, $30, or $50? You may think it’s barely over 50%, maybe even a little lower. **Well, Derek, the answer is 98%.** Yep, 98% of the donations given to the DNC -- the funding that helps our party hire organizers, improve voter outreach, and helps fight for working families -- comes from grassroots donors just like yourself, chipping in what they can to the party they support. **In fact, our average online gift is $30 -- yes,_just $30!_** Even more impressive, the most frequent occupation of our supporters is teacher. That’s right -- teachers are some of the most likely to chip in to support President Biden and the work our party is doing to elect Democrats. Just take a look:
[](https://click.act.democrats.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtF81Kr_XOYfXS47DM_ccJyiQ9xlRKidRCjgQ5y1hMhXVOhh2z9ALQg4zpXIJKjTARnlIAI0gk673cCzDzMOTS-dsAfqgoQD3IERsP1hGWwdVkAU05-F0b19FTWVswMS6vojVyJfcXflukSuJKeBh6xJ7eCLPwVDufXfR8UdMK0AXZfT88OqKcYrcQC5CLghJZO1DaKYQRu3eKu9dxqaQhZsv1yg4exFbXdnaNDHn8eX7UdUiLgb4n8Aj0hxbVyHrJUBsne2AYU1rYuNmE8PFYKRgcaI0PrZTSXVV-m7m0iRQfI78T2-6_KOo5o-Qo1ns0lCc0Xe08dVkraFWW2jmgHim7saL_-MsMYXGpzQfDfFBQnR_Q8jqFGMYq4oFjfwgZt2zP5sdzACmwvh2Tv2Fna9nTwgjp-1eYxmFJl7SF3P92hmxOObm2chQHbzx52jEr5x_FFxEMJu4XKVZHNM1n0o8_gmLMYXTx-lwZOihmZAqWKz4yIBmPivADln32_2g/3tq/XEq_IttlQYaz6F-naDr0dg/h0/XtI_RfP26kzvtC0uboK_zEOaUkBkxf4_n1BT8fXNCw8)
The bottom line is that this grassroots team is made up of people from all different backgrounds and walks of life. A lot of those folks are giving what they can because they _believe_ in this party and the work Democrats are doing for this nation. **And when this support is continuous -- folks donating and investing what they can, when they can -- that ensures Democrats have the tools and resources they need to keep making incredible progress.** **[Will you join the 98,000 Democrats who have already renewed their support by donating $7? In fact, our average online gift is $30 -- yes,just $30! Even more impressive, the most frequent occupation of our supporters is teacher. That’s right -- teachers are some of the most likely to chip in to support President Biden and the work our party is doing to elect Democrats. Just take a look: The bottom line is that this grassroots team is made up of people from all different backgrounds and walks of life. A lot of those folks are giving what they can because they believe in this party and the work Democrats are doing for this nation. And when this support is continuous -- folks donating and investing what they can, when they can -- that ensures Democrats have the tools and resources they need to keep making incredible progress. Thanks, Lauren Lauren Williams Deputy Chief Mobilization Officer, Grassroots Fundraising Democratic National Committee Manage how often you receive DNC emails, . If you no longer wish to receive emails from the DNC, **. If you're ready to elect Democrats in all 50 states, territories, and D.C., . name: Joe Biden
subject: I'm asking: Are you with me?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, **[www
body:
For as much as we’ve gotten done over the past two years, we have some unfinished business on our agenda. | |
---
I ran for president for three reasons -- to restore the soul of the nation, to rebuild the backbone of the nation, and to unite our nation. Over the past two years, the economy has created 12 million new jobs under Kamala and me -- the strongest two years of growth in history by a longshot. We also made the biggest investment in American infrastructure since President Eisenhower's administration -- in highways, bridges, ports, airports, clean water systems, high-speed internet, and rail. I have to be honest: For as much as we’ve gotten done over the past two years, we have some unfinished business on our agenda. We need to make the cost of insulin $35/month for every American, pass affordable child care and family paid leave, ban assault weapons, codify _Roe v. Wade_ , and so much more. **Kamala and I can’t do it alone -- it’s going to take the full support of this grassroots team to keep pushing our agenda forward. clean_body: For as much as we’ve gotten done over the past two years, we have some unfinished business on our agenda. | | I ran for president for three reasons -- to restore the soul of the nation, to rebuild the backbone of the nation, and to unite our nation. Over the past two years, the economy has created 12 million new jobs under Kamala and me -- the strongest two years of growth in history by a longshot. We also made the biggest investment in American infrastructure since President Eisenhower's administration -- in highways, bridges, ports, airports, clean water systems, high-speed internet, and rail. I have to be honest: For as much as we’ve gotten done over the past two years, we have some unfinished business on our agenda. We need to make the cost of insulin $35/month for every American, pass affordable child care and family paid leave, ban assault weapons, codify Roe v. Wade , and so much more. Kamala and I can’t do it alone -- it’s going to take the full support of this grassroots team to keep pushing our agenda forward. Will you make a $7 donation to the DNC today to invest in the resources Democrats are relying on to win races in every corner of this great nation? Republicans keep talking about what they're going to do. So, let's make it real simple: If Republicans try to cut Social Security -- that's not going to get passed by the Senate in my view, but if it does -- I'll stop them. I got a veto. And if they send me a national ban on the right to choose, I will stop them. But stopping Republicans is just the half of it. It is going to take electing Democrats up and down the ballot to get the job done. And the Democratic National Committee is at the heart of that work. So let me ask you a simple question: Are you with us? Thank you and God bless you. Joe Joseph R. Biden, Jr. President of the United States Manage how often you receive DNC emails, . name: Brandon Combs (2A Alerts)
subject: See you in court, ATF
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | | | [](http://trk.readactnews._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9UkFOTzM1NzYzIn0/xIdxj_m-H9dRq6wC5M512g)
---
Friend, The ATF's MASSIVE new gun control rule could make MILLIONS of American gun owners into criminals - putting them at risk of fines, ATF raids, arrest, imprisonment, or even worse... Attorneys for FPC Action Foundation, the _leading_ 501(c)3 organization fighting to defend **_your_** __ Second Amendment rights, have already taken legal action to stop the ATF's tyrannical scheme. But to defeat the ATF, our attorneys need your support. **If we don't stop this massive ATF abuse in its tracks, these tyrants will go around Congress and try to re-write federal law to target YOU and YOUR FAMILY**. Friend, we're gearing up for an intense, multi-year legal battle against the Biden Administration. But we have to know how many freedom-loving Americans will stand with us in this important fight! [**Will you sign FPC Action Foundation's open letter in SUPPORT of our legal action against ATF?**](http://trk.readactnews._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9UkFOTzM1NzYzIn0/qiv1D9oFO6I8EQIoxSsDgQ)
---
[Stand with FPC Action Foundation](http://trk.readactnews._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9UkFOTzM1NzYzIn0/h1T6P1nmbi0v1_E-k15g1Q)
---
Friend, this is just the beginning. Make no mistake, if we let this ATF abuse slide, they'll keep coming after us no matter what guns you own. Joe Biden and his anti-gun ATF will continue to attack YOUR Second Amendment rights until they're stopped. The gun-grabbing ATF are counting on freedom-loving Americans staying silent. **_Please don't be quiet now. We need you in this fight!_** As our legal team presses forward with our urgent and necessary lawsuit against the ATF, we need to know if we have the support of the American people behind us. [**Are you in?**](http://trk.readactnews._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9UkFOTzM1NzYzIn0/6mCUHSUyCmx4YqKAcMbjkQ) [**If you support our lawsuit against the ATF's unconstitutional rule, you have to add your name to FPC Action Foundation's open letter NOW!**](http://trk.readactnews._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9UkFOTzM1NzYzIn0/vpt4ptZFyKSobQgZ_9wScg)
---
[Stand with FPC Action Foundation](http://trk.readactnews._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9UkFOTzM1NzYzIn0/NSymMD3xBPLSeRjf4PJojg)
---
Friend, if we let this ATF abuse stand, it would send a loud and clear message to the Biden Administration that they can do whatever they want --- that our guns are up for grabs. But the simple truth is our Right to Keep and Bear Arms is the last line of defense against a tyrannical government. And we WILL NOT stay silent and let the federal government undermine YOUR fundamental, individual rights and put you and your guns at risk. There's not much time before ATF's rule affects MILLIONS of American gun owners. Our attorneys are counting on freedom-loving Americans like YOU to join us and stand against this tyranny. [**Please, if you support our fight against the ATF, add your name to the open letter in SUPPORT of FPC Action Foundation's legal action TODAY.**](http://trk.readactnews._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9UkFOTzM1NzYzIn0/970k57dIkpPCOQ77HCLtxQ)
---
[Stand with FPC Action Foundation](http://trk.readactnews._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9UkFOTzM1NzYzIn0/mJlgXbVuFfgfw1ToYtscDg)
---
For freedom,
---
---
Brandon CombsFounder & PresidentFPC Action Foundation
---
[Stand with FPC Action Foundation](http://trk.readactnews._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9UkFOTzM1NzYzIn0/VI5qSjQT2MGHDosfQ2EAvA)
---
5550 Painted Mirage Road, Suite 320, Las Vegas, Nevada 89149
---
Read/Act News PO Box 455 Leesburg, VA 20178If you no longer wish to receive sponsored promotional emails from us [_click here_](http://trk.readactnews.com/uu/3/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiOTgzNjUxNjA3IiwicnEiOiIwMi1iMjMwNDYtMTM2YTg3YjRiNDA2NDc0NzhlNDIwY2ZlYTllMTFmODkiLCJwaCI6bnVsbCwibSI6ZmFsc2V9/m0qIrWq7HTPHam9I9suqSw) to unsubscribe.

name: Mike Pompeo
subject: CRITICAL: National Security Threat
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McCarthy for Congress
body:
| |
---
| | | I don't mean to scare you, but this is our current reality.

The Chinese Communist Party is rapidly buying up American farmland located near U.S. military bases.

Let me be clear: this is a threat to our national security.

We need 1,000 rapid-response patriots to sign our petition in the next 30 minutes. Can we count on your support?

Sign now to **BAN** the Chinese government from purchasing U.S. farmland.
---
| | [SIGN NOW](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62322493:6-pz-iGNo:m:1:3331421248:1586D69E7E470E31008CEC4B4E050A26:r)
---
If we continue to allow the Chinese government to get away with this, then they will gain control of our food systems and soon after that, our other natural resources.

What you do now will impact our national security for many years to come. **Please join us.**

---
| | [SIGN NOW](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62322493:6-pz-iGNo:m:1:3331421248:1586D69E7E470E31008CEC4B4E050A26:r)

-Mike Pompeo

Sign now to BAN the Chinese government from purchasing U.S. farmland. | | If we continue to allow the Chinese government to get away with this, then they will gain control of our food systems and soon after that, our other natural resources. What you do now will impact our national security for many years to come. name: 2024 Republican Alert
subject: Who is Nikki Haley?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by SFA, Inc
body:
Nikki is the first Republican woman of Indian heritage to run for president

If you read one thing today, make it this
ACTION REQUIRED: Step up before it’s too late.

| | | **[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c659075%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=W8QU9vLSnm4JjAMNhPBWNA&sysid=1)
_
Nikki Haley just announced ... She’s running for president!_**
This is a historic moment in our great nation. Millions of freedom-loving conservatives are joining together to defend the American Dream and throwing their support behind Nikki in the fight for our future!

[**Join the movement by supporting Nikki with a gift of $25, $50, or even $100 today >>>**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c659076%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=5jScc26iCGU3iZNvzQR1yQ&sysid=1)
**[**STAND WITH NIKKI HALEY**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c659077%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=OIb%2fZK9Nk5u3ijDepHjLqQ&sysid=1)** Nikki is the first Republican woman of Indian heritage to run for president, and that decision is steeped in American values.

As a first-generation American, she pulled herself up with hard work and determination.

At 12 years old, she started working in her mother’s dress shop and learned the hard work that went into earning every dollar.

When she learned it was too easy for the government to take away and spend that dollar without accountability, she ran for the South Carolina state legislature.

She championed a law forcing legislators to vote ON THE RECORD for every spending bill.

She was stripped of her position in Republican leadership for it.

But she kept fighting. She never lost a race. And went on to serve two terms as South Carolina’s governor until Trump called on her to stand for America as the U.S. Ambassador to the UN.

She didn’t blame America when the going got tough. She knows it’s America’s promise of freedom and opportunity that made her story possible in the first place.

Now, she’s running for president to protect the American Dream and stop the Left from erasing our country’s fundamental values with their woke, socialist agenda.

_**The race begins NOW!**_

The future of our country depends on conservatives stepping up to join the fight, and we need **12 more patriots from your area to reach our goal before midnight!**

[**Stand with Nikki Haley and millions of Americans fighting to take back our country and preserve the American Dream. Chip in $25, $50, or even $100 to join the movement now.**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c659078%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=hT%2b1aI%2fDdjmyPQuUMO08WQ&sysid=1)
**[**STAND WITH NIKKI HALEY**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c659079%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=rj%2fyDNz8FiKBAHznSPRolw&sysid=1)**

name: Senator Mike Lee
subject: I wish everyone in America would read this book
body:
If I could — hypothetically — make everyone in America read one book, it would be The Law by Frederic Bastiat. Every American, and especially every member of Congress, needs to read this book.

[](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2ziu30i5ros3ht9fq03h0qhb7og34sdpo0hlnscj8_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c5im1o76c5h2bs)

Hello Friend,

If I could -- hypothetically -- make everyone in America read one book, it would be The Law by Frederic Bastiat. Every American, and especially every member of Congress, needs to read this book.

And while I can't make you read the book, Friend, I can send you a copy.

Bastiat wrote this book as a defense of life, liberty, and property.

**It points out the fallacy behind most failed government programs and summarizes the principles of liberty, which FEE teaches kids through their FEE in the Classroom program.**

I just talked with Zilvinas Silenas, President of the Foundation for Economic Education (FEE), and we want to get _The Law_ into your hands to thank you for supporting FEE.

FEE's mission is to inspire, educate, and connect future leaders with the economic, ethical, and legal principles of a free society, including individual liberty, free markets, entrepreneurship, private property, high moral character, and limited government.

[_**Zilvinas wants to send a copy to every new supporter who clicks this link and sends a gift of $10, $25, $50, or any generous amount. Claim your copy here >>>**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zj1fdnjl5qr9vrbv9q9j1c73vdbmivvg10nksnf8_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c5im1o76c5h2bs)

*****Donate $250 and more to get a signed copy of The Law from FEE 's President.*****

FEE fights against socialism and communism not because they've heard it's terrible but because many of their staff have lived through it.

Zilvinas grew up in Soviet-controlled Lithuania. Here is just one example from his childhood:

_" On May 1, 1986, my family skipped the mandatory workers' parade in Lithuania. Instead of carrying around red carnations, red balloons, and red placards denouncing the U.S. and the West, we went sunbathing at a local lake.

The lake was polluted with industrial runoff from a government-owned leather factory, so swimming was out of the question. Still, the day was unusually warm, so we enjoyed the sunshine, which is not so abundant in the northeastern climes where Lithuania (then-Soviet Socialist Republic of Lithuania) sits.

What we didn't know was that five days before, on April 26, the Chernobyl nuclear power plant exploded, sending radioactive clouds westwards through Belarus, Lithuania, all the way to Sweden and Norway.

You see, on May 1, we did not know. No one told us. In fact, until the Scandinavians picked up elevated levels of radiation, most people in the Soviet Union did not know what had happened. That's how we were treated under socialism."_

**Now he 's fighting to make sure that American children don't have to experience this kind of childhood, Friend.**

[_**Friend, can you help support FEE -- and receive a copy of The Law by Frederic Bastiat by donating $10, $25, $50, or any amount? And if you donate $250 or more, you can get a personally signed copy from my friend Zilvinas. Click here to send your gift. >>>**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z6126jr7j70olq3jcs9chvcdtd4hth1cvlp6dnm0_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c5im1o76c5h2bs)

FEE teaches students and teachers to share important ideas of liberty and free market economics through their program FEE in the Classroom.

**FEE in the Classroom** is countering the radical indoctrination from teachers across the country. Here's how:

**FEE in the Classroom** is a unique program held in brick-and-mortar and virtual classrooms across the country that teaches young Americans the principles of free markets, individual liberty, and limited government.

This program uniquely challenges students to think outside the box and to challenge the mainstream narrative.

In a single day, an average of 75-300 students engage with FEE's faculty of acclaimed instructors through compelling lectures, exciting economic experiments, engaging group discussions, and Q&As. Students learn how the core principles of individual liberty and free-market economics apply to their daily lives, communities, careers, and the state of the nation.

My hope is that _The Law_ will be as valuable a resource for you as it is for me. So, can I count on you to join me in supporting FEE? **Click below to send your gift and claim your copy!**

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z3vmcailptjs617g59kjjpcees81tdchd4sc1h3g_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c5im1o76c5h2bs)
[_**Donate $25 >>>**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z71fdr3l9nao54njjaj4bq7hm23jlpg374pd8vvo_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c5im1o76c5h2bs)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z53sbi6ojn3o0dmlc77nbdfo27gjoikflud27eu0_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c5im1o76c5h2bs)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zgmmp2hjpmaqacfhrnfs9ukpm8jhkkm34rs5tlfg_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c5im1o76c5h2bs)
[_**Donate $250 and get a signed copy >>>**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zkc7odpddqifpmglcshtu1osfg5dn158h92jc5j8_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c5im1o76c5h2bs)
[_**Donate $500 and get a signed copy >>>**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z74b265b411hmmm8pgaq522ne3ue44qs2obvfju8_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c5im1o76c5h2bs)
[_**Donate $1,000 and get a signed copy >>>**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z18llh35ordgjkmdrgne3vb1pmag6urqbrsmrt90_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c5im1o76c5h2bs)
[_**Donate $2,500 and get a signed copy >>>**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zciua4p3gkqpqcm9c36cebpvrg9pksaa77qdmvbo_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c5im1o76c5h2bs)
[_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z2a4i5kv8cspna38652pga1nbmkso1sdk80j1i8o_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c5im1o76c5h2bs)

Thank you,

Senator Mike Lee

_FEE is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit educational organization, so donations made to FEE are tax-deductible to the full extent allowable by law._
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for Deroy Murdock, [please use this preferences page](http://e.deroymurdock.com/prefs/9z2ztucie6ke6tvvfgh1q6b0c2dm2l61a24mgusbcv8).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z5148tua6r0h6h5aq4t7eo9n3f0ve2dprvs72u3g_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28or7cdgmao70spgm49fg)

My hope is that The Law will be as valuable a resource for you as it is for me. So, can I count on you to join me in supporting FEE? Click below to send your gift and claim your copy!** Thank you, Senator Mike Lee FEE is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit educational organization, so donations made to FEE are tax-deductible to the full extent allowable by law. name: Newsmax
subject: RNC Chair’s Stark Warning: Left Closing Down Your Media
body:
Ronna McDaniel, the chairwoman of the RNC, sent an urgent email to Republican members this week urging them to oppose AT&T; DirecTV's censorship of Newsmax. | Please read this message from our sponsor Newsmax Media. | Dear Reader: **Ronna McDaniel** , the chairwoman of the RNC, sent an **urgent email to Republican members** this week urging them to oppose AT&T; DirecTV's censorship of Newsmax. Ronna warns if we do not fight against this the left will not stop. **Pres. Trump is urging you to cancel DirecTV and AT &T;,** including your cellular and wireless services. And Dr. Ben Carson says DirecTV's censorship of Newsmax is a direct threat to your Constitutional freedoms. _We must fight back._ **Please see Ronna's email below,** read it and make sure you forward this to friends and family. And make sure you call **877-763-9762** to complain and **cancel DirecTV and AT &T!** **_Newsmax_** **From:** Ronna McDaniel - Chairman's Office
**Sent:** Wednesday, February 8, 2023 1:30 PM
**To:** Ronna McDaniel - Chairman's Office
**Subject:** **DirecTV/Newsmax** Members, I'm sure you've all seen the recent news that DirecTV has **decided to drop Newsmax** from its channel lineup. DirecTV has claimed that their decision was the result of a dispute over carrier fees, but this is yet another example of **powerful corporations silencing conservative viewpoints.** It's anti-free-speech and **anti-American.** As DirecTV continues to pay full carrier fees for smaller left-wing networks while silencing the fourth-highest-rated news program on cable TV, **it's our job to fight back.** The RNC has repeatedly stepped up to defend free speech and conservative values from left-wing censorship. In October 2022, we sued Google for suppressing our fundraising and get-out-the-vote emails. That case continues to develop and we look forward to holding Google accountable for its chilling attacks on conservative speech. When Twitter tried to silence the bombshell Hunter Biden laptop story in October 2020, we immediately filed a complaint with the FEC; following the release of the Twitter files in winter 2022, we sent a demand letter asking the FEC to re-examine our complaint in light of Twitter's dishonesty. Our voters deserve to know that the RNC is standing with them and protecting their right to free expression as Big Tech oligarchs try to silence viewpoints they find politically inconvenient. As long as I am Chairwoman of this committee, **that work will never stop.** However, we are stronger when we fight together. I am hoping that you, as Republican leaders in your states, can help mobilize the grassroots to push back on politically motivated censorship of our principles. This effort needs to come from the grassroots up: if you can, **please reach out to your local and county-level leaders** to rally their communities. Whether it's on Twitter, on Facebook, a letter to the editor, or **calling DirecTV at****877-763-9762** , we need to send a loud and clear signal that we will not accept this blatant bias. If Democrats and their media allies are so scared of our ideas, they should debate them in the open - not try to make them disappear. Join me in holding the left accountable. Thank you for all you do, **_Ronna_**
**Newsmax: Actions to Take Now **
1. **DirecTV customers :** **Call toll free at 877-763-9762** **to cancel/complain.**
2. **AT &T customers:** **Call toll free at 888-855-2338 to cancel/complain **for U-verse, cellular and wireless services.
3. **Call your congressman or senator** at **202-224-3121** and **demand they stop AT &T/DirecTV's censorship **of NEWSMAX - ask them to give you a date on the hearings!
4. **Go to our online petition and get more info: ****[iWantNewsmax.com](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z1rdbet17fr6oth5ftbpgrao7rao3mkp2fe7ja70_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c5im1o72cjh2bs).**

name: 2024 Republican Alert
subject: Who is Nikki Haley?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by SFA, Inc
body:
If you read one thing today, make it this

If you read one thing today, make it this
ACTION REQUIRED: Step up before it's too late.

| | | **[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zji0jnofbjpr2psnke9tjh84152cpm7k4n5amob8_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c5im1o76c1h2bs)
_
Nikki Haley just announced ... She's running for president!_**
This is a historic moment in our great nation. Millions of freedom-loving conservatives are joining together to defend the American Dream and throwing their support behind Nikki in the fight for our future!

[**Join the movement by supporting Nikki with a gift of $25, $50, or even $100 today >>>**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zlq96ho0rme5rsh643ij04ning4ci630nb542050_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c5im1o76c1h2bs)
**[**STAND WITH NIKKI HALEY**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zqvcva5dme3jdimg0nppa723v7l50p6vh3a9rjk8_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c5im1o76c1h2bs)** Nikki is the first Republican woman of Indian heritage to run for president, and that decision is steeped in American values.

As a first-generation American, she pulled herself up with hard work and determination.

At 12 years old, she started working in her mother's dress shop and learned the hard work that went into earning every dollar.

When she learned it was too easy for the government to take away and spend that dollar without accountability, she ran for the South Carolina state legislature.

She championed a law forcing legislators to vote ON THE RECORD for every spending bill.

She was stripped of her position in Republican leadership for it.

But she kept fighting. She never lost a race. And went on to serve two terms as South Carolina's governor until Trump called on her to stand for America as the U.S. Ambassador to the UN.

She didn't blame America when the going got tough. She knows it's America's promise of freedom and opportunity that made her story possible in the first place.

Now, she's running for president to protect the American Dream and stop the Left from erasing our country's fundamental values with their woke, socialist agenda.

_**The race begins NOW!**_

The future of our country depends on conservatives stepping up to join the fight, and we need **12 more patriots from your area to reach our goal before midnight!**

[**Stand with Nikki Haley and millions of Americans fighting to take back our country and preserve the American Dream. Chip in $25, $50, or even $100 to join the movement now.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z0ad1m9fk0pdvoq71geocm6uep4g1po6t3mn2ckg_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c5im1o76c1h2bs)

Friend, This year, you and I will likely see the biggest wave of attacks EVER on the Second Amendment, as anti-gun billionaires and special interests work to pass insane new restrictions on your Right to Keep and Bear Arms. **In fact, the FPC Action Foundation team is already tracking over ONE THOUSAND, TWO HUNDRED new gun bills across the country since January 1.** When anti-rights politicians and tyrants try to take YOUR guns and trample on YOUR rights, you can count on FPC Action Foundation's Legal Action Team to hold them accountable in court and FIGHT BACK. [**But today, I want to ask YOU one simple question: What is your TOP concern for gun rights in 2023**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.)**[?](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.) _Please share your answer in FPC Action Foundation's urgent American Gun Owner Legal Action Priority Survey right now!_**

subject: As American as apple pie
disclaimer_text: Paid for by SFA, Inc
body:
This American story begins with a woman named Raj Randhawa from Punjab

The Left can’t handle it, but this is the truth
ACTION REQUIRED: Step up before it’s too late.

| | | [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c06179%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=eP1NLHOLFsH8LBTZg8DhvA&sysid=1) | This American story begins with a woman named Raj Randhawa from Punjab, India who dreamed of serving on the country’s judicial bench. She worked hard, earned her law degree, and was offered a seat on the court. Only then, her family’s disapproval stopped her from taking it.

Because of her belief in the American Dream, Raj and her husband, Ajit, immigrated to America and settled in Bamberg, South Carolina where they had and raised their children to have faith in God and love their country.

**They would never have guessed everything their daughter, Nikki Haley, would do with the risk they took to achieve the American Dream.**

At age 12, Nikki started working in her mother’s dress shop and learned the hard work behind every dollar earned.

When she learned it was too easy for the government to take and spend that dollar without accountability, she ran for the South Carolina state legislature.

She stood up to corrupt Republicans and insiders in her state that wanted to spend taxpayer dollars on their pet projects without any accountability. She championed a law forcing them to be on the record for every single spending bill. They tried to punish her by taking her spot in Republican leadership for it.

But she kept fighting. She never lost a race. And went on to serve two terms as South Carolina’s governor until Trump called on her to stand for America as the U.S. Ambassador to the United Nations.

Nikki’s story is an American story. In just one generation, she pulled herself up through hard work and determination.

She didn’t blame America when the going got tough. She knows it’s America’s unique promise of freedom and opportunity that made her story possible in the first place.

_**Now, she’s running for president to protect the American Dream and stop the Left from erasing our country’s fundamental values with their woke, socialist agenda.**_

[**Will you chip in $25 or more to join Nikki’s fight and help her to victory?**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c06170%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=yhkm0XlVkXEffkzc5aNtEA&sysid=1)** ** How the story ends and the future of our country depends on pro-freedom patriots like YOU.
**[**BE A PART OF NIKKI’S STORY**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c06171%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=fQV%2bKz268JItFYaZU0Nqug&sysid=1)**
---

**It’s time to elect the next generation of conservative leaders who will stand for America. **

[**If you agree, stand with Nikki Haley now in her fight to defend freedom and save the American Dream.**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c06172%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=aDHNG9TbPqtqg%2bFtl81STg&sysid=1)

clean_body: This American story begins with a woman named Raj Randhawa from Punjab The Left can’t handle it, but this is the truth ACTION REQUIRED: Step up before it’s too late. | | | | This American story begins with a woman named Raj Randhawa from Punjab, India who dreamed of serving on the country’s judicial bench. She worked hard, earned her law degree, and was offered a seat on the court. Only then, her family’s disapproval stopped her from taking it. Because of her belief in the American Dream, Raj and her husband, Ajit, immigrated to America and settled in Bamberg, South Carolina where they had and raised their children to have faith in God and love their country. They would never have guessed everything their daughter, Nikki Haley, would do with the risk they took to achieve the American Dream. At age 12, Nikki started working in her mother’s dress shop and learned the hard work behind every dollar earned. When she learned it was too easy for the government to take and spend that dollar without accountability, she ran for the South Carolina state legislature. She stood up to corrupt Republicans and insiders in her state that wanted to spend taxpayer dollars on their pet projects without any accountability. She championed a law forcing them to be on the record for every single spending bill. They tried to punish her by taking her spot in Republican leadership for it. But she kept fighting. She never lost a race. And went on to serve two terms as South Carolina’s governor until Trump called on her to stand for America as the U.S. Ambassador to the United Nations. Nikki’s story is an American story. In just one generation, she pulled herself up through hard work and determination. She didn’t blame America when the going got tough. She knows it’s America’s unique promise of freedom and opportunity that made her story possible in the first place. Now, she’s running for president to protect the American Dream and stop the Left from erasing our country’s fundamental values with their woke, socialist agenda. How the story ends and the future of our country depends on pro-freedom patriots like YOU. It’s time to elect the next generation of conservative leaders who will stand for America. | | | | Paid for by SFA, Inc. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. name: Shift WA
subject: Democrats’ real priorities
body:
Democrats' refusal to act on key bills reveals a lot about what Democrats prioritize - and it's not you or your family. | | [](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61500472:WUYs-wDNW:m:1:2610672541:90BFA58307CCFE25BA143A96789DAC3E:r "Shift Washington")
---
| Friends,

Session cutoff is this Friday! That means state lawmakers have three more days to consider bills in committees and take floor action.

As Shift WA has reported, Democrats - particularly those who identify with the far-Left - refuse to hear any bills that would fix the terrible policies they passed in the last few years. Republicans have proposed bills to repeal or amend legislation that led to higher crime rates, serve as critical threats to the agricultural industry, prevents the governor from abusing powers, and relieves burdensome taxes.

**But Democrats have yet to act on any of these commonsense bills. Their refusal to act on these bills reveals a lot about what Democrats prioritize - and it's not you or your family.**

Here are three things that Democrats prioritize over working families:
1. **The wellbeing of criminals** - Democrats' pro-criminal legislation has effectively handcuffed our police force by preventing them from pursuing criminals. As a result, crime rates have increased. Yet they refuse to act to fix their failed policies.
2. **Urban elites** - Urban Democrats do not understand agriculture or the needs of farmers. And they have no desire to learn. Their policies - from costly cap-and-trade measures to labor regulations - harm farmers while achieving none of their goals. It's an example of privileged urban elites putting their deeply held ideological beliefs ahead of reality.
3. **Expanding government powers** - Democrats have had years to reform our state's flawed emergency powers law. Even after years of Jay Inslee abusing those powers, they have not acted. Similarly, Democrats refuse to reform their deeply flawed long term payroll tax. That's because both policies - as they exist now - work to expand governments' power over the people's power.

We here at Shift WA are working to hold Democrats, who control every branch of our state government, accountable to the people. **[Will you help us keep going by donating $50 today?](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61500473:WUYs-wDNW:m:1:2610672541:90BFA58307CCFE25BA143A96789DAC3E:r)**

We depend on the grassroots support of people like you. **[Please consider contributing today so we can continue delivering content you can trust!](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61500473:WUYs-wDNW:m:1:2610672541:90BFA58307CCFE25BA143A96789DAC3E:r)**

Thank you,

The Shift WA team | [ DONATE ](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61500474:WUYs-wDNW:m:1:2610672541:90BFA58307CCFE25BA143A96789DAC3E:r)
---
|
This message was intended for: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com) and sent from Shift Washington. If you would like to send this message to some of your friends, you can [click here](http://click.shiftwa.org/forwardthis/ft.php?mID=14137467&em=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&ch=49000b887de404a22f48ed48dd2d4356&schema=echo3) to do so.

You can also stay up to date on our efforts to shift the debate in Washington State by following us on [Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/shiftwa/) & [Twitter](https://twitter.com/ShiftWA). If you believe you received this message in error or no longer wish to receive emails from Shift Washington, [click to unsubscribe](http://click.shiftwa.org/p/oWUYs-wDNW).

Awesome news!

Your email address -- dpwillis67@gmail.com -- just got **chosen to receive a 10-Million Volt Pocket Stun Gun FREE.**

[You just have to click here to claim it.](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/11596/6374453/5364fefe63f338135d83e876f2f7fc2a6535ea07/5e3a0da1a774c989bdeffdc74f6c316a0d3db938)

**_Here’s why you got chosen to get this Free:_**

Our friends at _Tactical USA_ had an overstock of these pocket stun guns in their warehouse... so they decided to give some of them away as a little “guerrilla marketing” campaign.

So to give everyone a **fair shot** to get one... we shuffled everyone’s email addresses and chose a handful of winners at random.

**And dpwillis67@gmail.com got chosen!**

That’s a pretty big deal, since these pocket stun guns ** _sell for USD69+_** on Amazon.

Over 132,000 other Americans have **gladly paid full price** for this... since it can turn a 260lb thug into a whimpering pile in two seconds flat.

But luckily for you...

You can get it FREE since your email got chosen today.

Just **one small catch** here...

You’ll need to claim your Free Pocket Stun Guns IMMEDIATELY if you want it.

If you don’t claim it within 4 hours...

We’ll simply take that to mean you **weren’t interested** \-- and then select another eligible winner to receive it Free.

So don’t dilly dally.

[**Grab your FREE 10-Million Volt Pocket Stun Gun now**](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/11596/6374453/5364fefe63f338135d83e876f2f7fc2a6535ea07/5e3a0da1a774c989bdeffdc74f6c316a0d3db938), before it’s handed off to another winner.

name: Jacky Rosen
subject: let me explain, friend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
body:
I know a thing or two about what it means to roll up your sleeves and get to work.
| | |
---
Friend: In a moment, I’m going to ask you to make a donation to help us reach our critical mid-month goal and keep Nevada and the Senate blue. But first, let me explain why your support right now is so important.
I know a thing or two about what it means to roll up your sleeves and get to work. I grew up in a working-class family as the granddaughter of immigrants and the daughter of a World War II veteran. I paid for college by working and waiting tables at Caesars Palace as a Culinary Union member while taking out student loans, and eventually I became the first in my family to graduate. **Now, I'm humbled to serve Nevada in the U.S. Senate and fight for the hardworking families who have helped build our great state.**
**But _FiveThirtyEight_ is reporting that the battle for Senate control could once again come down to Nevada – and experts say I'm one of the GOP's top targets for defeat. I need people like you to help me fight back and win – but time is running out before our crucial mid-month deadline, and we're falling short of our $50,000 goal.**
**[That's why I'm personally asking, friend: Please, will you give $5 or more right now so we can hit our mid-month goal, keep Nevada blue, and defend our Democratic Senate majority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58755655/392134237/610767770?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2335-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMzNlYzQwMS00N2FkLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xbZbqPimrZmYfoVpJ2xuySvO0UzWXZ5E45cfGfr54PA=)**

Republicans need to flip just _two_ seats to take back the Senate, and _The Washington Post_ is already calling me one of the **most endangered Democrats** on the ballot.

Last cycle, Republicans flooded Nevada with over $55 million – and there's no question that they'll spend _even more_ this time around. **We simply can't afford to miss critical goals like this so early in the campaign – because it could mean****handing the GOP a massive fundraising advantage.**
[**So please, friend, will you rush $5 or more now to defeat the GOP and keep both Nevada and the Senate blue?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58755661/392134243/610767770?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2335-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMzNlYzQwMS00N2FkLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xbZbqPimrZmYfoVpJ2xuySvO0UzWXZ5E45cfGfr54PA=)
Thank you. Every dollar makes a huge difference.
– Jacky

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: I was just about ready to throw my remote at the TV screen
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren Democrats
body:
TurboTax’s commercial put a spotlight on the tax prep industry’s dirty little secret. | | | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58755910/392135242/-1964596891?ms=em-header&refcode=EMZ11S_TAX_E_20230215_V1S3_i&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNDBjYzg2OC00N2FkLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=spY8xxTdcVgckeIsaCdDZYKOHyFJq36cD2XWjUsP8-E=&emci=9a191be1-b4ac-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=d40cc868-47ad-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=9027908)
---
Did you watch the Super Bowl last Sunday? You might have seen an ad from Intuit TurboTax, where a guy was dancing in front of a fountain without a care in the world, free to frolic because he was getting TurboTax to do his taxes for him. Sounds happy and peaceful, right? But I was just about ready to throw my remote at the TV screen. Why? Because tax prep giants — including TurboTax — have spent decades, and tens of millions of dollars, lobbying Washington to make tax filing as much of a hassle as possible. All so they can maximize profits by reeling in frustrated taxpayers, often with misleading marketing that steers people away from free options. And after wringing profits out of working families at tax time, they can afford to shell out millions of dollars for fancy Super Bowl ads. So the ad was basically like an arsonist bragging about charging money to put out the fire they started. [_**Let’s fight back together. Add your name if you agree that we need a tax filing system that works for working people, not tax prep corporations — with free, simplified filing.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58755911/392135243/1713952493?refcode=EMZ11S_TAX_E_20230215_V1S3_i&ms=EMZ11S_TAX_E_20230215_V1S3_i&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNDBjYzg2OC00N2FkLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=spY8xxTdcVgckeIsaCdDZYKOHyFJq36cD2XWjUsP8-E=&emci=9a191be1-b4ac-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=d40cc868-47ad-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=9027908) | [**ADD YOUR NAME**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58755912/392135244/1713952493?refcode=EMZ11S_TAX_E_20230215_V1S3_i&ms=EMZ11S_TAX_E_20230215_V1S3_i&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNDBjYzg2OC00N2FkLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=spY8xxTdcVgckeIsaCdDZYKOHyFJq36cD2XWjUsP8-E=&emci=9a191be1-b4ac-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=d40cc868-47ad-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=9027908)
---
If companies like TurboTax weren’t throwing extra hurdles in front of taxpayers, then maybe the guy in the ad could dance in front of the fountain with a few extra hundreds in his wallet — money that he wouldn’t have to hand over to TurboTax.
Because the IRS could have filed his taxes for him. For free.
You see, every year, when your W2s and 1099s come in the mail, your employer has already sent a copy to the government. So it’s no secret: The IRS already knows how much you make before you file your taxes.
So instead of all the scrambling, calculating, and late nights, you could simply get a pre-filled tax form based on information the IRS already has. You’d confirm the information, and send it back. A free filing system would take the head-ache — and the expense — out of doing your taxes.
**I’ve spent years fighting for a free, simple federal tax filing system. And with the funding that Democrats passed through Congress last year, we’re closer than ever to making it happen. I’m staying in the fight until we get this done.**
[_**Add your name to say you agree: We need a free, simple federal tax filing system. As a grassroots movement, we can beat the corporate tax prep lobby, as long as we fight side by side.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58755913/392135245/1713952493?refcode=EMZ11S_TAX_E_20230215_V1S3_i&ms=EMZ11S_TAX_E_20230215_V1S3_i&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNDBjYzg2OC00N2FkLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=spY8xxTdcVgckeIsaCdDZYKOHyFJq36cD2XWjUsP8-E=&emci=9a191be1-b4ac-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=d40cc868-47ad-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=9027908)

clean_body: TurboTax’s commercial put a spotlight on the tax prep industry’s dirty little secret. | | | Did you watch the Super Bowl last Sunday? You might have seen an ad from Intuit TurboTax, where a guy was dancing in front of a fountain without a care in the world, free to frolic because he was getting TurboTax to do his taxes for him. Sounds happy and peaceful, right? But I was just about ready to throw my remote at the TV screen. Why? Because tax prep giants — including TurboTax — have spent decades, and tens of millions of dollars, lobbying Washington to make tax filing as much of a hassle as possible. All so they can maximize profits by reeling in frustrated taxpayers, often with misleading marketing that steers people away from free options. And after wringing profits out of working families at tax time, they can afford to shell out millions of dollars for fancy Super Bowl ads. So the ad was basically like an arsonist bragging about charging money to put out the fire they started. | If companies like TurboTax weren’t throwing extra hurdles in front of taxpayers, then maybe the guy in the ad could dance in front of the fountain with a few extra hundreds in his wallet — money that he wouldn’t have to hand over to TurboTax. Because the IRS could have filed his taxes for him. For free. You see, every year, when your W2s and 1099s come in the mail, your employer has already sent a copy to the government. So it’s no secret: The IRS already knows how much you make before you file your taxes. So instead of all the scrambling, calculating, and late nights, you could simply get a pre-filled tax form based on information the IRS already has. You’d confirm the information, and send it back. A free filing system would take the head-ache — and the expense — out of doing your taxes. I’ve spent years fighting for a free, simple federal tax filing system. And with the funding that Democrats passed through Congress last year, we’re closer than ever to making it happen. I’m staying in the fight until we get this done. Thanks for being a part of this, Elizabeth | | | | | | ---|---|---|--- | Paid for by Warren Democrats All content © 2023 Warren Democrats, All Rights Reserved PO Box 171375, Boston, MA 02117

body:
6 days left in this primary race
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9414771a-e56b-4bd0-8b3c-76ea576e1db2/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

| | | | | Peter, **_In six days Wisconsin could become a red state for the foreseeable future—a far cry from where it was when Democrats could often count on the state’s electoral votes for the presidency—OR ... we can help rebalance the state judiciary after years of Republican mismanagement._ ** _On February 21st, there's a first round of elections for an open Wisconsin Supreme Court seat_ _\--a top two primary for a seat vacated by a conservative judge_ _. If two Democrats win the primary, we can guarantee that the court adds another jurist who cares about democracy and women’s rights._ [**_Can you join us in rushing $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to Wisconsin Supreme Court Justice candidates _Everett Mitchell & Janet Protasiewicz. _It's hard to think of any race having more on the line._**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5a497b98-512c-4c39-a6b4-859a10a086e2/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _From our friends at Pod Save America:_ [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4085bb96-91a4-4dd0-aaf0-59edd059434d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) To recap from a previous email we sent: **_With a right winger leaving Wisconsin's Supreme Court, we must elect a Democrat. There'__s an open primary Feb. 21st __with two Democrats and two Republicans_ _. If Dems run first and second, we guarantee a win in April's general election. At the very least, we must stop both Republicans from winning the 21st, shutting us out of the general election._** _Meanwhile, The Wisconsin Democratic Party just shared:_ We just got word MAGA Republican-aligned candidate Jennifer Dorow just placed a $60,000 ad buy.

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. subject: As American as apple pie
disclaimer_text: Paid for by SFA, Inc
body:
The Left can't handle it, but this is the truth
ACTION REQUIRED: Step up before it's too late.

| | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62325962:6tPxiiG-N:m:1:3331421248:8D3877081E2570D38656A872180BEE1B:r) | This American story begins with a woman named Raj Randhawa from Punjab, India who dreamed of serving on the country's judicial bench. She worked hard, earned her law degree, and was offered a seat on the court. Only then, her family's disapproval stopped her from taking it.

Because of her belief in the American Dream, Raj and her husband, Ajit, immigrated to America and settled in Bamberg, South Carolina where they had and raised their children to have faith in God and love their country.

**They would never have guessed everything their daughter, Nikki Haley, would do with the risk they took to achieve the American Dream.**

At age 12, Nikki started working in her mother's dress shop and learned the hard work behind every dollar earned.

When she learned it was too easy for the government to take and spend that dollar without accountability, she ran for the South Carolina state legislature.

She stood up to corrupt Republicans and insiders in her state that wanted to spend taxpayer dollars on their pet projects without any accountability. She championed a law forcing them to be on the record for every single spending bill. They tried to punish her by taking her spot in Republican leadership for it.

But she kept fighting. She never lost a race. And went on to serve two terms as South Carolina's governor until Trump called on her to stand for America as the U.S. Ambassador to the United Nations.

Nikki's story is an American story. In just one generation, she pulled herself up through hard work and determination.

She didn't blame America when the going got tough. She knows it's America's unique promise of freedom and opportunity that made her story possible in the first place.

_**Now, she 's running for president to protect the American Dream and stop the Left from erasing our country's fundamental values with their woke, socialist agenda.**_

[**Will you chip in $25 or more to join Nikki 's fight and help her to victory?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62325962:6tPxiiG-N:m:1:3331421248:8D3877081E2570D38656A872180BEE1B:r)** ** How the story ends and the future of our country depends on pro-freedom patriots like YOU.
**[**BE A PART OF NIKKI 'S STORY **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62325962:6tPxiiG-N:m:1:3331421248:8D3877081E2570D38656A872180BEE1B:r)**
---

**It 's time to elect the next generation of conservative leaders who will stand for America. **

[**If you agree, stand with Nikki Haley now in her fight to defend freedom and save the American Dream.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62325962:6tPxiiG-N:m:1:3331421248:8D3877081E2570D38656A872180BEE1B:r)

**[**JOIN NIKKI 'S FIGHT NOW **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62325962:6tPxiiG-N:m:1:3331421248:8D3877081E2570D38656A872180BEE1B:r)**

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58756571/392138336/1995090618?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZjBiMDBjZC00OWFkLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-kCEqeKzSIiphhWQGWuqH-caa_AbrmDjckXlamc6dL8=&emci=33604377-a6ac-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=4f0b00cd-49ad-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=4568237)

| | Derek, When the CHIPS Act was signed into law last year, we made an important step towards bringing high-paying manufacturing jobs back to America, allowing us to lead the way in the production of technology, create more jobs, and promote American innovation. Add to that the Bipartisan Infrastructure Legislation and the Inflation Reduction Act, and it’s no surprise that we are starting to slow down inflation and get our economy back on track. In the Senate, I worked hard to get these bills over the finish line, but I could not have done it without grassroots support from folks like you. As Democrats, we should be proud of this progress, but we can’t afford to rest on our past victories. We’re facing a GOP-controlled House, a tough Senate map in 2024, and a potential Trump-Biden rematch... Not to mention a critical state election here in Virginia this year. With so much more work yet to be done, we have to make sure our progress doesn’t grind to a halt. That’s why I’m asking for your help today. The stakes are high for Democrats over these next two years, and we need to be investing right now in grassroots efforts to continue our progress. _[**Will you chip in $5 before our mid-month deadline tonight to help me keep up this momentum?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58756572/392138338/-1347152690?refcode=mw_em_230215_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZjBiMDBjZC00OWFkLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-kCEqeKzSIiphhWQGWuqH-caa_AbrmDjckXlamc6dL8=)_ We have to continue raising the money we need to elect Democratic candidates in 2024 – particularly with so many of our Senate seats up and the GOP already looking to wipe out our majority. Only by doing that will we be able to continue expanding on the work we have been doing and keep delivering for Virginians and folks across the country. _[**Contribute $5 today to help me keep fighting in Washington to make more progress for the American economy >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58756574/392138339/-1347152690?refcode=mw_em_230215_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZjBiMDBjZC00OWFkLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-kCEqeKzSIiphhWQGWuqH-caa_AbrmDjckXlamc6dL8=)_ Thank you for your support, Mark **[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58756575/392138342/-1347152690?refcode=mw_em_230215_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZjBiMDBjZC00OWFkLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-kCEqeKzSIiphhWQGWuqH-caa_AbrmDjckXlamc6dL8=)**

name: Harmeet Dhillon
subject: We're suing Kaiser Permanente and we need your help
body:
I’m asking for your immediate help to stop the radical Left’s medical mutilation of our children

| |
---
| | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zu4vffagf24j2grp8pmina9moit8jrg43iadb2q0_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c5jmep35cph2bs)
---
| | Dear Fellow Conservative, My name is Harmeet Dhillon, the founder and Chief Executive Officer of the Center for American Liberty, and I’m asking for your immediate help to stop the radical Left’s medical mutilation of our children in the name of “gender dysphoria.”
---
| | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z2onkc5sp50vln85n6gdcc7lt4id2vlsgge3rf0g_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c5jmep35cph2bs)
---
| We were recently on Tucker Carlson Tonight, announcing that we just launched a landmark case against the hospitals AND doctors who coerced Chloe Cole to transition to a “boy” at the young age of 13.
---
| | **In case you missed our announcement on Tucker’s show, let me quickly give you the details of our case:** As a young 13-year-old girl, doctors began transitioning Chloe to become a boy...
---
_This included putting her on experimental drugs like**Lupron** , a drug that has been used to chemically castrate violent sex offenders..._
---
_... Giving her constant testosterone injections..._ _... And removing both of her breasts in a double-mastectomy surgery at the age of 15._ **_How was this allowed to happen?_** It’s because the doctors and hospitals lied to the family -- including one powerful lie constantly used to scare parents into agreeing to this medical mutilation:
---
“Would you rather have a dead daughter or a live son?”
---
This lie is repeated to struggling families so doctors and hospitals can perform lucrative transgender medical experimentation on children... And I’m asking for your help today to put an end to it! [**Specifically, I’m asking you to make a one-time emergency donation of $25 today to hold the hospitals AND doctors responsible for their barbaric actions.**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zv0gtbhopvp16fq01gr8hi665kh7o4hvbfqqfb6g_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c5jmep35cph2bs) Because until these predators are held responsible things will never change... And if we don’t act right away, more and more children will be put under the knife and experimented on. Medical facilities are actively promoting, encouraging, and advertising these barbaric treatments to minors. Chloe has suffered physically, socially, emotionally, and psychologically from their lies and experiments. Chloe also has no idea if she’ll ever experience the profound joy of motherhood... and if she is able to one day have kids, she knows she will not be able to breastfeed them. The medical experimentation performed on Chloe as a young child caused permanent and irreversible damage to her body and the predators that did this must be held accountable... ...and that’s where you come in. [**Please make an urgent donation of $25 today - but of course if you can give more, say $35, $50, $100, $250 or more I would be eternally grateful. **](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z5a1fqir4ga7tlpsi9nunvkq8r5f1itb9t4jatp8_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c5jmep35cph2bs) Whatever amount you’re able to give today will be used to hold these radical activists pushing this disgusting agenda on our children accountable. ** **
---
| | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zcnufjav64m1ob62bg787369ij9tuafg4va4a1r8_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c5jmep35cph2bs)
---
| So please, do not delay. Chloe’s landmark case is the case that can put a stop to these “physicians” abusing and mutilating children... With your help we can save many more lives like Chloe's.
---
| | [**So please consider a generous contribution of $25, 35, $50, $100, $250 or more today.**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zvo7uiq0m3di9bmfbs5aiipm5f4q4kq97ptqt4jo_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c5jmep35cph2bs) Sincerely,
---
| |
---
|
---
| | P.S. We must put an end to the medical mutilation happening to thousands of children across the country -- and winning Chloe Cole’s landmark case is how we stop them. Our case holds the hospitals AND doctors responsible for their experimentation and will ensure that these predators who abuse our children in the name of a radical Left-wing agenda think again. [**I hope I can count on your urgent tax-deductible donation of $25, 35, $50, $100, $250 or more today.**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zlc48047em6gifbdq137paqod5tbi6g7hpi85h08_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c5jmep35cph2bs)
---
| | [**DONATE NOW**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zdvg74at7587u59g2nskanpk31l5gakapie8fiio_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c5jmep35cph2bs)
---
| | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z2f2kkojf1nklbutsesr5v7pr9pahbjr3cd766m8_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c5jmep35cph2bs)
---
The Center for American Liberty is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization created to fight against growing anti-free speech and anti-civil liberties trends.
---

---
PO Box 2510, Leesburg, VA 20177
---
---

625 First St #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Nikki Haley
subject: I am running for President of the United States of America!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nikki Haley for President
body: ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ To unsubscribe from Nikki Haley for President, click here https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=d763fda3799c78a165dbd34b90dc046909ff714f15f675590eb02b5af5bd98e6cb8168653d7182d50a24c3df64a3c13ad4e23fa9b293b1a2fab01210d1a43874 Dear Peter, I have an announcement to make. I am running for President of the United States of America! I am running because America is falling behind. Our future is slipping. Our leaders are failing us. Right now, in the greatest country in human history, we have too many families paying too much for groceries; too many mothers searching frantically for baby formula; and too many children who are so far behind in the classroom, they might never get ahead. We have too many small businesses who can’t afford rent, and too many big businesses getting taxpayer bailouts. We have too much crime on our streets – too many drugs flooding our cities – and too few police and border patrol. And from Joe Biden on down, our leaders put too much trust in big government and too little trust in the American people. They have us spiraling toward socialism, with a new trillion-dollar spending bill every few months, and a national debt over 30 trillion dollars. This is not the America I want to leave to my children! I am running for President because I know that we can do better. https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=d763fda3799c78a165dbd34b90dc046909ff714f15f675590eb02b5af5bd98e6cb8168653d7182d50a24c3df64a3c13ad4e23fa9b293b1a2fab01210d1a43874 Will you join me in this mission? I am the proud daughter of legal immigrants. My parents left India in search of a better life. They found it in Bamberg, South Carolina – population, 2,500. It wasn’t always easy. We were the only Indian family in our small town. Nobody knew who we were, what we were, or why we were there. But my parents knew. Every day, my parents reminded me, my brothers, and my sister that even on our worst day, we are blessed to live in America. They were right then – and they’re right now! My parents came to a country that was gaining strength and growing in confidence. But that was then. Now, every day America falls further behind. My purpose in running for President is to save our country from the downward spiral of socialism and defeatism. I aim to move America upward toward freedom and strength. As my family and I start this journey, we ask for your prayers. And yes, of course, we ask for your vote. But there’s something else we need even more. Something our country needs above all else… It’s your spirit and your belief in America. Look past the failed ideas and leaders in Washington – and find the courage to be part of the solution. Cast off the fear that our best days are behind us – and join the movement for our country’s renewal. https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=d763fda3799c78a165dbd34b90dc046909ff714f15f675590eb02b5af5bd98e6cb8168653d7182d50a24c3df64a3c13ad4e23fa9b293b1a2fab01210d1a43874 See the same America I see… and stand for America, together with me. I’m more confident than ever that we can make this vision real in our time – because that’s what I’ve seen my entire life. As a brown girl, growing up in a black-and-white world, I saw the promise of America unfold before me. As the proud wife of a combat veteran, I saw our people’s deep love of freedom, and determination to defend it. As Governor, I saw our state move beyond hate and violence, and lift everyone in peace. And as Ambassador, I saw that America is still the standard. The time has come to renew that spirit and rally our people. Our moment is now – and our mission is clear. Let’s save our country and secure our future. And let’s move forward, together, toward our destiny – in a strong and proud America! I appreciate your support more than you can imagine. https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=d763fda3799c78a18f5edb96d8165f4fc315c8d454130b8d4e95896f4ff2bb0981adb9fa4a0ad432c74f5a40fb56c52a246c0cf2ed5b8ee31fd15eae3dc874be If you can join us today by chipping in, it would mean so much to me. Thank you for everything you do for our country. My very best, https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=d763fda3799c78a165dbd34b90dc046909ff714f15f675590eb02b5af5bd98e6cb8168653d7182d50a24c3df64a3c13ad4e23fa9b293b1a2fab01210d1a43874 Nikki Haley P.S. I know that together we can save our country. I am so thankful for your support. https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=d763fda3799c78a165dbd34b90dc046909ff714f15f675590eb02b5af5bd98e6cb8168653d7182d50a24c3df64a3c13ad4e23fa9b293b1a2fab01210d1a43874 If you can chip in even $5 it would mean so much to me. Thank you again! https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=d763fda3799c78a165dbd34b90dc046909ff714f15f675590eb02b5af5bd98e6cb8168653d7182d50a24c3df64a3c13ad4e23fa9b293b1a2fab01210d1a43874 Donate Paid for by Nikki Haley for President. https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=d763fda3799c78a18351042cbf938eaa7d16b7a5a7de59c0494e3925ea49fa243d3f1d3ef1af5ede6c1cbdb2decae66d81c086334111e937de333998dd723172 www.nikkihaley.com *By providing your phone number, you are consenting to receive SMS/MMS news alerts, action items, and donation requests to the number provided from each of Nikki Haley for President, Stand For America PAC, Stand for America, Team Stand For America, SFA Inc., and Ambassador Nikki Haley (48324) directly or by third parties acting on their behalf. I am running for President of the United States of America! I am running because America is falling behind. Our future is slipping. Our leaders are failing us. Right now, in the greatest country in human history, we have too many families paying too much for groceries; too many mothers searching frantically for baby formula; and too many children who are so far behind in the classroom, they might never get ahead. We have too many small businesses who can’t afford rent, and too many big businesses getting taxpayer bailouts. We have too much crime on our streets – too many drugs flooding our cities – and too few police and border patrol. And from Joe Biden on down, our leaders put too much trust in big government and too little trust in the American people. They have us spiraling toward socialism, with a new trillion-dollar spending bill every few months, and a national debt over 30 trillion dollars. This is not the America I want to leave to my children! I am running for President because I know that we can do better. Will you join me in this mission? I am the proud daughter of legal immigrants. My parents left India in search of a better life. They found it in Bamberg, South Carolina – population, 2,500. It wasn’t always easy. We were the only Indian family in our small town. Nobody knew who we were, what we were, or why we were there. But my parents knew. Every day, my parents reminded me, my brothers, and my sister that even on our worst day, we are blessed to live in America. They were right then – and they’re right now! My parents came to a country that was gaining strength and growing in confidence. But that was then. Now, every day America falls further behind. My purpose in running for President is to save our country from the downward spiral of socialism and defeatism. I aim to move America upward toward freedom and strength. As my family and I start this journey, we ask for your prayers. And yes, of course, we ask for your vote. But there’s something else we need even more. Something our country needs above all else… It’s your spirit and your belief in America. Look past the failed ideas and leaders in Washington – and find the courage to be part of the solution. Cast off the fear that our best days are behind us – and join the movement for our country’s renewal. See the same America I see… and stand for America, together with me. I’m more confident than ever that we can make this vision real in our time – because that’s what I’ve seen my entire life. As a brown girl, growing up in a black-and-white world, I saw the promise of America unfold before me. As the proud wife of a combat veteran, I saw our people’s deep love of freedom, and determination to defend it. As Governor, I saw our state move beyond hate and violence, and lift everyone in peace. And as Ambassador, I saw that America is still the standard. The time has come to renew that spirit and rally our people. Our moment is now – and our mission is clear. Let’s save our country and secure our future. And let’s move forward, together, toward our destiny – in a strong and proud America! I appreciate your support more than you can imagine. If you can join us today by chipping in, it would mean so much to me. Thank you for everything you do for our country. My very best, Nikki Haley P.S. I know that together we can save our country. I am so thankful for your support. If you can chip in even $5 it would mean so much to me. Thank you again! Donate Paid for by Nikki Haley for President. www.nikkihaley.com *By providing your phone number, you are consenting to receive SMS/MMS news alerts, action items, and donation requests to the number provided from each of Nikki Haley for President, Stand For America PAC, Stand for America, Team Stand For America, SFA Inc., and Ambassador Nikki Haley (48324) directly or by third parties acting on their behalf. Texts may be sent via an automated telephone dialing system. Consent not required to contribute. Message frequency varies. Message and data rates may apply.

| SD 10 Republican Nomination Update
---
| We will have a convention for State Senate District 10 at 10am on May 6th, at Buckingham High School. The address is 78 Knights Rd., Buckingham, VA 23921. You and your friends cannot vote unless you complete the delegate form.
Please print the PDF form here [www.john4va.com](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001x5pwm93Wzv_3L3I12HB4TqFTQc1aPcjJFNpnq9o45sdQ2AAYWe7weVi0baASBOo9DRoH13AIqmLxezBq1ICdqnBElDCiwDXj6EYRcNwUn0dsTORJeiGunyNRoJv7TYnCntY1pY7EWFfsLMqzVVU8CaJ91r1nhvQobCtb7aaOVtBB24-pjYw3S2kGJkrURz6TdPejEaSvvAzO3KDZK31fLPIa9zpatQp0VKBQbr1ifSjYIswWFTLZmB86_jTn_-_r&c=oQfoBGoeyh_3V7UZPayjlr5v7TUJgXRZVsXIyrBsSqI1GUUhYW-lhA==&ch=Gk7Z5CwSxZoHUzGIPg7V_tfLeMkbNLHAUonhvowAuAaTnpAOt5JNyA==), fill it out, and reach out to our team at john@mcguireforvirginia.com or call 804-588-2646 to turn in your form. ***YOU DO NOT HAVE TO PAY A FEE.***
*Also, please consider printing out extra forms for family members and friends. You can also drop your forms off at one of our meet and greet events.

I invite you and your friends to join me in this cause. You can sign up to volunteer to make phone calls, knock doors, and more at john@mcguireforvirginia.com Take care, please spread the word and I look forward to seeing you around the district!
