body:
| | |
---
**Friend, Mitch McConnell just needs to flip two seats to take back control of the Senate, and The Washington Post is calling the 2024 map a "GOP dream."**
In an election like this, every single seat matters — and Republicans in New York just had their best election cycle in _decades_. Their historic victories here helped hand Kevin McCarthy control of the House, and right-wing extremist Lee Zeldin nearly won the race for governor.
Now, Zeldin is DIRECTLY attacking Sen. Kirsten Gillibrand as he gears up to potentially challenge her in 2024. **Republicans have their sights set on Kirsten's Senate seat, friend — and they're hellbent on defeating her.**
Kirsten is working night and day to defend this seat and save our Senate majority. **But tonight, she's falling dangerously short of her $25,000 mid-month goal, and we're running out of time to make up the gap.** [So please, before our midnight deadline, will you rush $5 so that Kirsten can protect our Senate majority and stop far-right extremists from taking power in Washington?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58758993/392146137/-2054302023?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk3920-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyY2U1ZGFhYi00ZWFkLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DiFEoNNqayqsdcmv1_GEow22RJcnryWFe5bA59ninW4=)

Mitch McConnell, Lee Zeldin and other GOP leaders have a long list of corporate megadonors who will bankroll their extremist campaigns. **But Kirsten refuses to accept _a single cent_ from corporate PACs**. She is relying entirely on people like you to power this grassroots campaign.
**So right now, Kirsten needs you to step up, friend:**[**Please, will you make a donation now to stop the GOP from gaining more ground in New York and****help defend our fragile Senate majority****?****There are just a few hours until our midnight deadline, and with Republicans watching our every move, we cannot afford to show any weakness.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58758996/392146141/-2054302023?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk3920-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyY2U1ZGFhYi00ZWFkLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DiFEoNNqayqsdcmv1_GEow22RJcnryWFe5bA59ninW4=)

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58759001/392146148/1575385346?refcode=jtk3920-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyY2U1ZGFhYi00ZWFkLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DiFEoNNqayqsdcmv1_GEow22RJcnryWFe5bA59ninW4=) A note from Kirsten: Friend, I can’t thank you enough for standing by my side in the critical fights ahead of us. As Democrats face our toughest Senate map in decades, I need your help more than ever. While Republicans only have to defend 10 seats in 2024, Democrats have to defend 23 – and if the GOP flips just two of them, it will deliver Senate control back to Mitch McConnell. Now, Nate Silver’s FiveThirtyEight is saying that the GOP has a clear path to the majority. As right-wing special interests gear up to pour millions into flipping the Senate, we need to fight back right now. But I refuse to take a single cent from corporate PACs, which means I’m relying on your grassroots support. [**So please, chip in to help defend our narrow Democratic Senate majority.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58759002/392146149/-2054302023?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk3920-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyY2U1ZGFhYi00ZWFkLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DiFEoNNqayqsdcmv1_GEow22RJcnryWFe5bA59ninW4=) And if you’d like to become a core member of my team and receive exclusive texts from my campaign, [**text JOIN to 60708.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58759003/392146150/-2054302023?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk3920-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyY2U1ZGFhYi00ZWFkLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DiFEoNNqayqsdcmv1_GEow22RJcnryWFe5bA59ninW4=) Thank you, Kirsten Gillibrand

name: Team Haley
subject: The View attacks Nikki Haley
body:
As it turns out, The View is as predictable as it is liberal.

| |
---
| | | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zg6blv9uaol7777d85g2h0o92014s0lamqkhb7m8_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c5jm1p70shh2bs)
---

Friend,

As it turns out, The View is as predictable as it is liberal.

Nikki Haley just launched her official campaign video and right away Whoopi Goldberg attacked her.

The thought of a strong female conservative minority running for President makes the liberals' heads explode.

---
| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zfpb6pj9s9mvba8s7u93aa22m0ki69b9rkmnh4cg_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c5jm1p70shh2bs)
---

Nikki Haley isn't just up against the Democrats, she's up against the bias of the liberal media.

We shouldn't be surprised.

Nikki Haley won't back down because of the liberal media's bias.

As long as she has a voice, she'll keep standing for you and for this country.

_**[If you want to join Nikki Haley's team, fight against the Left's bias, and stand for America, pitch in a contribution to her campaign today.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zt2i1nnoeimk8cbbk13rvrscscl9hpilb97pckb0_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c5jm1p70shh2bs "If you want to join Nikki Haley’s team, fight against the Left’s bias, and stand for America, pitch in a contribution to her campaign today.")**_

Thanks,
Team Haley
---
|

name: Maggie Hassan
subject: Explaining our campaign debt
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Serve America PAC
body:
Hi – I’ll explain more below but our (victorious!) campaign has a little bit of debt to pay off. We made some great progress before the end of the year, and we’ve got just a little bit left to go. If you could give just $10 right now -- split with Serve America -- to help us pay it down so that I can continue focusing my energy on serving in the Senate, I’d be very grateful. Here’s the link: secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-hassan [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-hassan]
Look – the last few weeks of our campaign were a whirlwind. GOP spending against us skyrocketed, polls tightened, and pundits were doubting whether we could win.
My team put our heads down and focused on our final advertising investments to get us through the last few days of the campaign. We were making decisions with the information we had, hoping with all our might that the funding will come through.
Unfortunately, all of our funding didn’t come through and now my campaign has a bit of a hole to fill to get our last bills paid. We’ve made a ton of progress in closing the gap and since you’re one of my most important supporters, I’m hoping that I can count on you to get us over the top.
Will you please give $10 or as much as you can to help us retire our debt? Your donation will be split between my campaign and Serve America, and I’d be grateful for anything you can give. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-hassan]
I’m proud of you and our campaign team and the work we did together. Now, we just have to finish this thing off.
Thank you for your help.
With every good wish,
Maggie Hassan

name: Tom Brejcha
subject: 9 felonies for exposing Planned Parenthood
body:
David Daleiden spent 30 months investigating and capturing video footage of Planned Parenthood executives

| |
---
| | Dear Friend, David Daleiden spent 30 months investigating and capturing video footage of Planned Parenthood executives haggling over the price of aborted baby body parts,exposing their evil to the world. _Now he’s being charged with 9 felonies for his heroism._ [**Which is why I’m asking you to make an emergency donation to the DALEIDEN DEFENSE FUND right away.**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c06126%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=O67HV42fMccxV6TtS7nfog&sysid=1) You might remember David Daleiden as the citizen journalist who recorded and released shocking videos of the illegal and disgusting actions of abortion executives back in 2015. But far from the abortion executives being held accountable for their crimes, _David_ is the one now facing nine bogus felonies and federal prison time. And it gets even worse, because after David released his appalling footage, Kamala Harris, then California's Attorney General, colluded with Planned Parenthood to file felony charges against David... I won't sugarcoat it. If not cleared of these charges, David faces years in a state penitentiary and the consequences of being a convicted felon. All while Kamala Harris is sitting one heartbeat away from the presidency. That's the bad news. But here's the good news... we’re still fighting for David. The Thomas More Society is a not-for-profit law firm spearheading and underwriting David’s criminal defense. **_Because when dark forces like Planned Parenthood unleash their full might to legally, financially, and personally destroy our clients --- we fight back._** After significant delays, including multiple appeals to the California Supreme Court, David’s criminal trial will begin in just a few months. That trial, which itself could last up to two months, will be very costly. We’ve brought on board several legal all-stars to assist our Thomas More Society team in defending David. You see, we’ve retained the three-term former District Attorney of Los Angeles and several of his most skilled lieutenants. Bringing these experienced California criminal practitioners with our best attorneys means David will have the best criminal defense team possible to defend him in San Francisco, possibly the most hostile environment in the country for pro-lifers. [**Can I count on your emergency gift of $35 or more to the DALEIDEN DEFENSE FUND?**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c06127%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=HCs07%2fMYX652Qc%2fWVYkk3Q&sysid=1) The reality is. . . You couldn't be there when David entered the dark underbelly of the abortion industry --- sitting across the table from abortionists haggling over the price of baby body parts with cold-blooded clarity... "I want a Lamborghini." You couldn't be there as David saw with his own eyes the preborn children who had been killed with great precision and delicacy to preserve their organs for maximum profit. You couldn't be there when the videos were released and Kamala Harris and Planned Parenthood conspired to crush David with trumped up legal charges and an armed raid on his home in which they seized laptops, hard-drives, and recording equipment. And you couldn't be there with David when he voluntarily appeared in both Texas and California for booking and processing --- fingerprinted and photographed for a mugshot like a common criminal. But, now, this is the reality... there is something you can do. [**You can make a donation to the DAVID DALEIDEN DEFENSE FUND to help vindicate this pro-life hero.**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c06128%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=79xC2qc4Fpcpy0vWArsnjg&sysid=1) I have to tell you, despite all that David is facing, his spirits remain high. Of course, I've never known anyone in this kind of position who didn't feel an empty pit in his stomach. But David's not giving up. His willingness to fight back is a true profile in pro-life courage. Now I'll get right down to it... In addition to this criminal case, and a federal civil rights countersuit, we're currently representing David in two other monster cases. Planned Parenthood sued David civilly in federal court in San Francisco. In that case, after a series of hostile rulings from an Obama-appointed district judge with ties to the local Planned Parenthood, we are appealing the jury's verdict, along with that judge's order banning David from doing any more undercover journalism against Planned Parenthood. We’re fighting back, but we’ll need your help. The National Abortion Federation also sued David in the same court, in front of the same judge, for a "gag order" injunction that prohibits David from releasing blockbuster video from its two annual abortion industry conferences. David and his team collected hundreds of hours of videos of abortionists at their worst, but all of it remains under injunction. After a tough decision in front of a Ninth Circuit panel, **we’re now taking this all the way to the Supreme Court.** It's not all bad news though. Recently we scored a victory in a University of Washington (UW) case, where abortionists and their allies had sued David Daleiden and the UW over David’s public records requests for documents relating to the UW’s taxpayer-funded “clearinghouse” for aborted babies’ tissue and organs. **The Thomas More Society secured a settlement of this lawsuit** , clearing the way to end a six-year legal battle that included an astonishing three appeals to the Ninth Circuit Court of Appeals. That settlement won nearly everything that David Daleiden was seeking from the UW: **_thousands of pages of new documents on the buying and selling of aborted babies’ tissue and organs_** , including the key job titles and corporate information needed to track which companies and entities are buying and selling those baby parts, and for how much. Victories like this are why we continue to fight for David and the unborn, but the burden of these cases against David are heavy. That's why David needs your financial support today. [**And that's why I'm praying you will donate $35 or more to the DAVID DALEIDEN DEFENSE FUND right away.**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c06129%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=4LLF4uJmsu8%2fe8pGk7rM7A&sysid=1) I won't guess how much you're able to send today. Whether it's $35, $50, $75, $125, $250, $500, $1,000 or more... ... I will only say that time is of the essence. So, I do ask that you make your donation as soon as you can. This truly is a "David versus Goliath" type of battle --- with Kamala Harris, Planned Parenthood, and the radical left arrayed against our "David." **It's a grave injustice that David is the one being hit with felony charges and massive civil penalties while Planned Parenthood (so far, at least) has gone unpunished**. By clearing David of these charges... you and I can allow him to continue with his incredibly important lifesaving work. Remember, over **12 million people on YouTube alone watched the shocking footage he captured.** Since that time, over half the states in the country have moved to strip Planned Parenthood of taxpayer funding, and _Roe v. Wade_ has been overturned. It's no wonder Planned Parenthood and their allies want to destroy David. They'd love to see him rotting away in a penitentiary rather than exposing their criminal and inhumane activities. You and I cannot let that happen. [**So please don't delay. Donate $35, $50, $100, or more to stand with David Daleiden today.**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c06120%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=KF%2bm2ePm7bV2p%2bZkZJGPLQ&sysid=1) I know he'll be deeply touched by your generous support.
---
| | May God bless you,
---
---
Tom Brejcha
President & Chief Counsel
---
P.S. Kamala Harris, Planned Parenthood, and their allies want to destroy David. They'd love to see him rotting away in a penitentiary rather than exposing their criminal, ghoulish activities. You and I cannot let that happen. Can I count on you to support the official criminal defense of David Daleiden? [**David is a pro-life hero. Will you make a generous donation to the DAVID DALEIDEN DEFENSE FUND of $35, $50, $100 or more to stop this attempt to crush him?**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c06121%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=rvmZ6n8CeTp1vYOCZgJV2w&sysid=1)

name: Senator Mike Lee
subject: I wish everyone in America would read this book
body:
If I could — hypothetically — make everyone in America read one book, it would be The Law by Frederic Bastiat. Every American, and especially every member of Congress, needs to read this book.

[](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zap2n29lhvb12q7inomerjnkf1lv0nngbag4v6s0_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c5ge0p36c1h2bs)

Hello Friend,

If I could -- hypothetically -- make everyone in America read one book, it would be The Law by Frederic Bastiat. Every American, and especially every member of Congress, needs to read this book.

And while I can't make you read the book, Friend, I can send you a copy.

Bastiat wrote this book as a defense of life, liberty, and property.

**It points out the fallacy behind most failed government programs and summarizes the principles of liberty, which FEE teaches kids through their FEE in the Classroom program.**

I just talked with Zilvinas Silenas, President of the Foundation for Economic Education (FEE), and we want to get _The Law_ into your hands to thank you for supporting FEE.

FEE's mission is to inspire, educate, and connect future leaders with the economic, ethical, and legal principles of a free society, including individual liberty, free markets, entrepreneurship, private property, high moral character, and limited government.

[_**Zilvinas wants to send a copy to every new supporter who clicks this link and sends a gift of $10, $25, $50, or any generous amount. Claim your copy here >>>**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z56eodujq96h6880epjb65ncf6dgs9em6nq4m830_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c5ge0p36c1h2bs)

*****Donate $250 and more to get a signed copy of The Law from FEE 's President.*****

FEE fights against socialism and communism not because they've heard it's terrible but because many of their staff have lived through it.

Zilvinas grew up in Soviet-controlled Lithuania. Here is just one example from his childhood:

_" On May 1, 1986, my family skipped the mandatory workers' parade in Lithuania. Instead of carrying around red carnations, red balloons, and red placards denouncing the U.S. and the West, we went sunbathing at a local lake.

The lake was polluted with industrial runoff from a government-owned leather factory, so swimming was out of the question. Still, the day was unusually warm, so we enjoyed the sunshine, which is not so abundant in the northeastern climes where Lithuania (then-Soviet Socialist Republic of Lithuania) sits.

What we didn't know was that five days before, on April 26, the Chernobyl nuclear power plant exploded, sending radioactive clouds westwards through Belarus, Lithuania, all the way to Sweden and Norway.

You see, on May 1, we did not know. No one told us. In fact, until the Scandinavians picked up elevated levels of radiation, most people in the Soviet Union did not know what had happened. That's how we were treated under socialism."_

**Now he 's fighting to make sure that American children don't have to experience this kind of childhood, Friend.**

[_**Friend, can you help support FEE -- and receive a copy of The Law by Frederic Bastiat by donating $10, $25, $50, or any amount? And if you donate $250 or more, you can get a personally signed copy from my friend Zilvinas. Click here to send your gift. >>>**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zut7eqropctui9vp724e45qcjm231uggvsdc9tco_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c5ge0p36c1h2bs)

FEE teaches students and teachers to share important ideas of liberty and free market economics through their program FEE in the Classroom.

**FEE in the Classroom** is countering the radical indoctrination from teachers across the country. Here's how:

**FEE in the Classroom** is a unique program held in brick-and-mortar and virtual classrooms across the country that teaches young Americans the principles of free markets, individual liberty, and limited government.

This program uniquely challenges students to think outside the box and to challenge the mainstream narrative.

In a single day, an average of 75-300 students engage with FEE's faculty of acclaimed instructors through compelling lectures, exciting economic experiments, engaging group discussions, and Q&As. Students learn how the core principles of individual liberty and free-market economics apply to their daily lives, communities, careers, and the state of the nation.

My hope is that _The Law_ will be as valuable a resource for you as it is for me. So, can I count on you to join me in supporting FEE? **Click below to send your gift and claim your copy!**

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zg2182me6va5vk88ivdlj8cuvgg4qjs6o92f36hg_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c5ge0p36c1h2bs)
[_**Donate $25 >>>**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2znnoeq96hpj6plpmr8kjfkaudu1o4qvviobhhto8_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c5ge0p36c1h2bs)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z54ldo4hkvvioi5m2t0kf013bgu9vqdqf1un9aao_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c5ge0p36c1h2bs)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zq3v42af24ojd7sn3kmtu3d2td7b7tteipr9cgeo_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c5ge0p36c1h2bs)
[_**Donate $250 and get a signed copy >>>**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z2tvb3amd18g0kicvkpkvnbqpkbgcp7vaq6tk3uo_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c5ge0p36c1h2bs)
[_**Donate $500 and get a signed copy >>>**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zd3ct5rbgg3i78o7rktgo97pkrr7u4mes7nob270_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c5ge0p36c1h2bs)
[_**Donate $1,000 and get a signed copy >>>**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zn4mbapv48833r4qbth1m7i708bn93itld8kpeno_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c5ge0p36c1h2bs)
[_**Donate $2,500 and get a signed copy >>>**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z197d38fj46s49a40i2m0dlpv38v36qcda02m3n0_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c5ge0p36c1h2bs)
[_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zm3va9nonon1mmacfhntm0kbiptgeaf4qhkrvik8_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c5ge0p36c1h2bs)

Thank you,

Senator Mike Lee

_FEE is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit educational organization, so donations made to FEE are tax-deductible to the full extent allowable by law._
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for Deroy Murdock, [please use this preferences page](http://e.deroymurdock.com/prefs/9z2z0b9tvdoj79md4h4e7cfoaqkh28pvckoi6oguffg).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zusq0fnmgsci6bkmhjotib961rsrmtlplc0jlsvg_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c5ge0p36c1h238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

body:
Shontel has always been a fierce advocate for Black Ohioans.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58762673/392158637/-849735382?refcode=EM_FR_230215BlackFighters_N_TEAM_90DO_4_NG_TESTB_logo&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OTM4Yzc3Zi01NmFkLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=P9p50LJthKJZPn-Wp0QVPLau_KyulLrRSNLIvwAtfZc=) Peter,

Black History Month is an opportunity to honor and celebrate the achievements and contributions of Black Americans who have pushed our country forward. This year, we have the chance to uplift and support our very own groundbreaking voice for Black lives, Rep. Shontel Brown.

Shontel has always been a fierce advocate for Black Ohioans. **As a Cuyahoga County Councilmember, she crafted and passed a bipartisan bill declaring racism a public health crisis.** She made history as the first woman and first Black person to lead the state's largest Democratic party, the Cuyahoga County Democrats. And now, she’s fighting for Black lives in Congress every day.

**Shontel’s work has always focused on securing healthcare, jobs, and justice for Ohio's Black community and our most disenfranchised community members.** But to keep her fighting in Congress and ensure her team has the resources to uplift Black voices in OH-11 and beyond, she needs your support.

[**_This Black History Month, join Shontel in the fight. Chipping in just $5 today will help keep her team on the ground and ensure Black voices are heard in Ohio and across the country. name: Senator Mike Lee
subject: Can you help me with something?
body:
If I could — hypothetically — make everyone in America read one book, it would be The Law by Frederic Bastiat. Every American, and especially every member of Congress, needs to read this book.

[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z7a95bfpi3q9uk660dn3qkga2fjmi664hpklpkt8_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c5ge4oj4clh2bs)

Hello Friend,

If I could -- hypothetically -- make everyone in America read one book, it would be The Law by Frederic Bastiat. Every American, and especially every member of Congress, needs to read this book.

And while I can't make you read the book, Friend, I can send you a copy.

Bastiat wrote this book as a defense of life, liberty, and property.

**It points out the fallacy behind most failed government programs and summarizes the principles of liberty, which FEE teaches kids through their FEE in the Classroom program.**

I just talked with Zilvinas Silenas, President of the Foundation for Economic Education (FEE), and we want to get _The Law_ into your hands to thank you for supporting FEE.

FEE's mission is to inspire, educate, and connect future leaders with the economic, ethical, and legal principles of a free society, including individual liberty, free markets, entrepreneurship, private property, high moral character, and limited government.

[_**Zilvinas wants to send a copy to every new supporter who clicks this link and sends a gift of $10, $25, $50, or any generous amount. Claim your copy here >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z56putmfi88p6bj9knqb7f6vi17tgu7o73q4mmbo_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c5ge4oj4clh2bs)

*****Donate $250 and more to get a signed copy of The Law from FEE 's President.*****

FEE fights against socialism and communism not because they've heard it's terrible but because many of their staff have lived through it.

Zilvinas grew up in Soviet-controlled Lithuania. Here is just one example from his childhood:

_" On May 1, 1986, my family skipped the mandatory workers' parade in Lithuania. Instead of carrying around red carnations, red balloons, and red placards denouncing the U.S. and the West, we went sunbathing at a local lake.

The lake was polluted with industrial runoff from a government-owned leather factory, so swimming was out of the question. Still, the day was unusually warm, so we enjoyed the sunshine, which is not so abundant in the northeastern climes where Lithuania (then-Soviet Socialist Republic of Lithuania) sits.

What we didn't know was that five days before, on April 26, the Chernobyl nuclear power plant exploded, sending radioactive clouds westwards through Belarus, Lithuania, all the way to Sweden and Norway.

You see, on May 1, we did not know. No one told us. In fact, until the Scandinavians picked up elevated levels of radiation, most people in the Soviet Union did not know what had happened. That's how we were treated under socialism."_

**Now he 's fighting to make sure that American children don't have to experience this kind of childhood, Friend.**

[_**Friend, can you help support FEE -- and receive a copy of The Law by Frederic Bastiat by donating $10, $25, $50, or any amount? And if you donate $250 or more, you can get a personally signed copy from my friend Zilvinas. Click here to send your gift. >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z964d1cceeljdbn6puf9erv5jt3i7vetef6gbu6g_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c5ge4oj4clh2bs)

FEE teaches students and teachers to share important ideas of liberty and free market economics through their program FEE in the Classroom.

**FEE in the Classroom** is countering the radical indoctrination from teachers across the country. Here's how:

**FEE in the Classroom** is a unique program held in brick-and-mortar and virtual classrooms across the country that teaches young Americans the principles of free markets, individual liberty, and limited government.

This program uniquely challenges students to think outside the box and to challenge the mainstream narrative.

In a single day, an average of 75-300 students engage with FEE's faculty of acclaimed instructors through compelling lectures, exciting economic experiments, engaging group discussions, and Q&As. Students learn how the core principles of individual liberty and free-market economics apply to their daily lives, communities, careers, and the state of the nation.

My hope is that _The Law_ will be as valuable a resource for you as it is for me. So, can I count on you to join me in supporting FEE? **Click below to send your gift and claim your copy!**

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zjv9sfnmd42q5j10f0g3n14ddcdptaak8c6vsdo0_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c5ge4oj4clh2bs)
[_**Donate $25 >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zandt01f1kpq0fmvhv8om68mhf4lsq5a7800d8uo_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c5ge4oj4clh2bs)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zhd4bl6pmvo21u8nnccsvl3oasnvk371rc3tro90_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c5ge4oj4clh2bs)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zj6jcas6aekq10gjhkmk5qj66l7i84j19qje008g_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c5ge4oj4clh2bs)
[_**Donate $250 and get a signed copy >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zavkb3gqn2tj4ea1pfkn3a7m8otfn6pbdk2be478_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c5ge4oj4clh2bs)
[_**Donate $500 and get a signed copy >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zmfn5c14jk561qcgu6sue2507es6er4ojcbe11o0_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c5ge4oj4clh2bs)
[_**Donate $1,000 and get a signed copy >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z35dsalrgni8ics9a7rskhscnqpfcpmficodnlao_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c5ge4oj4clh2bs)
[_**Donate $2,500 and get a signed copy >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z6378qi5844cdho67od83ku1m2ttut3gb4qh32go_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c5ge4oj4clh2bs)
[_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zq19nf5orpejbn8svumh78vbv0l4p09jmhtslg48_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c5ge4oj4clh2bs)

Thank you,

Senator Mike Lee

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zi13lnovbgoo9ud3bb1nmtn9fvmnqeijp2puo1ng_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28or7cdgm1oj2chim49fg)

body:
I fired Ilhan Omar because she was hurling anti-semitic and anti-American Remarks across social media. This is UNACCEPTABLE behavior for a member of a committee representing America on the world stage.

| |
---
| | | Let's set the record straight.

I fired Ilhan Omar because she was hurling anti-semitic and anti-American Remarks across social media. This is UNACCEPTABLE behavior for a member of a committee representing America on the world stage.

I fired Eric Swalwell from the intelligence committee because he became entangled with a spy for the Chinese Communist party. I do not have to explain to you why this would be a conflict of interest for someone sitting on the Intelligence Committee.

I fired Adam Schiff from the Intelligence Committee because he spread lies about Donald Trump's supposed involvement with Russia despite knowing them to be untrue at the time.
Adam Schiff leaked it?

I promised you that if we took back the majority, I would bring decency and justice to the people's House.

name: Eric Swalwell
subject: I’m ready to fight and protect you on all fronts
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Swalwell For Congress
body:
It’s grassroots power that allows me to fight for us all, and I’m incredibly proud of the work we’ve done, and of our efforts to mobilize across the state. |
---
_Democrat Eric Swalwell represents California's 14th Congressional District. _
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58763169/392160655/-557856831?refcode=E17393-20230101-headerfooter-header-Other-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS85MDcyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMjVmOTc3NC01OGFkLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eu5VeIS06Kk3PdwSIxXSyCt5385KOPgTFMzSIPKtoi0=)
Friends, **Last week, I was honored to be chosen to serve as the Ranking Member of the Subcommittee on Cybersecurity and Infrastructure Protection.** Cybersecurity has become an increasingly important element of protecting our homeland from enemies both foreign and domestic. Too many Americans have had their sensitive data compromised, their economic prosperity threatened, and their lives lost because of it. **I've been proud to be part of the fight against attacks to our national security and democracy, and I welcome the opportunity to protect our communities on the web front as well.[Will you join me in this fight to ensure the privacy and security of our people by making a $20 donation to our mid-month fundraising deadline?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58763170/392160658/1324349186?refcode=E20301-20230215-MM1-SL-DeadlineOther-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS85MDcyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMjVmOTc3NC01OGFkLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eu5VeIS06Kk3PdwSIxXSyCt5385KOPgTFMzSIPKtoi0=)** | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58763171/392160659/1324349186?refcode=E20301-20230215-MM1-SL-DeadlineOther-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS85MDcyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMjVmOTc3NC01OGFkLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eu5VeIS06Kk3PdwSIxXSyCt5385KOPgTFMzSIPKtoi0=)
---
I’m fighting for practical, common-sense solutions to keep our families and communities safe. The way to do that is by strengthening our cyber resilience and improving and protecting critical infrastructure like the electric grid, water systems, and voting machines.
**I’ve already proposed legislation to take action:** Over the last year, I’ve authored two bills aimed at addressing cybersecurity threats and promoting proactive solutions that were included in the FY23 National Defense Authorization Act, which was signed into law.
**Friends, I couldn't have done it without you.**
It’s grassroots power that allows me to fight for us all, and I’m incredibly proud of the work we’ve done, and of our efforts to mobilize across the state. **[Supporters like you are why we will be able to continue defending our democracy and rejecting extremist policies. Please help us continue in this work by making a contribution of any amount to our mid-month goal.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58763173/392160660/1324349186?refcode=E20301-20230215-MM1-SL-DeadlineOther-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS85MDcyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMjVmOTc3NC01OGFkLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eu5VeIS06Kk3PdwSIxXSyCt5385KOPgTFMzSIPKtoi0=)**

But the Democrats are FURIOUS at what we have been doing. Even now, Omar, Schiff, and Swalell are raising MILLIONS off their terminations. They will not stop until they return to power. We cannot let this happen. I promise to fight with everything I have to stop this from happening, and with your support, we will succeed. "Can I ask that you chip in $1, $5, $10 or anything you might be able to give to help us take on the dark money Democrats and protect our Conservative House Majority?" | | Thank you, Speaker Kevin McCarthy | | * | | Paid for by McCarthy for Congress PO Box 12667 Bakersfield, CA 93389 If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for 1600 Daily, . 625 First St #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Candace Owens
subject: The dark side of Black History Month
body:
Black History Month isn't about celebrating the Black men and women who've changed the world for the better.

[](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z8dn654qcvpedu1gu2mhb6mr460pvnd2djn9nqlg_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c5ge2o34cdh2bs)

Friend,

It's Black History Month. . . The month when a bunch of people who know nothing about black history take the time to celebrate people like Frederick Douglas -- but have never read any of his works.

Black History Month isn't about celebrating the Black men and women who've changed the world for the better.

It's nothing more than a way for woke radicals to push identity politics and glorify division in America.

I don't want a Black History Month, and I can't say "why" better than Morgan Freeman did:

_" You're going to relegate my history to a month? **Black history is American history.** "_

My name is Candace Owens, and I am a co-founder of the BLEXIT Foundation. One of the reasons I helped found BLEXIT was to teach REAL history to Black and minority communities.

To teach true American history -- _and not the socialist, woke version that 's pushed today_ -- I've set a goal to raise $50,000 this month.

[_**Will you join me in the push for TRUE history, Friend, by sending a gift of $10, $35, $50, or any amount? Click here to show your support >>>**_](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zd5sec9a3invh0jc9hf06bgvlesr6khaglhbem7g_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c5ge2o34cdh2bs)

BLEXIT honors independent black voices like. . .

. . . Thomas Sowell, a well-known American conservative and is considered one of the most influential black conservatives who has authored over 40 books.

. . . Clarence Thomas, a Constitutional originalist and Associate Justice of the Supreme Court of the United States.

. . . Walter Williams, an American economist, commentator, author, and academic and former John M. Olin Distinguished Professor of Economics at George Mason University.

That's why I hope you'll join me in our effort to celebrate Black Excellence and work to build a better future for Black and minority communities. [_**Click here to send a gift of $10, $35, $50, or any amount >>>**_](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zpb0cjrbijcgier56kh62l4dgpm9rovsrrhskdpg_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c5ge2o34cdh2bs)

Here's how we're reaching Black and minority communities with American history:

**BLEXIT 's Liberation Camps** provide an American History curriculum to children in Kindergarten through 8th grade who live in low-income communities. We also teach key life skills and character development.

The children experience 18 weeks of after-school programming, six weeks of full-day summer camp programming, 25 full-day programs when schools had in-service days, and 20 parents-night-out programs and field trips.

**And through our 43 State Chapters made up of more than 14,000 volunteers! **

Our chapter members bring BLEXIT's five pillars to life through events and outreach efforts to places where no other organizations can effectively reach to combat the victimhood mentality.
1. **Advocating** for School Choice.
2. **Promoting** criminal justice reform by developing positive relationships between police and minority communities.
3. **Championing** entrepreneurship and free enterprise.
4. **Developing** history programs that will inspire minority children.

Presenting the message of BLEXIT through art and live experiences.

BLEXIT State Chapter members work within their local communities to help change the narrative that surrounds America's minority communities.

Friend, can you help us reach our goal of raising $50,000 this month? **Click below to send your support.**

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zld2533upemvg32dbbjor6br54r9tj4jbgj3he2g_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c5ge2o34cdh2bs)
[_**Donate $35 >>>**_](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z7739rpn0qkicvhvrlm60d7dn81ptlnof0eqs0a0_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c5ge2o34cdh2bs)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zgu41t1mgfgcl75k48tp3b05j5ikdjulv18iukp8_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c5ge2o34cdh2bs)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zqf03lg9bb35dguvg1iof2aq74010i83kjjeoh40_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c5ge2o34cdh2bs)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z371k0irfmlac42q2nm9i6po8ds1snho17thkuo8_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c5ge2o34cdh2bs)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z5unds0ttger8gjlhib5njl3t7lk4hl46sn6o5eo_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c5ge2o34cdh2bs)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zh85lstb6gnu28gjmu5lf6a4qtgtva6655dudek8_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c5ge2o34cdh2bs)
[_**Donate $2,500 >>>**_](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zhk1irgvaqtup6ha24rr3m07bbrr13788q82rrbo_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c5ge2o34cdh2bs)
[_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z5qo7aunv804nu564c3l45tsucto5coaht9gcp00_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c5ge2o34cdh2bs)

Thank you,

Candace Owens
President
BLEXIT Foundation

_BLEXIT is a 501(c)3 tax-exempt organization. All contributions are tax-deductible to the extent provided by law._

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Andrew P. McIndoe
subject: Are you concerned about Biden’s open border extremism?
body:
Because I know your time is valuable, and because this issue is vital to national security, I’ll get straight to the point

| | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zakavdckrjalfssgce2icb1kft0ur4s1trqt3qd8_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c5geao37cth2bs)
---
Dear Fellow Conservative,

Because I know your time is valuable, and because this issue is vital to national security, I'll get straight to the point:

I'm writing today to invite you to join other conservatives who are pressuring lawmakers to end Biden's open border extremism by completing a simple 1-minute survey using the link below:

**[https://secured.heritage.org/immigration-reform-survey/](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zk759tvoef3gpjp5p0vsno9mvfa3kic1buo8m7n0_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c5geao37cth2bs)**

It's critical that proactive citizens like you respond to this national poll because despite legacy media's deafening silence on the issue, **this crisis has now reached historic proportions with more than 2 million reported encounters between Border Patrol and illegal immigrants in 2022.**

This is more encounters than ever before in our nation's history--_more than double that of any year during President Donald Trump 's term._

So when people ask me what I think of Biden's immigration policy, I reply: _what immigration policy?_

Beginning the day he took office, Biden's "policies" have created one of the worst humanitarian crises our nation has ever seen.

And now, untold scores of narcotics, violent criminals, and human traffickers are being allowed to flood into American communities, practically unabated, _every single day._

Decades of success advancing conservative policies have taught us that lawmakers in Washington tend to be more responsive when they know that voters are paying attention.

**Will you help us pressure lawmakers to address this urgent matter of national security by completing a brief 1-minute survey on Immigration Reform using the link below?**

**[https://secured.heritage.org/immigration-reform-survey/](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z8h5eah5e65hmhv0kpdqpjiiag3f9nb1e8aiqijg_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c5geao37cth2bs)**

**Armed with your response, we will work on your behalf to turn up the pressure on lawmakers and compel them to act now.**

name: Andrew P. McIndoe
subject: Are you concerned about Biden’s open border extremism?
body:
Because I know your time is valuable, and because this issue is vital to national security, I’ll get straight to the point:

| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z26r7bbq3r2q86eghmdav3jnm9lvdbrqg24k73qo_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c5geao74c5h2bs)
---
Dear Fellow Conservative,

Because I know your time is valuable, and because this issue is vital to national security, I'll get straight to the point:

I'm writing today to invite you to join other conservatives who are pressuring lawmakers to end Biden's open border extremism by completing a simple 1-minute survey using the link below:

**[https://secured.heritage.org/immigration-reform-survey/](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z4o3mskf31v3hdm23dtf4tdv3bh95igtser5ngao_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c5geao74c5h2bs)**

It's critical that proactive citizens like you respond to this national poll because despite legacy media's deafening silence on the issue, **this crisis has now reached historic proportions with more than 2 million reported encounters between Border Patrol and illegal immigrants in 2022.**

This is more encounters than ever before in our nation's history--_more than double that of any year during President Donald Trump 's term._

So when people ask me what I think of Biden's immigration policy, I reply: _what immigration policy?_

Beginning the day he took office, Biden's "policies" have created one of the worst humanitarian crises our nation has ever seen.

And now, untold scores of narcotics, violent criminals, and human traffickers are being allowed to flood into American communities, practically unabated, _every single day._

Decades of success advancing conservative policies have taught us that lawmakers in Washington tend to be more responsive when they know that voters are paying attention.

**Will you help us pressure lawmakers to address this urgent matter of national security by completing a brief 1-minute survey on Immigration Reform using the link below?**

**[https://secured.heritage.org/immigration-reform-survey/](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zq2m41gndkaiorjl2rta9dntf3e2nu8ljfggj6ko_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c5geao74c5h2bs)**

**Armed with your response, we will work on your behalf to turn up the pressure on lawmakers and compel them to act now.**

Let elected officials know loud and clear that **you _demand_ an end to Biden's open border extremism by completing this quick 1-minute survey using the link below:**

**[https://secured.heritage.org/immigration-reform-survey/](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z3gsrub18trldq0pfic303sl5m4o991r710pf0fo_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c5geao74c5h2bs)**

Thank you,

Andrew P. McIndoe
VP, Development

**P.S.** We must take action now--this issue cannot wait. [**Thank you for joining the fight by completing the 1-minute survey linked here. >>**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zvdupdc5n9ib1pf1buu68v1av3ulk29fjsm1l4o8_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c5geao74c5h2bs)
---
| | The Heritage Foundation 214 Massachusetts Avenue NE Washington D.C. 20002
---

Decades of success advancing conservative policies have taught us that lawmakers in Washington tend to be more responsive when they know that voters are paying attention. Will you help us pressure lawmakers to address this urgent matter of national security by completing a brief 1-minute survey on Immigration Reform using the link below? Armed with your response, we will work on your behalf to turn up the pressure on lawmakers and compel them to act now. Let elected officials know loud and clear that you demand an end to Biden's open border extremism by completing this quick 1-minute survey using the link below: Thank you, Andrew P. name: Andrew P. McIndoe
subject: Are you concerned about Biden’s open border extremism?
body:
Because I know your time is valuable, and because this issue is vital to national security, I’ll get straight to the point

| | | [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c78970%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=3hsaJFXEiRCcvuI0DVI%2flA&sysid=1)
---
Dear Fellow Conservative,

Because I know your time is valuable, and because this issue is vital to national security, I’ll get straight to the point:

I’m writing today to invite you to join other conservatives who are pressuring lawmakers to end Biden’s open border extremism by completing a simple 1-minute survey using the link below:

**[https://secured.heritage.org/immigration-reform-survey/](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c78971%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=z1a5mDg8Wz7OJ54kmM%2fVVQ&sysid=1)**

It’s critical that proactive citizens like you respond to this national poll because despite legacy media’s deafening silence on the issue, **this crisis has now reached historic proportions with more than 2 million reported encounters between Border Patrol and illegal immigrants in 2022.**

This is more encounters than ever before in our nation’s history--_more than double that of any year during President Donald Trump’s term._

So when people ask me what I think of Biden’s immigration policy, I reply: _what immigration policy?_

Beginning the day he took office, Biden’s “policies” have created one of the worst humanitarian crises our nation has ever seen.

And now, untold scores of narcotics, violent criminals, and human traffickers are being allowed to flood into American communities, practically unabated, _every single day._

Decades of success advancing conservative policies have taught us that lawmakers in Washington tend to be more responsive when they know that voters are paying attention.

**Will you help us pressure lawmakers to address this urgent matter of national security by completing a brief 1-minute survey on Immigration Reform using the link below?**

**[https://secured.heritage.org/immigration-reform-survey/](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c78971%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=z1a5mDg8Wz7OJ54kmM%2fVVQ&sysid=1)**

**Armed with your response, we will work on your behalf to turn up the pressure on lawmakers and compel them to act now.**

Let elected officials know loud and clear that **you _demand_ an end to Biden’s open border extremism by completing this quick 1-minute survey using the link below:**

**[https://secured.heritage.org/immigration-reform-survey/](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c78971%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=z1a5mDg8Wz7OJ54kmM%2fVVQ&sysid=1)**

Thank you,

Andrew P. McIndoe
VP, Development

**P.S.** We must take action now--this issue cannot wait. [**Thank you for joining the fight by completing the 1-minute survey linked here. >>**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c78972%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=xJCxIaLvmrq%2fIfGVc4qCog&sysid=1)
---
| | The Heritage Foundation 214 Massachusetts Avenue NE Washington D.C. 20002
---

_107 S West St. #826, Alexandria VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c7680%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=vxrKBqLY5fzAtDnJO30yrA&sysid=1)_

[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c7680%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=vxrKBqLY5fzAtDnJO30yrA&sysid=1)

name: Tennessee Voter Project
subject: We Can Build Progressive Power Right Now.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TN Voter Project; Isaac Kimes, Esq
body:
https://www.facebook.com/TNVoterProject [https://www.facebook.com/TNVoterProject]
February 15, 2022
Dear friend,
It's no secret that Republicans in the state legislature are launching a full frontal attack on Tennessee's marginalized communities. Just in the last few weeks, they've proposed bills to divert more funding from public schools [https://tennesseelookout.com/2023/02/09/private-school-voucher-bill-for-hamilton-rolls-through-committee/] , criminalize drag shows [https://www.nbcnews.com/nbc-out/out-politics-and-policy/tennessee-set-pass-law-restricts-drag-shows-rcna69956] , restrict vital healthcare access for trans youth [https://tennesseelookout.com/2023/02/10/bill-to-ban-gender-affirming-care-for-minors-advances-in-both-tennessee-house-and-senate/] , and more.
Though Democrats are in the minority, our hands aren't tied. We don't have to wait until election season to build progressive power across Tennessee. We can take action in the meantime to stop these harmful policies and build the infrastructure needed to elect more Democrats to the legislature in 2024.
SUPPORT TVP'S EFFORTS TO BUILD PROGRESSIVE POWER ACROSS THE STATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tvpaug17_1]
Over the next year, we have the opportunity to register more progressive voters, increase voter turnout, and support candidates running tough races. TVP will be taking up this work for the City elections and into the 2024 races.
We need your support as we begin ramping up our voter outreach and candidate endorsement process. Will you donate $23 to help Tennessee Voter Project bolster the progressive movement in Tennessee? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tvpaug17_1]
Thank you for your support,
Tennessee Voter Project Staff

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T31bf5ad2-4ab0-42ac-8860-e2ccd0bc99d0/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

### **"One candidate has dropped more than $1 million on ads in Kentucky's gubernatorial race"**
Peter — Andy's billionaire Republican opponent Kelly Craft has already spent _a million dollars_ on her campaign.

She's run ads on the air attacking Andy's record, and we expect to see more as we get closer to November. **We can’t let Craft buy this seat and undo all the progress Andy's made for Kentucky.**

Peter – Here are the three things you need to know about the state of our race.
1. **Emilia and this grassroots team defied the odds in 2022.** Thanks to the generosity of people like you, our campaign fought back against millions of dollars worth of GOP attacks and sent Emilia to Congress. But we know it’s going to require the full strength of this grassroots team to do it again.

3. With **Republicans laser focused on flipping this toss up seat from blue to red**, we know we can’t afford a single misstep from now until Election Day.

But right now, we have **fallen behind with our February fundraising** – and if we don’t make up the difference soon, we could be giving the MAGA Republicans the upper hand heading into 2024.

name: Andrew P. McIndoe
subject: Are you concerned about Biden’s open border extremism?
body:
Because I know your time is valuable, and because this issue is vital to national security, I’ll get straight to the point

| | | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c659024%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=V%2bJTCJZQPrCNCqQNBIxoDQ&sysid=1)
---
Dear Fellow Conservative,

Because I know your time is valuable, and because this issue is vital to national security, I’ll get straight to the point:

I’m writing today to invite you to join other conservatives who are pressuring lawmakers to end Biden’s open border extremism by completing a simple 1-minute survey using the link below:

**[https://secured.heritage.org/immigration-reform-survey/](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c659035%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=oTYvgr0BnK9heGwmsDu2eg&sysid=1)**

It’s critical that proactive citizens like you respond to this national poll because despite legacy media’s deafening silence on the issue, **this crisis has now reached historic proportions with more than 2 million reported encounters between Border Patrol and illegal immigrants in 2022.**

This is more encounters than ever before in our nation’s history--_more than double that of any year during President Donald Trump’s term._

So when people ask me what I think of Biden’s immigration policy, I reply: _what immigration policy?_

Beginning the day he took office, Biden’s “policies” have created one of the worst humanitarian crises our nation has ever seen.

And now, untold scores of narcotics, violent criminals, and human traffickers are being allowed to flood into American communities, practically unabated, _every single day._

Decades of success advancing conservative policies have taught us that lawmakers in Washington tend to be more responsive when they know that voters are paying attention.

**Will you help us pressure lawmakers to address this urgent matter of national security by completing a brief 1-minute survey on Immigration Reform using the link below?**

**[https://secured.heritage.org/immigration-reform-survey/](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c659035%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=oTYvgr0BnK9heGwmsDu2eg&sysid=1)**

**Armed with your response, we will work on your behalf to turn up the pressure on lawmakers and compel them to act now.**

Let elected officials know loud and clear that **you _demand_ an end to Biden’s open border extremism by completing this quick 1-minute survey using the link below:**

**[https://secured.heritage.org/immigration-reform-survey/](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c659035%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=oTYvgr0BnK9heGwmsDu2eg&sysid=1)**

Thank you,

Andrew P. McIndoe
VP, Development

**P.S.** We must take action now--this issue cannot wait. [**Thank you for joining the fight by completing the 1-minute survey linked here. >>**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c659036%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2bn0qJF0YOtoqAtgCJJFayA&sysid=1)
---
| | The Heritage Foundation 214 Massachusetts Avenue NE Washington D.C. 20002
---

name: Chris Deluzio
subject: What they’re already saying about our race.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Deluzio for Congress
body:
Kevin McCarthy’s Majority is in chaos. Americans deserve better from their elected officials.
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58753374/392125409/1060757799?refcode=em_fr_2023.02.15_b1_cd_all&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3M2E5ZDZkMC00MmFkLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5kk1tgwgQZXQ0hDTyCUyjvyzXs5cFS38boT7c--c4BQ=) Hi Derek,

We’re only 2 months into 2023, but eyes are already on the 2024 election. But to be honest, over the past two months it’s become even more clear to me how critical it is that we take back the Majority in 2024.

If we want any chance of taking the Speaker’s gavel out of Kevin McCarthy’s hands, it starts by defending western Pennsylvania and keeping this seat blue. Is there anything you can chip in today to help us?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58753376/392125411/1060757799?refcode=em_fr_2023.02.15_b1_cd_all&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3M2E5ZDZkMC00MmFkLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5kk1tgwgQZXQ0hDTyCUyjvyzXs5cFS38boT7c--c4BQ=)

name: VoteVets
subject: Remember the Purple Heart band-aids?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
They ran ads attacking Senator Max Cleland - a triple-amputee who left three of his limbs in Vietnam - for being soft on terror.
#
**In 2002:** they ran ads attacking Senator Max Cleland - a triple-amputee who left three of his limbs in Vietnam - for being soft on terror.
**In 2004:** they wore Purple Heart band-aids mocking John Kerry’s service during the Republican National Convention.
The **NRSC** said Tammy Duckworth, who lost her legs in Iraq, “has a sad record of not **standing up** for our Veterans.”
They vote against the PACT Act. They try to privatize the VA. They say our troops are “suckers and losers” who are “throwing their lives away.” They mock Gold Star families.
For a long time people equated Veterans with Conservatives.
Republicans got away with these kinds of attacks.
But because of VoteVets, those days are OVER. We’ve turned the tide. We organize Veterans. We elevate their voices for progressive causes and Democratic candidates.
And we get results.
But we can’t do it alone. So please:
[**Can you contribute $3 to VoteVets before our mid-month fundraising deadline comes to a close tonight at midnight? We would not ask were this request not so important.**](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-feb23.2sWM73&refcode=em230215-1-15&t=1&akid=7356%2E3013755%2EJ3p9jn)

clean_body: They ran ads attacking Senator Max Cleland - a triple-amputee who left three of his limbs in Vietnam - for being soft on terror. In 2002: they ran ads attacking Senator Max Cleland - a triple-amputee who left three of his limbs in Vietnam - for being soft on terror. In 2004: they wore Purple Heart band-aids mocking John Kerry’s service during the Republican National Convention. The NRSC said Tammy Duckworth, who lost her legs in Iraq, “has a sad record of not standing up for our Veterans.” They vote against the PACT Act. They try to privatize the VA. They say our troops are “suckers and losers” who are “throwing their lives away.” They mock Gold Star families. For a long time people equated Veterans with Conservatives. Republicans got away with these kinds of attacks. But because of VoteVets, those days are OVER. We’ve turned the tide. We organize Veterans. We elevate their voices for progressive causes and Democratic candidates. And we get results. But we can’t do it alone. Less than a week left!

|

Derek, We’re less than a week out from the special election in VA-04 and we need all hands on deck. Senator Jennifer McClellan is ready to represent Virginia on Capitol Hill, but she needs everyone behind her to win. If we want to prove to the GOP we aren’t backing down from a challenge, we have to keep up this incredible momentum. **Kevin McCarthy hates to see it** , another Democrat in the House makes his job even harder. clean_body: Less than a week left! | Derek, We’re less than a week out from the special election in VA-04 and we need all hands on deck. Senator Jennifer McClellan is ready to represent Virginia on Capitol Hill, but she needs everyone behind her to win. If we want to prove to the GOP we aren’t backing down from a challenge, we have to keep up this incredible momentum. Kevin McCarthy hates to see it , another Democrat in the House makes his job even harder. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: ********=****** | ******=****** ---|--- ******=****** | ******=****** ******=****** | ******=****** This is it, Derek, we have less than one week left and we have to make this happen. Make no mistake, we can’t afford to let this one slip through our fingers. name: Team Slotkin
subject: What Elissa has been doing in response to the tragedy at Michigan State University
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR CONGRESS
body:
#
Friend -
We wanted to keep you updated on what Elissa has been doing in response to the tragic mass shooting at Michigan State University on Monday.
Right now, the priority is focusing on the students and families that were most deeply impacted. Yesterday, Elissa spent the day speaking with MSU students and teachers and visited the MSUPD operations center and Sparrow Hospital, where victims are still undergoing treatment. The bravery of the first responders and medical staff who did not hesitate when they heard the news is remarkable. We are still learning about the events that unfolded, and we will be sure to keep you updated as we learn more.
[**To hear more of Elissa’s thoughts, click this link and watch her interview on Morning Joe yesterday from East Lansing.**](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/145?v=JX3ltrv6aHQ%3Frefcode%3Dem230215-1-40000&t=1&akid=15%2E135344%2EZ9OvGR)
[](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/145?v=JX3ltrv6aHQ%3Frefcode%3Dem230215-1-40000&t=2&akid=15%2E135344%2EZ9OvGR)
Team Slotkin

PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR CONGRESS
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here ](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=3&akid=15%2E135344%2EZ9OvGR).

Elissa Slotkin served in the Central Intelligence Agency and the Department of Defense. Use of her job titles and photographs during service do not imply endorsement by the Central Intelligence Agency OR the Department of Defense.

body:
Abortion is outlawed in Wisconsin – here’s what you can do to help | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58769746/392188184/1529762909?emci=9fc913d0-21ff-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid=%7B%7BContactsEmailID%7D%7D&refcode=em_230215_abortion&sourceid=1008588&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzIyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MzUzMjU4Mi02ZmFkLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Km0czP9LwHDOCcisEsPjMxdZBWF0PFiQhPhSwDQ7V2I=) | Last month, reproductive rights organizers rallied at the Wisconsin State Capitol to begin the fight to overturn our state’s abortion ban that went into effect last year. As Jennifer Knox, the national organizing director for Working Families Power, told Wisconsin Public Radio: _"This is the single place in 2023 that really does reflect that abortion rights are on the ballot... The single most important thing that people can do across the country is invest some of their time over the next two and a half months in Wisconsin."_ Wisconsin was one of 13 states that had previously defunct abortion bans triggered immediately when _Roe vs. Wade_ was stuck down in June. In the State Senate, my fellow Democrats and I introduced a referendum to allow Wisconsin voters to have a say in their reproductive rights – however, it was stuck down by a party-line vote by Republicans. So, whether we’re fighting for abortion access through the Wisconsin Supreme Court election or through the state legislature, we need your help to give Wisconsinites the chance to overturn this 1849 law. [**If you’re with me, consider chipping in $10, $20, or even $50 today to support our work in fighting for reproductive health care! **](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58769748/392188190/-304458161?amount=10&refcode=em_230215_abortion&sourceid=1008588&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzIyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MzUzMjU4Mi02ZmFkLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Km0czP9LwHDOCcisEsPjMxdZBWF0PFiQhPhSwDQ7V2I=) | [CHIP IN →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58769750/392188198/-304458161?amount=10&refcode=em_230215_abortion&sourceid=1008588&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzIyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MzUzMjU4Mi02ZmFkLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Km0czP9LwHDOCcisEsPjMxdZBWF0PFiQhPhSwDQ7V2I=)

Brad Pfaff

The reason we need President Trump is that Biden has taken the exact opposite approach on EVERY policy.

Just look what Biden has done to our Country...

* We are again reliant upon foreign sources of energy
* Fuel prices are too high as inflation continues to soar
* There is a humanitarian crisis on our southern border
* And the Chinese are having a field day violating our airspace, stealing our intellectual property, and flooding our country with fentanyl

We must get our Country back on track and that begins by defeating Biden, or whatever candidate the Democrats put up to replace him.

So let me be clear, President Trump stood with me for my election against Liz Cheney, and I am proud to stand with him in 2024.

clean_body: | | | | I am proud to stand with... | Friend, Let me be extremely clear. I believe that Donald Trump was one of the BEST presidents of our lifetime. | His policies were great for Wyoming and the Country as a whole. He understood that we must promote and support our domestic energy industries, allow states to responsibly develop their own natural resources, enforce immigration laws to protect our southern border, and lead the country with strength so that our allies respect us while our enemies fear us. | | | | | The reason we need President Trump is that Biden has taken the exact opposite approach on EVERY policy. Just look what Biden has done to our Country... We are again reliant upon foreign sources of energy Fuel prices are too high as inflation continues to soar There is a humanitarian crisis on our southern border And the Chinese are having a field day violating our airspace, stealing our intellectual property, and flooding our country with fentanyl We must get our Country back on track and that begins by defeating Biden, or whatever candidate the Democrats put up to replace him. So let me be clear, President Trump stood with me for my election against Liz Cheney, and I am proud to stand with him in 2024. | | | Thank you, Harriet Hageman Congresswoman WY-AL | | | |

body:
Ohio's Senate race could be one of the closest in the country. Your support could decide the result. [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58755146/392132271/-744169294?refcode=Header&ms=Header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNGY4NWU5OS00NWFkLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NjxcQlaSXY_C_oCovGLYl8nkeiJqmfasdrVo4obJ--U=&emci=ff9d14f4-b0ac-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=34f85e99-45ad-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=8943725) Peter,

Sherrod Brown is a fierce ally for working families and one of the most progressive members of the Senate. He won three statewide elections as a Democrat in right-leaning Ohio because Sherrod gets results that help people.

But now, Sherrod's running for reelection in a toss-up race. One of his Republican opponents spent $11 million of his own money on a previous campaign, and there's no telling how much Mitch McConnell and dark money groups will spend to buy this seat.

We can't let them distort Sherrod's record or stop his work to bring American jobs back home. He needs your help to break through the noise and reach the voters he needs to win.

[**Will you rush a donation to help Sherrod Brown keep fighting for working families in Ohio and nationwide? Sherrod grew up in Mansfield, Ohio and went to school with the sons and daughters of carpenters, ironworkers, autoworkers, and electricians. Those jobs disappeared as one factory after another left town and jobs were shipped overseas. Now, he fights to bring those jobs back home.

One steelworker gave Sherrod a canary pin as a reminder that workers used to take a canary into coal mines to warn them of dangerous gas. Today, Sherrod continues to wear that pin as a reminder of the work we still face to keep workers safe and defend their rights.

On the Senate floor, Sherrod and Bob are fighting day after day to preserve the dignity of work, and to make sure everyone has access to good-paying jobs, high-quality healthcare, a good education for their kids, and a chance to live out their retirement with security. We can't let Mitch McConnell erase either of their voices from the Senate.

**[Chip in now to make sure Sherrod Brown and Bob Casey can continue fighting for you. Make your donation now, before the mid-month deadline.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58755154/392132279/-1266649165?refcode=em23_230215_mm1sb_fndt_gq_act___tc_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230215_mm1sb_fndt_gq_act___tc_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNGY4NWU5OS00NWFkLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NjxcQlaSXY_C_oCovGLYl8nkeiJqmfasdrVo4obJ--U=)**

clean_body: Ohio's Senate race could be one of the closest in the country. Your support could decide the result. Peter, Sherrod Brown is a fierce ally for working families and one of the most progressive members of the Senate. He won three statewide elections as a Democrat in right-leaning Ohio because Sherrod gets results that help people. But now, Sherrod's running for reelection in a toss-up race. One of his Republican opponents spent $11 million of his own money on a previous campaign, and there's no telling how much Mitch McConnell and dark money groups will spend to buy this seat. We can't let them distort Sherrod's record or stop his work to bring American jobs back home. He needs your help to break through the noise and reach the voters he needs to win. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | = | = | = | = Sherrod grew up in Mansfield, Ohio and went to school with the sons and daughters of carpenters, ironworkers, autoworkers, and electricians. Those jobs disappeared as one factory after another left town and jobs were shipped overseas. Now, he fights to bring those jobs back home. One steelworker gave Sherrod a canary pin as a reminder that workers used to take a canary into coal mines to warn them of dangerous gas. Today, Sherrod continues to wear that pin as a reminder of the work we still face to keep workers safe and defend their rights. On the Senate floor, Sherrod and Bob are fighting day after day to preserve the dignity of work, and to make sure everyone has access to good-paying jobs, high-quality healthcare, a good education for their kids, and a chance to live out their retirement with security. We can't let Mitch McConnell erase either of their voices from the Senate. = Thanks for doing your part, Team Casey Help Bob Casey and Sherrod Brown defend the Democratic Senate majority. Chip in. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | = | = | = | = PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC. Bob Casey for Senate PO Box 58746 Philadelphia, PA 19102 United States

name: Ruben Gallego
subject: Please give me a chance to explain
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
Here is the absolute, honest truth:
#

Peter -
In just a moment, I am going to ask you to make a contribution to my campaign for Senate in Arizona before midnight tonight. Please give me a chance to explain why this request — especially today — is so important.
Here is the absolute, honest truth:
As you read this, Kyrsten Sinema’s fundraising is picking up and Kari Lake is probably getting set to enter this race.
At the same time, our fundraising has slowed pretty significantly since the start of this month.
The timing is not great — mostly because it makes us vulnerable to attack.
So we set a deadline of tonight at midnight to catch up on our fundraising goals.
So I am turning to the people I really need to step up and make their first online donation if we’re going to win this race.
What do you say?
[**Can you please make your first online $3 contribution before midnight tonight? We need a lot of people doing their part to chip in what they can to get us back in a position to win. Can I count on you to be one of them?**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-feb23.mRGPOt&refcode=em230215-1-15&t=1&akid=396%2E734936%2EVG5NS1)

subject: From rising GOP star to top of the ticket
disclaimer_text: Paid for by SFA, Inc
body:
As American as apple pie
ACTION REQUIRED: Step up before it's too late.

| | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62326901:69rj3iGNf:m:1:3331421248:0BD23A156B7F8BA915E128FF88553402:r) [_**Nikki Haley's story is an American story**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62326901:69rj3iGNf:m:1:3331421248:0BD23A156B7F8BA915E128FF88553402:r)
As the daughter of Indian immigrants, Nikki was taught to love God and her country. **Her parents sacrificed so much to pursue the American Dream. **

Working in her mother's dress shop in Bamberg, SC at age 12, Nikki wasn't given an easy path. But, she learned the value of hard work and the key to prosperity.

She studied at the University of Clemson and became a CPA.

When she realized that those in elected office were too comfortable with the status quo, she ran for the state legislature and unseated a 35-year incumbent. **_No one thought it was possible._**

She became a voice for freedom and government transparency -- demanding American values be protected and corrupt ideals (and politicians) be rejected. She launched a race for governor and was polling in single digits. She had little name ID and limited resources. But she pulled off a win, becoming the first female to lead the state. A two-term champion of economic growth, she earned her state a nickname -- Beast of the Southeast.

Trump took notice and named her U.S. Ambassador to the UN, where she fought to restore American strength. She stood toe to toe with the world's totalitarian leaders and reversed the script. America would no longer feed the hand that bit her.

American freedom and strength matter, but they are being eroded by Biden and the Left.
**And the American Dream is on the line in 2024.**

**Nikki is running for president to take back our country.** **Will YOU join her movement?**
**[If you stand for America, stand with Nikki by donating $25, $50, or even $100 to support her fight for freedom!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62326901:69rj3iGNf:m:1:3331421248:0BD23A156B7F8BA915E128FF88553402:r)**
**[**JOIN NIKKI 'S FIGHT NOW **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62326901:69rj3iGNf:m:1:3331421248:0BD23A156B7F8BA915E128FF88553402:r)**

---
