name: Charles Booker
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
2022 was an incredible year for Democrats, Peter.

We held the Senate, minimized losses in the House, and made inroads in
places we didn’t expect. In Kentucky, we over performed 2020 margins in
over half of all counties.

And through the highs and lows, we built a movement together. We engaged
young people and shared hope for progress with millions. We built lasting
infrastructure for the progressive movement and created new voters engaged
in the Democratic process.

Despite our loss on Election Day, we can be proud of what we accomplished
together. And I am excited to see what’s next for this team.

But right now, I have to ask again for your help. In order to close out
the campaign and move on to the next chapter of our work together, we have
some campaign debt to take care of. [ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18885?t=1001&akid=2981%2E346206%2E2aQd_v ]If you’re able, could you make a
contribution today to help us?

Our campaign was uncompromising. When we were making spending decisions in
the final days, that meant we prioritized communicating with as many
Kentucky voters as possible. We ran a bold campaign and we made bold
decisions. And unfortunately for us, that means we have a bit of a hole in
our budget and hope you can help us.

Thank you for anything you can do. I’m looking forward to what’s next.

Charles

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20230215-2981-footer&t=1002&refcode2=2981_346206_2aQd_v&akid=2981%2E346206%2E2aQd_v

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=2981%2E346206%2E2aQd_v

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Booker for Kentucky

name: =?utf-8?Q?Tyler=20B.=20Jones?=
subject: Under the Dome - Your Update from the Legislature
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/leadershipacademy-8132816?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
|
Dear Friend,

**We are OFFICIALLY halfway through the Legislative Session! **

As the session moves forward, proposed bills are dwindling down as the Legislature decides what key issues need to be taken up before Sine Die.

Here are some pieces of legislation that are still alive and have gained much attention over the last few weeks:

**_HB 1020_ from Rep. Trey Lamar expands this Capitol Complex Improvement District.** This would give Capitol Police more jurisdiction, as well as create a court system for the CCID. The judges for this court would be appointed by the Mississippi State Supreme Court.

This bill passed the House floor and has been transferred to the Senate.

**_SB 2889_ from Sen. David Parker establishes the Mississippi Capitol Region Utility Act.** This bill would place the long-term control of Jackson water, wastewater and sewer under a nine-member board. Members would be appointed by the Governor and Lieutenant Governor, as well as Jackson's mayor.

This bill passed out of the Senate and has been referred to the House Public Utilities committee.

**_SB 2638_ from Sen. Tyler McCaughn would revive the ballot initiative process for Mississippians.** This would require 240,000 voter signatures for a ballot initiative, compared to the previous 107,000. It would also give legislators the right to offer alternative measures to an initiative.

This bill passed the Senate floor and has been transferred to the House.

**_SB 2212_ from Sen. Kevin Blackwell extends postpartum Medicaid coverage for up to 12 months.** New mothers who are covered under Medicaid would have medical coverage for up to a year, rather than the two months currently provided.

This bill passed the Senate floor and has been transferred to the House.

**_SB 2079_ from Sen. Angela Hill creates the School Safety Guardian Program. **This bill would train teachers with concealed carry permits to have firearms on school campuses. This bill aims to help active shooter situations.

This bill passed out of the Senate and has been referred to the House Education and Judiciary A committees.

**The first deadline for appropriation and revenue bills is Feb. 22. **Any bill that involves tax cuts will have to be discussed by next Wednesday.

I'll send an update next week once those bills have been debated.

Have a good week!
---
|
---
| [Forward this email to a friend!](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=00c473da1f&e=5703353baa "Forward this email to a friend!")
---
| |
---
All the best,

Tyler B. Jones
Director of Communications and Legislative Affairs

---
| _PS you can stay up to date with every bill introduced during the session through the [2023 Legislative Tracker](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=361d3e0df9&e=5703353baa) found on our website. _
---
|
---

Mississippi Center for Public Policy520 George StJackson, MS 39202-3013

name: Hillsdale College via Daily Alert
subject: Get them before they're canceled
body:
| | | _This sponsored message is on behalf of Hillsdale College_ | | | | [](https://links.learnthroughhistory.com/u/click?_t=3feb4d90029241379249dace799ec95d&_m=fb505046e8c340c590030ef9e2b2d9e3&_e=DXJ-EzUHoLc34Fg_tKfyRQFr24IRqi8bNlrPRLJ_j0ER0kW0e7dzW2-EMJuGRRPxsKit2JTGBC91KTVtNb3Oeg9bZSH-nogwEOhug2wSEIuJjVGkeRHul9csgT54ByCbaWiCUutbidr5T9ru146kLHxvuijKbXR-7gAMdfYZv5ZRYonCnmNh90WcCZw1gVewpfRrH1v8QIfUib4IRmRrUj6tCk1BDWHzc3EOzA8ImcpiBmpTltn1xhzjvQv6jdOeq1WdgxBkIrNwjuWdi4ZR5KAHQ8XFH9tKs3Pt77KQVo12bHvysGvBU63blErs2yDDEPidixixjMav2HkoyTvNCkovVOBkOvLwHDIQ8uxjmunPXVZxAbWu58g49WKsp3DVmA7LcGaI7ZD8Cm4EGllXEpT7l8vfK9jcIjQu-a8XC76-Lsp6ipmpi1moT_RKW2oAXq74l2IC3CWMXVyaW0q3cA%3D%3D)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, Classic children's literature is being ignored and eliminated from our nation's classrooms at an alarming rate. Beloved classics like _The Wind in the Willows_ , _Treasure Island_ , and _The Adventures of Huckleberry Finn_ are just a few of the foundational books that are rarely being taught to our nation's children today. Not only does this rob young people of classic tales of adventure and friendship, but they also rob children of fundamental lessons about the world and how best to live.
---
| | That's why Hillsdale College released a free online course titled **" Classic Children's Literature."** Perhaps you've had a chance to watch a few lectures. **Today, I 'm excited to tell you that the course is now available on DVD! And you can get your very own box set right now!** [**" Classic Children's Literature"**](https://links.learnthroughhistory.com/u/click?_t=3feb4d90029241379249dace799ec95d&_m=fb505046e8c340c590030ef9e2b2d9e3&_e=DXJ-EzUHoLc34Fg_tKfyRQFr24IRqi8bNlrPRLJ_j0ER0kW0e7dzW2-EMJuGRRPxsKit2JTGBC91KTVtNb3Oeg9bZSH-nogwEOhug2wSEIuJjVGkeRHul9csgT54ByCbaWiCUutbidr5T9ru146kLHxvuijKbXR-7gAMdfYZv5ZRYonCnmNh90WcCZw1gVewpfRrH1v8QIfUib4IRmRrUj6tCk1BDWHzc3EOzA8ImcpiBmpTltn1xhzjvQv6jdOeq1WdgxBkIrNwjuWdi4ZR5KAHQ8XFH9tKs3Pt77KQVo1Vl38AmG1bV34xv-fKNf3WLCOd7DfSsFt7sWWj8gPdZVkB8foiNVvS7qAnLWBSxVuy_dIR5Xmf-NaREAHgoY9OWvYyzA1qXVLITDwJblPnj1vwawrz3FfyKxf1M8h07LYSgZ-ASUsc5EEFTXSPE0FLZxYUG0EnnzNyKE7WT5Bl1w%3D%3D) explores some of the greatest works of children's literature, from Aesop and the classic fairy tales to _Treasure Island_ and _Winnie-the-Pooh_ , and so much more. When you get your box set today, you will not only delight your family, but also evoke a sense of wonder while teaching timeless lessons to the young and old alike.

Truth be told, our fundraising has been a bit slow going, so we need to pick up the pace if we have any hope of meeting our quarterly goal. **I know it may feel early, but Republicans and their special interests allies are already laying the groundwork to take this seat. Now is the time to start rebuilding our war chest. Unfortunately, we’re not on pace to meet our goal -- we’re about $12,334 short of where we need to be.** **[I hope to give Eric the good news that we’re back on track so he can better focus on his duties as your representative. name: Attorney Larry Klayman
subject: BREAKING: January 6 Peaceful Protesters BEG to get moved to Guantanamo Bay
body:
They're BEGGING to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba...where vicious, America-hating terrorists get better treatment! No Mass or Sunday worship service. Laundry returning with brown stains, pubic hair, and or reeking of ripe urine. Broken toilets that either wont flush or repeatedly explode in Cells!

They're BEGGING to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba...where vicious, America-hating terrorists get better treatment! No Mass or Sunday worship service. Laundry returning with brown stains, pubic hair, and or reeking of ripe urine. Broken toilets that either wont flush or repeatedly explode in Cells! | | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zfi7eqj72clfpo6jf7a2o5c3u8vprsca95rannro_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c5ieapb5cdh2bs)
---
| | |
---
| | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zve18742sbrf7sgggf31sr7vpog6u5kmkuaph838_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c5ieapb5cdh2bs) Hi Patriot,

[Please give a crucial $10, $25, $50, $100, or more IMMEDIATELY to fully fund my two critical, class action lawsuits and hard-hitting legal actions to FREE ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS!](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z2nkg52a3ha6sbtt7hu1ktenv9r5f46n2k6lp918_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c5ieapb5cdh2bs)

I just read the urgent letter signed by 34 innocent Americans, jailed in Washington, D.C for peacefully protesting the stolen 2020 presidential election.

**Patriot, what 's being done to them is so demonic, so foul, that they're BEGGING to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba...where vicious, America-hating terrorists get better treatment!**

I'm heartsick and deeply angry about what's being done to our fellow patriots.

Their letter reads like an appeal from dissidents in the Soviet Union.

Here are just a few examples of what they're enduring (I quote directly from their letter, published by Gateway Pundit):

* Begging for Help / Water / Medical Aid / Mercy through a 4-inch by 10-inch window of cold metal doors
* No visits from family, friends, lawyers, or clergy
* No Mass or Sunday worship service
* Laundry returning with brown stains, pubic hair, and or reeking of ripe urine
* Broken toilets that either wont flush or repeatedly explode in Cells
* Stuck in Cells for 9 days without a shower
* Solitary Confinement for 25 1⁄2 hours or more at a time

Outrageously, there's more.

**Guards deny them hot water and keep them from attending court. They severely beat, mace, harass, insult, and even sexually assault them.**

Their food is so disgusting and so low in nutrition, that some prisoners are losing their eyesight, their hair, and getting scurvy (from Vitamin C deficiency).

There's much, much more...all of it horrifying.

And this has been going on for up to a year and a half...in AMERICA.

**They conclude their letter by pleading to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba, where the Taliban, al-Qaeda, and ISIS terrorists get better treatment!**

This can't go on. I won't allow it.

I'm Larry Klayman, the founder ofstrong Judicial Watch and founder and General Counsel of Freedom Watch.

I'm a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who's fought for the American people for 45 years.

You've seen me on cable news outlets and heard me on radio talk shows. I'm proud to say I am the first lawyer to EVER obtain a court ruling that an American president committed a crime when I won my case against Bill Clinton.

I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers to IMPEACH criminal Bill Clinton.

And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

Not to mention that I also enjoined Obama's corrupt NSA from mass surveillance on hundreds of millions of Americans and killed Obama's illegal amnesty for over 5 million illegal aliens, a case that went all the way to the Supreme Court!

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents - AND WIN!**

And now I'm pursuing two class action lawsuits and other important legal actions to get justice for the January 6 Protesters and take on Joe Biden's rotten regime in court.

**Nobody else is doing what I 'm doing in court to get justice for these poor people.**

Patriot, please say a pray for the January 6 Prisoners. Their temptation to despair, to give up, must be enormous.

[Then I beg you to help me fight for them with your very best gift now of $10, $25, $50, $100, or even more. If you've given before, please give again. If you can, give more than you've ever given to Freedom Watch.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z7vodb4k0u01gl4tc760fgdr0b1v2uf2osta77ug_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c5ieapb5cdh2bs)

I can't do it without you, Patriot.

Thank you for doing whatever you can now.

Sincerely,

Larry Klayman
Founder of both Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch
Current Chairman and General Counsel of Freedom Watch, Inc.

P.S. Patriot, I'm heartbroken after reading that powerful letter from our fellow patriots who are rotting in jail in Washington, D.C. **These are innocent men and women, tortured and abused like they were political prisoners in a Third World dictatorship!**

[Please give what you can right now to help me fight to set them free. $5, $10, $25, $50, even more...whatever you can spare at this very moment. Each dollar counts.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2znkqskq744qgfreelso7dal7l1qin0e7hkoq0v3g_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c5ieapb5cdh2bs)

**Free the January 6 Protestors!
**
Right now, un-American politicians and corrupt members of the Department of Justice are keeping innocent Americans in jail without due process...they're often abused and beaten...they're blocked from seeing their wives and children...and kept from seeing their lawyers and clergy!

At least one January 6 protestor has already died.

And another protester, a patriot grandma with cancer, just finished serving 60 days in federal prison for a crime she didn't commit.

[But there's something you can do about it ...you can donate immediately to Freedom Watch's critically important lawsuit to HELP FREE the rest of these persecuted patriots with your crucial gift today.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zgrf06vje7ru5vgoiukcq8n6j2cegvosdfe2elao_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c5ieapb5cdh2bs)

I'm proud to say I am the first lawyer to EVER obtain a court ruling that an American president committed a crime when I won my case against Bill Clinton. I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers to IMPEACH criminal Bill Clinton. And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others. Not to mention that I also enjoined Obama's corrupt NSA from mass surveillance on hundreds of millions of Americans and killed Obama's illegal amnesty for over 5 million illegal aliens, a case that went all the way to the Supreme Court! I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents - AND WIN! And now I'm pursuing two class action lawsuits and other important legal actions to get justice for the January 6 Protesters and take on Joe Biden's rotten regime in court. Nobody else is doing what I 'm doing in court to get justice for these poor people. Patriot, please say a pray for the January 6 Prisoners. Their temptation to despair, to give up, must be enormous. I can't do it without you, Patriot. Thank you for doing whatever you can now. Sincerely, Larry Klayman Founder of both Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch Current Chairman and General Counsel of Freedom Watch, Inc. P.S. Patriot, I'm heartbroken after reading that powerful letter from our fellow patriots who are rotting in jail in Washington, D.C. These are innocent men and women, tortured and abused like they were political prisoners in a Third World dictatorship! Free the January 6 Protestors! ** Right now, un-American politicians and corrupt members of the Department of Justice are keeping innocent Americans in jail without due process...they're often abused and beaten...they're blocked from seeing their wives and children...and kept from seeing their lawyers and clergy! At least one January 6 protestor has already died. And another protester, a patriot grandma with cancer, just finished serving 60 days in federal prison for a crime she didn't commit. Hi there, Peter — it’s Mandela Barnes, former candidate for U.S. Senate in Wisconsin and Senior Advisor at The Collective PAC.

I’m reaching out today with an _extremely_ important favor to ask of you, Peter.

As I’m sure you know, it’s **Black History Month.** And we’re counting on our powerful movement of grassroots supporters to hit it out of the park this month and set us up for success this election cycle.

[I know it may seem like your support won’t make a difference, but I need you to understand that your $10 could be the difference between electing a Black progressive champion or a Republican extremist in 2023. So I’m asking you personally, Peter: Will you chip in $10 to The Collective PAC right now?](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953x7ESlwpd39wyaaM2DOMklJlhvNiqQ372mJELSbBmz1l6YRa1LomLk0PezW5VsRhSZ_LgjFHqH4l5-j5YBPgLafepQlJf-y7Wp-xOaD5baL8rdz8MPrBALbnH37QQcuT2p3rqO2K6rlitJh7ib3npn1ZS_SidXWE1Zr2JDc4NPJGVSRGI4N0V1m0cvQkgdwnNiPYXqim4W3AnvDJduorbNv6_nRAwu1CHZ8MqpkWEJ9itukqL1oqehjootn11kdqUAneFOZGcfjL3FllW5uoLhOy24Tt5Nl-tAafMIMSn58xQ56BgPR5Tw5oUgIDkCL0lgnDxNR8Sru6SvEdVSuBFhzvXLHt3p_DbU4ly7hBmHK0GEnLatMftrgP9si7RC11eE/3tq/AH0YrQzvTSut3EbO-757jQ/h2/9erMky8GpbFEei7LAw4aY1fRUBgdej4RFB7eXQwTJ_4) | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately.

Make no mistake, Peter — We made substantial progress toward political equity in 2022, and we’re so proud of everything we accomplished over the past year.

But I want to make one thing clear: **The fight to fix the challenge of under-representation of the Black community in elected seats of power throughout our nation is far from over.**

Right now, a party led by racist, right-wing extremists holds the majority in Congress. And as long as “politicians” like Marjorie Taylor-Greene, Matt Gaetz, and Lauren Boebert have ANY power over our government, Peter, our work will never be over.

I saw firsthand the lengths that Republicans are willing to go to drown out Black voices. The GOP funneled millions of dollars in dark money into my race against Ron Johnson and into races like mine across the country — **all to prevent Black voices from having a say.**

That’s why the future of our efforts to elect Black leaders here at The Collective PAC in 2023 and 2024 depends on the success of our program this Black History Month, **_and we can’t do it without your immediate support._**

[Please, Peter — if you can, chip in $10 today and help us hit a home run this Black History Month. Your support will give us the resources we need to succeed over the next two years:](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953x7ESlwpd39wyaaM2DOMklJlhvNiqQ372mJELSbBmz1l6YRa1LomLk0PezW5VsRhSZ_LgjFHqH4l5-j5YBPgLafepQlJf-y7Wp-xOaD5baL8rdz8MPrBALbnH37QQcuT2p3rqO2K6rlitJh7ib3npn1ZS_SidXWE1Zr2JDc4NPJGQcdqTPteL3Rz17iDYrQceXuQtaP0WeGT3WEUNPi_MSSq2ozi5-GN64FpKLFd0qqxUsRBJY0A9LnOyeyuXJUEAxeUscc6JtgsgB8QNjFTqhzV3KdQcc__H5Zzk8cdmSg5tHTUlYFBpg0SYj0HND1jZQqhLjyZL7VMpqk7tPTLyzUdzkyba6dbVbx6Gqbs_Cu2ByRo-zZIP5L-LyHm9mjMuQ/3tq/AH0YrQzvTSut3EbO-757jQ/h9/ZFKeP0IiXu3S-bU0IIB2gZeAhA64k6fsz-1FQPsa-fo)

[](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953w5O3Wwmdygae0W-34efSvb_hfX51xtIkq_nCgr0tl8iRqUTOndcJRC4vm20WcsKLiIREySDakJxy3OAtD2oMvtZmp3Nv4HNVZea7IMnsMEfxKgTYE_9IyzgCq4jK66gJEAUUx_I8hqmyz3lOXUo00d12IKoxPuIkcNkWqgkhJtIeMbYKOdjnXNUqHhfjLYLj0VPJYr69MzgChWz5kvBHdNPUbMpt_F4iOYfmDVPgfWpSJXZUWTZpJ4G-A84qBtjkYMa8KW52UOZQRDTpRJPlKXv1m3N8vF30uN1atxNKGBbajkQYkTXvNO1IKiFyBHl4hp3hiU3649FU_jeKiecM4tIshhO3JcibcoZ35gHlPwLQ/3tq/AH0YrQzvTSut3EbO-757jQ/h16/CPcPuju1RUr52jvsS-xEzEqI4NAwBEU1DZLfI_LEOXo) The Collective PAC is strategically focused on creating a truly equitable democracy where our nation’s local, state and federal governments have diverse and talented elected leadership and Black people are fully represented in positions of power to create the policies necessary to progress our communities forward. Since our inception in 2016, we have helped 110 candidates win general elections at the local, state and federal levels. clean_body: | | If you want to help The Collective PAC build Black political power up and down the ballot, and across the country, then you’re in the right place. If you'd like to unsubscribe | | Hi there, Peter — it’s Mandela Barnes, former candidate for U.S. Senate in Wisconsin and Senior Advisor at The Collective PAC. I’m reaching out today with an extremely important favor to ask of you, Peter. As I’m sure you know, it’s Black History Month. And we’re counting on our powerful movement of grassroots supporters to hit it out of the park this month and set us up for success this election cycle. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately. | | | | | | Make no mistake, Peter — We made substantial progress toward political equity in 2022, and we’re so proud of everything we accomplished over the past year. But I want to make one thing clear: The fight to fix the challenge of under-representation of the Black community in elected seats of power throughout our nation is far from over. Right now, a party led by racist, right-wing extremists holds the majority in Congress. And as long as “politicians” like Marjorie Taylor-Greene, Matt Gaetz, and Lauren Boebert have ANY power over our government, Peter, our work will never be over. I saw firsthand the lengths that Republicans are willing to go to drown out Black voices. The GOP funneled millions of dollars in dark money into my race against Ron Johnson and into races like mine across the country — all to prevent Black voices from having a say. That’s why the future of our efforts to elect Black leaders here at The Collective PAC in 2023 and 2024 depends on the success of our program this Black History Month, and we can’t do it without your immediate support. If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately. | | | | | | Thank you so much for the work you’ve done and that you continue to do to help The Collective PAC achieve their mission of creating a democracy that truly represents its people. — Mandela Barnes The Collective PAC is strategically focused on creating a truly equitable democracy where our nation’s local, state and federal governments have diverse and talented elected leadership and Black people are fully represented in positions of power to create the policies necessary to progress our communities forward. Since our inception in 2016, we have helped 110 candidates win general elections at the local, state and federal levels. name: Senator Mike Lee
subject: Can you help me with something?
body:
If I could -- hypothetically -- make everyone in America read one book, it would be The Law by Frederic Bastiat.

[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b550ff164a33403398779b2ca3223ba0&_e=dNwYfUxpIx5Iiox8fSCoPUmTSpNFDPmnbWQpDZUOkAd_KIVFODvUtNmCYGS7OT-tff19kEKkRUsfqbGn8cFokUv5TfZ5YXBkMJcgDF5V3GYx02QR1CICI1Y_iV-G68sYNqVXN24gQheDeEczalyJbMxSrfH1nL909AwYKa6mvAJvBy9MLSmoWLtMMMzM0qRYAJSPfnXJN-NqBg4Pl3kAVbGsqca0xLG4br2O5yJBdfdAaNmxYSn8vQ3cjDvkorrI8L46kU2CGVRMcfIPytM91jCf_v6YfDlXrpykMA8A_g7r1SlDRg0jYjqGCpGrOkL4)

Hello Friend,

If I could -- hypothetically -- make everyone in America read one book, it would be The Law by Frederic Bastiat. Every American, and especially every member of Congress, needs to read this book.

And while I can't make you read the book, Friend, I can send you a copy.

Bastiat wrote this book as a defense of life, liberty, and property.

**It points out the fallacy behind most failed government programs and summarizes the principles of liberty, which FEE teaches kids through their FEE in the Classroom program.**

I just talked with Zilvinas Silenas, President of the Foundation for Economic Education (FEE), and we want to get _The Law_ into your hands to thank you for supporting FEE.

FEE's mission is to inspire, educate, and connect future leaders with the economic, ethical, and legal principles of a free society, including individual liberty, free markets, entrepreneurship, private property, high moral character, and limited government.

[_**Zilvinas wants to send a copy to every new supporter who clicks this link and sends a gift of $10, $25, $50, or any generous amount. Claim your copy here >>>**_](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b550ff164a33403398779b2ca3223ba0&_e=dNwYfUxpIx5Iiox8fSCoPUmTSpNFDPmnbWQpDZUOkAd_KIVFODvUtNmCYGS7OT-tff19kEKkRUsfqbGn8cFokUv5TfZ5YXBkMJcgDF5V3GYx02QR1CICI1Y_iV-G68sYNqVXN24gQheDeEczalyJbMxSrfH1nL909AwYKa6mvAKTq4wYZYzxs37QGTmwRBOmK-ID0duvr5n9BzJnjVYAeBY8SJg4SikGGsQvCniw0MuKMUEJu-yq8hrldPnkTH8iEwNlq_VtFqTCGYML0Svq-1kD8IAmD_QRqYnTpU2lg03LlYbo6S7kEV7BbnExXCL0)

*****Donate $250 and more to get a signed copy of The Law from FEE 's President.*****

FEE fights against socialism and communism not because they've heard it's terrible but because many of their staff have lived through it.

Zilvinas grew up in Soviet-controlled Lithuania. Here is just one example from his childhood:

_" On May 1, 1986, my family skipped the mandatory workers' parade in Lithuania. Instead of carrying around red carnations, red balloons, and red placards denouncing the U.S. and the West, we went sunbathing at a local lake.

The lake was polluted with industrial runoff from a government-owned leather factory, so swimming was out of the question. Still, the day was unusually warm, so we enjoyed the sunshine, which is not so abundant in the northeastern climes where Lithuania (then-Soviet Socialist Republic of Lithuania) sits.

What we didn't know was that five days before, on April 26, the Chernobyl nuclear power plant exploded, sending radioactive clouds westwards through Belarus, Lithuania, all the way to Sweden and Norway.

You see, on May 1, we did not know. No one told us. In fact, until the Scandinavians picked up elevated levels of radiation, most people in the Soviet Union did not know what had happened. That's how we were treated under socialism."_

**Now he 's fighting to make sure that American children don't have to experience this kind of childhood, Friend.**

[_**Friend, can you help support FEE -- and receive a copy of The Law by Frederic Bastiat by donating $10, $25, $50, or any amount? And if you donate $250 or more, you can get a personally signed copy from my friend Zilvinas. Click here to send your gift. >>>**_](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b550ff164a33403398779b2ca3223ba0&_e=dNwYfUxpIx5Iiox8fSCoPUmTSpNFDPmnbWQpDZUOkAd_KIVFODvUtNmCYGS7OT-tff19kEKkRUsfqbGn8cFokUv5TfZ5YXBkMJcgDF5V3GYx02QR1CICI1Y_iV-G68sYNqVXN24gQheDeEczalyJbMxSrfH1nL909AwYKa6mvALAPTnbuXRWBqF_dZmEpssqzRUdYMIWDzxlDN8myOSDtQmgKtXzcn3Ou57-6mOApoXCrwY2u5Jj2M6bNN4xq-IvTwH0GLr5FwQEHvD1qXSrWdSyjzg2uLy0gKLR7UtkWHmKX9TFUrIziNOGMU-J54cB)

FEE teaches students and teachers to share important ideas of liberty and free market economics through their program FEE in the Classroom.

**FEE in the Classroom** is countering the radical indoctrination from teachers across the country. Here's how:

**FEE in the Classroom** is a unique program held in brick-and-mortar and virtual classrooms across the country that teaches young Americans the principles of free markets, individual liberty, and limited government.

This program uniquely challenges students to think outside the box and to challenge the mainstream narrative.

In a single day, an average of 75-300 students engage with FEE's faculty of acclaimed instructors through compelling lectures, exciting economic experiments, engaging group discussions, and Q&As. Students learn how the core principles of individual liberty and free-market economics apply to their daily lives, communities, careers, and the state of the nation.

My hope is that _The Law_ will be as valuable a resource for you as it is for me. So, can I count on you to join me in supporting FEE? **Click below to send your gift and claim your copy!**

clean_body: If I could -- hypothetically -- make everyone in America read one book, it would be The Law by Frederic Bastiat. Hello Friend, If I could -- hypothetically -- make everyone in America read one book, it would be The Law by Frederic Bastiat. Every American, and especially every member of Congress, needs to read this book. And while I can't make you read the book, Friend, I can send you a copy. Bastiat wrote this book as a defense of life, liberty, and property. It points out the fallacy behind most failed government programs and summarizes the principles of liberty, which FEE teaches kids through their FEE in the Classroom program. I just talked with Zilvinas Silenas, President of the Foundation for Economic Education (FEE), and we want to get The Law into your hands to thank you for supporting FEE. FEE's mission is to inspire, educate, and connect future leaders with the economic, ethical, and legal principles of a free society, including individual liberty, free markets, entrepreneurship, private property, high moral character, and limited government. ***Donate $250 and more to get a signed copy of The Law from FEE 's President.* FEE fights against socialism and communism not because they've heard it's terrible but because many of their staff have lived through it. Zilvinas grew up in Soviet-controlled Lithuania. Here is just one example from his childhood: " On May 1, 1986, my family skipped the mandatory workers' parade in Lithuania. Instead of carrying around red carnations, red balloons, and red placards denouncing the U.S. and the West, we went sunbathing at a local lake. The lake was polluted with industrial runoff from a government-owned leather factory, so swimming was out of the question. Still, the day was unusually warm, so we enjoyed the sunshine, which is not so abundant in the northeastern climes where Lithuania (then-Soviet Socialist Republic of Lithuania) sits. What we didn't know was that five days before, on April 26, the Chernobyl nuclear power plant exploded, sending radioactive clouds westwards through Belarus, Lithuania, all the way to Sweden and Norway. You see, on May 1, we did not know. No one told us. In fact, until the Scandinavians picked up elevated levels of radiation, most people in the Soviet Union did not know what had happened. That's how we were treated under socialism." Now he 's fighting to make sure that American children don't have to experience this kind of childhood, Friend. FEE teaches students and teachers to share important ideas of liberty and free market economics through their program FEE in the Classroom. FEE in the Classroom is countering the radical indoctrination from teachers across the country. Here's how: FEE in the Classroom is a unique program held in brick-and-mortar and virtual classrooms across the country that teaches young Americans the principles of free markets, individual liberty, and limited government. This program uniquely challenges students to think outside the box and to challenge the mainstream narrative. In a single day, an average of 75-300 students engage with FEE's faculty of acclaimed instructors through compelling lectures, exciting economic experiments, engaging group discussions, and Q&As. Students learn how the core principles of individual liberty and free-market economics apply to their daily lives, communities, careers, and the state of the nation. My hope is that The Law will be as valuable a resource for you as it is for me. So, can I count on you to join me in supporting FEE? Click below to send your gift and claim your copy!** Thank you, Senator Mike Lee FEE is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit educational organization, so donations made to FEE are tax-deductible to the full extent allowable by law. Sent to Conservatives Give subscribers. 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Candace Owens
subject: The ugly truth about Black History Month
body:
It’s Black History Month. . . The month when a bunch of people who know nothing about black history take the time to celebrate people like Frederick Douglas — but have never read any of his works.

[](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zpr50ijfm860d0glfmfork1fqrh1ndve4dr7lseg_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c5ie6o70c5h2bs)

Friend,

It's Black History Month. . . The month when a bunch of people who know nothing about black history take the time to celebrate people like Frederick Douglas -- but have never read any of his works.

Black History Month isn't about celebrating the Black men and women who've changed the world for the better.

It's nothing more than a way for woke radicals to push identity politics and glorify division in America.

I don't want a Black History Month, and I can't say "why" better than Morgan Freeman did:

_" You're going to relegate my history to a month? **Black history is American history.** "_

My name is Candace Owens, and I am a co-founder of the BLEXIT Foundation. One of the reasons I helped found BLEXIT was to teach REAL history to Black and minority communities.

To teach true American history -- _and not the socialist, woke version that 's pushed today_ -- I've set a goal to raise $50,000 this month.

[_**Will you join me in the push for TRUE history, Friend, by sending a gift of $10, $35, $50, or any amount? Click here to show your support >>>**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zhg3p7fk8ng3i0el3tflo139ao0v2u5cvm9p7lj8_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c5ie6o70c5h2bs)

BLEXIT honors independent black voices like. . .

. . . Thomas Sowell, a well-known American conservative and is considered one of the most influential black conservatives who has authored over 40 books.

. . . Clarence Thomas, a Constitutional originalist and Associate Justice of the Supreme Court of the United States.

. . . Walter Williams, an American economist, commentator, author, and academic and former John M. Olin Distinguished Professor of Economics at George Mason University.

That's why I hope you'll join me in our effort to celebrate Black Excellence and work to build a better future for Black and minority communities. [_**Click here to send a gift of $10, $35, $50, or any amount >>>**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zt4r7uoi1v2tlpftvcc5t85o5rcuov7ojnjd5lno_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c5ie6o70c5h2bs)

Here's how we're reaching Black and minority communities with American history:

**BLEXIT 's Liberation Camps** provide an American History curriculum to children in Kindergarten through 8th grade who live in low-income communities. We also teach key life skills and character development.

The children experience 18 weeks of after-school programming, six weeks of full-day summer camp programming, 25 full-day programs when schools had in-service days, and 20 parents-night-out programs and field trips.

**And through our 43 State Chapters made up of more than 14,000 volunteers! **

Our chapter members bring BLEXIT's five pillars to life through events and outreach efforts to places where no other organizations can effectively reach to combat the victimhood mentality.
1. **Advocating** for School Choice.
2. **Promoting** criminal justice reform by developing positive relationships between police and minority communities.
3. **Championing** entrepreneurship and free enterprise.
4. **Developing** history programs that will inspire minority children.

Presenting the message of BLEXIT through art and live experiences.

BLEXIT State Chapter members work within their local communities to help change the narrative that surrounds America's minority communities.

Friend, can you help us reach our goal of raising $50,000 this month? **Click below to send your support.**

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zdain90buguqg7sk3ib3pept58nqb5cleg3ofif0_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c5ie6o70c5h2bs)
[_**Donate $35 >>>**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zo1552c97uivngdmfp4bhsns90bm9riadkmrf7bg_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c5ie6o70c5h2bs)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zr5irhbe3vlod7rn99t6ahurg0moi02eierkaaq0_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c5ie6o70c5h2bs)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zrjme365c7o15ra3njhkhr2fto45j4qh0lcud2po_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c5ie6o70c5h2bs)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zqp3c86viaenmmrqgo5ikt6ppf0moks3fcgk7f3g_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c5ie6o70c5h2bs)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z47kfcg6mbcmr1v8rur08re8rp6dvkagk1q89n58_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c5ie6o70c5h2bs)
[_**Donate $1000 >>>**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zj4s328fm770m9oh7g04f6k5us45ospckimloja8_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c5ie6o70c5h2bs)
[_**Donate $2500 >>>**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zo9eikr3vc3s7g7dqa3jig1und4v7t7ps9651cjg_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c5ie6o70c5h2bs)
[_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zqs59j5tdcnos5mkk47vop47pkfpfh4grmldbjd8_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c5ie6o70c5h2bs)

Thank you,

Candace Owens
President
BLEXIT Foundation

_BLEXIT is a 501(c)3 tax-exempt organization. All contributions are tax-deductible to the extent provided by law._

body:

_We report, you act._

name: Andrew P. McIndoe
subject: Are you concerned about Biden’s open border extremism?
body:
Because I know your time is valuable, and because this issue is vital to national security, I’ll get straight to the point

| | | [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d9ce4d1c8a51418385289d204a50622f&_e=bhTm6GKEPIUukNqZn5TI-rKzc7obkBPKHD0kLOqVAkVJ1oNTjVEGN5bww__pIRk_VCe6D8uR1JchmbkfSvENgwkCnAv1hjMHZTz4bZMaLkWOOR4Pi3h9yebAq3nTUrQtTkvoPDgzsdEVgs5Wtfg-R7C_gRha7fk_T3h4ah0SdrLJKF90Q-ZyKoAq9PTarDT4PvwhAtMJL1aq6WwzxW468gvnPLAu2DYcQ4FQfptot2rkcUrM4qPQZsxaYs-YZyMFc-Bok1b5eVNKL7b9Xl4S66rd61smhT9YdIX8G-NxaqVH39jA6PNGqO-BCrocJzxbVQw0RQMeHnDk3V3SJUBbyKWB6k89zBX6VlgkbG5Ylm4VDgnLAxftNEhwxg7bYm3Y)
---
Dear Fellow Conservative,

Because I know your time is valuable, and because this issue is vital to national security, I'll get straight to the point:

I'm writing today to invite you to join other conservatives who are pressuring lawmakers to end Biden's open border extremism by completing a simple 1-minute survey using the link below:

**[https://secured.heritage.org/immigration-reform-survey/](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d9ce4d1c8a51418385289d204a50622f&_e=bhTm6GKEPIUukNqZn5TI-rKzc7obkBPKHD0kLOqVAkVJ1oNTjVEGN5bww__pIRk_VCe6D8uR1JchmbkfSvENgwkCnAv1hjMHZTz4bZMaLkWOOR4Pi3h9yebAq3nTUrQtTkvoPDgzsdEVgs5Wtfg-R7C_gRha7fk_T3h4ah0SdrLJKF90Q-ZyKoAq9PTarDT4PvwhAtMJL1aq6WwzxW468gvnPLAu2DYcQ4FQfptot2oEe2jj4yjcpQH0VTq-soqtaxns1ph2yZBOTS9UcnJUBeHv5HsLYegdwuhc7tvRo0GjSsDfl3zxdQZ7Sp4yUb_syymW0FxGfa4Ep3R2AP7-pQIJkXAKJdtui70flj_6NA39lQBl4EIesiVtMaBndEVN)**

It's critical that proactive citizens like you respond to this national poll because despite legacy media's deafening silence on the issue, **this crisis has now reached historic proportions with more than 2 million reported encounters between Border Patrol and illegal immigrants in 2022.**

This is more encounters than ever before in our nation's history--_more than double that of any year during President Donald Trump 's term._

So when people ask me what I think of Biden's immigration policy, I reply: _what immigration policy?_

Beginning the day he took office, Biden's "policies" have created one of the worst humanitarian crises our nation has ever seen.

And now, untold scores of narcotics, violent criminals, and human traffickers are being allowed to flood into American communities, practically unabated, _every single day._

Decades of success advancing conservative policies have taught us that lawmakers in Washington tend to be more responsive when they know that voters are paying attention.

**Will you help us pressure lawmakers to address this urgent matter of national security by completing a brief 1-minute survey on Immigration Reform using the link below?**

**[https://secured.heritage.org/immigration-reform-survey/](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d9ce4d1c8a51418385289d204a50622f&_e=bhTm6GKEPIUukNqZn5TI-rKzc7obkBPKHD0kLOqVAkVJ1oNTjVEGN5bww__pIRk_VCe6D8uR1JchmbkfSvENgwkCnAv1hjMHZTz4bZMaLkWOOR4Pi3h9yebAq3nTUrQtTkvoPDgzsdEVgs5Wtfg-R7C_gRha7fk_T3h4ah0SdrLJKF90Q-ZyKoAq9PTarDT4PvwhAtMJL1aq6WwzxW468gvnPLAu2DYcQ4FQfptot2qUnEyQq5VE7vwRbUKj70Sr2MDcATIfT0rQFT9GulYtdF6T4p4_yKQS31GVrSLMotZuf5GIuR2-Cey5sAdMlnOLmwLXZZIDFe1K0IBpgX__TeJu4AD4gnj7vd4L8Y9KmcUX1vh1Xl8gVCpGoIGdmHY1)**

**Armed with your response, we will work on your behalf to turn up the pressure on lawmakers and compel them to act now.**

Let elected officials know loud and clear that **you _demand_ an end to Biden's open border extremism by completing this quick 1-minute survey using the link below:**

**[https://secured.heritage.org/immigration-reform-survey/](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d9ce4d1c8a51418385289d204a50622f&_e=bhTm6GKEPIUukNqZn5TI-rKzc7obkBPKHD0kLOqVAkVJ1oNTjVEGN5bww__pIRk_VCe6D8uR1JchmbkfSvENgwkCnAv1hjMHZTz4bZMaLkWOOR4Pi3h9yebAq3nTUrQtTkvoPDgzsdEVgs5Wtfg-R7C_gRha7fk_T3h4ah0SdrLJKF90Q-ZyKoAq9PTarDT4PvwhAtMJL1aq6WwzxW468gvnPLAu2DYcQ4FQfptot2q-tuyxKB-09qFOyBTilKBcNiAkwHlK_lDeEaqpD6-QgshIU9POTD1NDTcfR4UdxSwaOiBjS0nakCKADgMI5zE5H8-tI5n6rvda8XhcbAOOxEw5buVl1PxkGPXw8ZMQ5lYMwL7voblJl6P9ouNaovGc)**

Thank you,

Andrew P. McIndoe
VP, Development

**P.S.** We must take action now--this issue cannot wait. [**Thank you for joining the fight by completing the 1-minute survey linked here. >>**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d9ce4d1c8a51418385289d204a50622f&_e=bhTm6GKEPIUukNqZn5TI-rKzc7obkBPKHD0kLOqVAkVJ1oNTjVEGN5bww__pIRk_VCe6D8uR1JchmbkfSvENgwkCnAv1hjMHZTz4bZMaLkWOOR4Pi3h9yebAq3nTUrQtTkvoPDgzsdEVgs5Wtfg-R7C_gRha7fk_T3h4ah0SdrLJKF90Q-ZyKoAq9PTarDT4PvwhAtMJL1aq6WwzxW468gvnPLAu2DYcQ4FQfptot2qouwtc7BZeo_ShzISws5NQu3IxdbTryYTZdX3zu4V0R3wROyyRKAnJy2PwbMhmtJx1Xw84jG_4EqF970bDl6f8Ijf9qJCZ_q8m_chs7MHmlPPM2RCwx5yLJIPAWfuD5vraC0Y-UvjNSi2DMH60aAoK)
---
| | The Heritage Foundation 214 Massachusetts Avenue NE Washington D.C. 20002
---

Sent to Conservative Liberty Wire subscribers.

name: Larry Hogan
subject: writing from the road
disclaimer_text: Paid for by An America United
body:
Wanted to share some thoughts...| | | Hey there, fellow American. I've been on the road with **_An America United._** I had the wonderful opportunity to meet with local officials and Jewish leaders in Florida, and I have some thoughts I would like to share with you. **First off →** When you're in the Miami area, you must stop by Mo's Bagels & Deli...the corned beef sandwich is delicious! **Secondly →** We, as leaders, must come together to do more to stand against anti-semitism in our country. **Lastly →** I stand with our ally, Israel, against the Boycott, Divestment, and Sanctions movement. Check out some of my pictures from our visit.
---
| | [](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=96b171ff8fa34eb89314b2433106dae3&_m=eade9156ed074a07829ffab2253a7a45&_e=uwq9LJ1_pVPk2Fs0I5RItvNZeSNJIdAQu5IFlDuWUv0XcS9m4b5QDJsGkBGjvkpzw4MBKZh94d_tX-D5gRnejhDKETT9wS-g_MrIVTKTmDudAoh8G39FR7Zn2j8hvUu93gkOULSpPspUO3Vw9iai1f_stpIsZBphePtm5Uwp9C9SRhWieM38K_voOUsfE6zH1pf-oqDRB9Y0nIaIwOqbeGCGZDRqXaZK_WrfF0hA3PPlpqbzLXCij_ar-f3jCJGW)

| [](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=96b171ff8fa34eb89314b2433106dae3&_m=eade9156ed074a07829ffab2253a7a45&_e=uwq9LJ1_pVPk2Fs0I5RItvNZeSNJIdAQu5IFlDuWUv0XcS9m4b5QDJsGkBGjvkpzw4MBKZh94d_tX-D5gRnejhDKETT9wS-g_MrIVTKTmDtPRGGIuOrSSMyN_FKLQp2jV1vMIame0_JsRkXcan_zvF8obm0EflEi8K05vkNynngmndmNzZEoDvL1NWAUrTv8efdDJgBqYlwuph8zQS74EGKeT0GCtcILxfTJlxTpDdfXNGVovbfDl3zLeG3ZAl72)

| | Israel and our allies need a strong and united America. The rising division in our country needs to be stopped. _**An America United**_ and I are dedicated to bringing people together, bridging the divides, and advocate for a better path forward. clean_body: Wanted to share some thoughts...| | | Hey there, fellow American. I've been on the road with An America United. I had the wonderful opportunity to meet with local officials and Jewish leaders in Florida, and I have some thoughts I would like to share with you. First off → When you're in the Miami area, you must stop by Mo's Bagels & Deli...the corned beef sandwich is delicious! Secondly → We, as leaders, must come together to do more to stand against anti-semitism in our country. Lastly → I stand with our ally, Israel, against the Boycott, Divestment, and Sanctions movement. Check out some of my pictures from our visit. | | | | | Israel and our allies need a strong and united America. The rising division in our country needs to be stopped. An America United and I are dedicated to bringing people together, bridging the divides, and advocate for a better path forward. Your financial support today means that we can get our message to more people in more communities from coast to coast. Please use our secure link to donate $20 or whatever you can give: Our nation is at a crossroads and we hope you can join us as we work to put people over politics. Thank you for your support, Larry Hogan Former Governor of Maryland P.S. Your generous donation of $20 or any other amount will be put right to work towards community events, national outreach, and our rapid response communications as policy is announced in Washington, D.C. name: Eric H. Holder, Jr.
subject: Help us defend American democracy, fair maps, and voter protection laws.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NATIONAL REDISTRICTING ACTION FUND
body:
|
---

Too many ideologues have already gone to extreme lengths to maintain power against the wishes of the American people through the use of partisan and racial gerrymandering. Now, they are going even further to achieve their unpopular political aims.
[**Will you make a contribution to All On The Line?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/58773024/392198876/2105777232?refcode=20230115_AOTL_P_EHHB1_RedLite&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImNjNWRhOTE3LTdjYWQtZWQxMS05OTRkLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Tv_y_cdMPNc8h0ZkQZe14Rw9WMxRk5rcrszv9auLT5E=)
North Carolina Republicans are attempting to use their state’s highest court to reverse an established precedent that resulted in fair maps. If you're already familiar with Harper v. Hall, you know that our affiliate, the National Redistricting Foundation, initiated this landmark case that struck down gerrymandered congressional and state legislative maps.
The North Carolina Supreme Court has consistently sided with fair maps as recently as just a few weeks ago. But these extreme Republicans cynically think that the new court majority will now side with them — not because they have a better case, but because some of the justices belong to their political party.
I'll cut right to the chase -- if the North Carolina Supreme Court reverses decisions made - by the same court - as recently as weeks ago, it will do irreversible damage to the judicial branch.
Republicans in North Carolina are hoping to use the Court to attain their ultimate goal: to gerrymander with impunity. We can’t let that happen. We need supporters like you to help us keep up the fight for fairness and voter protection.
[**Can you contribute to All On The Line today to help our work to safeguard our democracy against this brazen attempt to undermine judicial independence?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/58773025/392198877/2105777232?refcode=20230115_AOTL_P_EHHB1_RedLite&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImNjNWRhOTE3LTdjYWQtZWQxMS05OTRkLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Tv_y_cdMPNc8h0ZkQZe14Rw9WMxRk5rcrszv9auLT5E=)
Justices are supposed to serve as independent jurists. Overturning a decision made just a few weeks ago would be an action so baldly political that it would rightly call into question the legitimacy of the state’s highest court.
This will weaken our system of checks and balances. State supreme courts have been one of the last lines of defense against gerrymandering and voter suppression laws passed by Republican-controlled state legislatures.
[**Help us defend American democracy, fair maps, and voter protection laws. Give $10, $20, or $50 if you’re able – whatever amount works for you. If there was ever a time to help us, that time is now.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/58773026/392198878/2105777232?refcode=20230115_AOTL_P_EHHB1_RedLite&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImNjNWRhOTE3LTdjYWQtZWQxMS05OTRkLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Tv_y_cdMPNc8h0ZkQZe14Rw9WMxRk5rcrszv9auLT5E=)
| [**TAKE ACTION**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/58773027/392198879/2105777232?refcode=20230115_AOTL_P_EHHB1_RedLite&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImNjNWRhOTE3LTdjYWQtZWQxMS05OTRkLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Tv_y_cdMPNc8h0ZkQZe14Rw9WMxRk5rcrszv9auLT5E=)
---
\-- A.G. Holder

**_All On The Line is the grassroots advocacy campaign supported by the National Redistricting Action Fund. Support our work to end gerrymandering._**

Donald J. Trump February 14th, 2023
Disastrous New Inflation Numbers Show Biden’s Economic Crisis Worsening
**Mar-a-Lago, FL** — New Consumer Price Index data proves Joe Biden’s reckless spending and radical, leftist policies are devastating American families and destroying America’s economy.

name: Gabby Giffords
subject: Enough
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
When will it be enough?
#

Enough.
When will it be enough?
When will our nation have the courage to stand up and take action to keep our communities safe from gun violence?
Three students were killed on Monday night after a gunman opened fire on the Michigan State University campus. Five students were injured. And countless others will now live with the trauma that comes with experiencing a mass shooting.
Our students should be focused on studying for their exams and writing papers. But to be a student in America today means worrying about whether or not your class will be interrupted by gunshots, or if you can eat safely in the dining hall with your friends. Getting an education shouldn't require risking your life.
This is not normal. We must do something.
[**If you agree that we must take action, please make a contribution to Giffords today. Your support will allow us to continue making progress on legislation that will save lives.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-feb23.wLJBGg&refcode=em230215-1-15&t=1&akid=4269%2E3935704%2EE-8gTB)
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-feb23.wLJBGg&refcode=em230215-1-15&t=2&akid=4269%2E3935704%2EE-8gTB)**
Thank you. I will not rest until we see a future free from gun violence. The laws we have in place now are not enough, and we must keep demanding more change from our elected officials.
Sincerely,
Gabby Giffords

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=4269%2E3935704%2EE-8gTB) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

name: Adam Frisch
subject: I’m running again to defeat Lauren Boebert
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH |
body:
In 2022, we came just 546 votes short of kicking Boebert out of Congress. It was the closest race in the entire country.
| | |
---
Hello,
**I am officially running again against Lauren Boebert!**
In 2022, we came just 546 votes short of kicking Boebert out of Congress. It was the closest race in the __entire__ country. **Now, I’m running again to finish the job, but I need you with me from day one:**
**[Please, will you split a donation between me and Maggie Hassan now and become a Founding Donor to my 2024 campaign to defeat Boebert?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58760947/392151772/-1786579371?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&refcode=mh-jtk2212-bu-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MDM3YjIyZi01MmFkLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=swS1pt8UkFht6tTO4f5k9q7kMxOKEKVNGlyerqNIMzw=)**
No one believed we could pull it off in 2022. All of the pundits said Colorado’s 3rd Congressional District was a “Safe Republican” seat. The national Democrats and the national Republicans wrote us off.
But we proved them all wrong.
With Lauren Boebert now on notice, this campaign is going to get even nastier. Her Super PACs and supporters are going to spin lie after lie against me on TV. **I’m counting on you to be able to correct the record and hold Boebert accountable.**
**[No amount is too small: Click here now and split a donation between my campaign and Maggie Hassan's of whatever you can afford today. It’s important that we have as strong of an early showing as possible.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58760953/392151778/-1786579371?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&refcode=mh-jtk2212-bu-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MDM3YjIyZi01MmFkLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=swS1pt8UkFht6tTO4f5k9q7kMxOKEKVNGlyerqNIMzw=)**
I never could have done it last time without supporters and donors like you. I am eternally grateful to have you alongside me again.
With gratitude –
Adam

I just read the urgent letter signed by 34 innocent Americans, jailed in Washington, D.C for peacefully protesting the stolen 2020 presidential election.

**Patriot, what 's being done to them is so demonic, so foul, that they're BEGGING to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba...where vicious, America-hating terrorists get better treatment!**

I'm heartsick and deeply angry about what's being done to our fellow patriots.

Their letter reads like an appeal from dissidents in the Soviet Union.

Here are just a few examples of what they're enduring (I quote directly from their letter, published by Gateway Pundit):
* Begging for Help / Water / Medical Aid / Mercy through a 4-inch by 10-inch window of cold metal doors
* No visits from family, friends, lawyers, or clergy
* No Mass or Sunday worship service
* Laundry returning with brown stains, pubic hair, and or reeking of ripe urine
* Broken toilets that either wont flush or repeatedly explode in Cells
* Stuck in Cells for 9 days without a shower
* Solitary Confinement for 25 1⁄2 hours or more at a time

Outrageously, there's more.

**Guards deny them hot water and keep them from attending court. They severely beat, mace, harass, insult, and even sexually assault them.**

Their food is so disgusting and so low in nutrition, that some prisoners are losing their eyesight, their hair, and getting scurvy (from Vitamin C deficiency).

There's much, much more...all of it horrifying.

And this has been going on for up to a year and a half...in AMERICA.

**They conclude their letter by pleading to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba, where the Taliban, al-Qaeda, and ISIS terrorists get better treatment!**

This can't go on. I won't allow it.

I'm Larry Klayman, the founder ofstrong Judicial Watch and founder and General Counsel of Freedom Watch.

I'm a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who's fought for the American people for 45 years.

You've seen me on cable news outlets and heard me on radio talk shows. I'm proud to say I am the first lawyer to EVER obtain a court ruling that an American president committed a crime when I won my case against Bill Clinton.

I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers to IMPEACH criminal Bill Clinton.

And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

Not to mention that I also enjoined Obama's corrupt NSA from mass surveillance on hundreds of millions of Americans and killed Obama's illegal amnesty for over 5 million illegal aliens, a case that went all the way to the Supreme Court!

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents - AND WIN!**

And now I'm pursuing two class action lawsuits and other important legal actions to get justice for the January 6 Protesters and take on Joe Biden's rotten regime in court.

**Nobody else is doing what I 'm doing in court to get justice for these poor people.**

Patriot, please say a pray for the January 6 Prisoners. Their temptation to despair, to give up, must be enormous.

[Then I beg you to help me fight for them with your very best gift now of $10, $25, $50, $100, or even more. If you've given before, please give again. I can't do it without you, Patriot.

Thank you for doing whatever you can now.

Sincerely,

Larry Klayman
Founder of both Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch
Current Chairman and General Counsel of Freedom Watch, Inc.

**Free the January 6 Protestors!**
Right now, un-American politicians and corrupt members of the Department of Justice are keeping innocent Americans in jail without due process...they're often abused and beaten...they're blocked from seeing their wives and children...and kept from seeing their lawyers and clergy!

At least one January 6 protestor has already died.

And another protester, a patriot grandma with cancer, just finished serving 60 days in federal prison for a crime she didn't commit.

name: Joe Kent
subject: Covid Forever?
body:
Dear Peter,
I couldn't believe it. Despite practically every country in the world lifting their COVID restrictions, the Democrats in Congress voted to KEEP the US's COVID restrictions in place.
Even Joe Biden wandered off script long enough to say the pandemic is over, but nearly every Democrat in Congress, including my far-left opponent, Marie Perez, voted to keep the US's draconian rules in place.
How many businesses have failed because of these COVID restrictions? How many people have lost jobs? Or not been able to attend the funeral of a parent or had to delay medical procedures?

Help me put an end to this madness by defeating Marie Perez by making a donation to my campaign TODAY at [https://JoeKentforCongress.com](https://contact.joekentforcongress.com/l/yKnBAvy7a4tJj7XnOa763cIw/UmhuYJRKf73bVIT5doEfHw/pZV2mNZ97J6ZIOu1Lh8pEA).
The country has paid a great price for federal and state government mismanagement of this pandemic. It will take years to recover what we've lost. But thanks to Democrats in Congress marching in lockstep with Joe Biden, these losses continue to mount.
When I'm elected, I'll fight to remove these restrictions and go even further by insisting on backpay for military members who were suspended for refusing the vaccine.
The pandemic is over, but the Democrats' destructive policies continue. Help me end them.
Please support my campaign today at [https://JoeKentforCongress.com](https://contact.joekentforcongress.com/l/yKnBAvy7a4tJj7XnOa763cIw/UmhuYJRKf73bVIT5doEfHw/pZV2mNZ97J6ZIOu1Lh8pEA).
Respectfully,
Joe Kent

name: Sen. Heidi Campbell
subject: We will fight to protect Black History
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Campbell for State Senate, Jacob Kleinrock treasurer
body:
https://www.voteheidicampbell.com/ [https://www.voteheidicampbell.com/]
Hi Peter ,
February is Black History Month, a time to celebrate Black and African American communities, commemorate their achievements, and reflect on the work ahead of us to ensure their equal status in this country. A portion of Republicans in our state legislature have regrettably chosen to use this month to introduce legislation which attempts to erase Black History and reverse progress Nashville has made toward equity and inclusion.
Republicans in our state legislature recently introduced a bill [https://wapp.capitol.tn.gov/apps/BillInfo/default.aspx?BillNumber=HB1372&GA=113] that would rename a portion of Rep. John Lewis Way — a stretch that runs from James Robertson Parkway to Dr. Martin L. King Jr. Boulevard — to President Donald Trump Boulevard. As a result of this bill, the streets will be ineligible for protection under the Tennessee Heritage Protection Act.
Our time in the legislative session is precious, and should be dedicated to introducing bills that support our state and enhance the lives of our residents. It is deeply unfortunate that instead, we are witnessing attempts in our state to de-memorialize icons like John Lewis and erase Black History. You can remain assured that I, and my colleagues in the legislature, are ready to fight this bill; we will continue pushing back on these gross overreaches of state power to the detriment of our vibrant, diverse city.
I also want to make sure you are aware of some of the wonderful opportunities Nashville is offering this year to celebrate and commemorate Black History Month. You can find more information on discussion panels, speaking engagements, and public events at this link: https://www.visitmusiccity.com/welcome/black/black-history-month# [https://www.visitmusiccity.com/welcome/black/black-history-month#]
My promise to you is that I will remain a strong advocate for Nashville’s African American community. Please continue to feel free reaching out with any questions, ideas, or concerns on this subject or otherwise.
Thank you for your continued support, and Happy Black History Month!
Senator Heidi Campbell
https://www.facebook.com/campbell4tn [https://www.facebook.com/campbell4tn] https://twitter.com/Campbell4TN [https://twitter.com/Campbell4TN] https://www.instagram.com/campbell4tn/ [https://www.instagram.com/campbell4tn/]
Paid for by Campbell for State Senate, Jacob Kleinrock treasurer.
Campbell for State Senate
PO Box 330302
Nashville, TN 37203
United States

Hi Peter, I wanted to take a moment to talk about Black History Month and its significance.

This is a time to honor, celebrate, and reflect on the contributions of Black Americans to our nation’s history and culture, as well as a reminder that we still have a long way to go to ensure equality for all in our nation.

_**The Black American story is the American story.**_

This Black History Month, I invite you to join me in honoring that story and continuing the fight to ensure our country realizes its promise for everyone.

Happy Black History Month.
Sincerely,
Yadira Caraveo

clean_body: Help me reach my goal before tonight’s deadline | Friend, Joe Biden didn’t waste any time before traveling to our great state of Wisconsin, the top battleground state that will decide who takes control of the White House in 2024. But all he did was continue to show the people of Wisconsin and the rest of the country how out of touch he is with the real issues Americans are facing. As he continues to lie to the American people, House Republicans are FIGHTING BACK against his failed policies to restore the country to its former glory. And reaching our fundraising goals is imperative to our success. That’s why I need your help to reach tonight’s mid-month goal before the deadline. 76% of Americans think the country is on the wrong track yet when asked about those numbers Biden responds “polls don’t matter anymore.” All the Wisconsin families who are struggling to put food on the table would disagree. But Biden is traveling the country to expand on this lie that Americans LOVE his policies and that his agenda is working. It’s up to us to ensure that Americans know the truth. And with your support, I know that we can reach our fundraising goals and have the resources we need to FIGHT BACK against Biden. Thank you, Rep. An estimated 3.4 million Americans were forced to leave their homes due to climate-related disasters in 2022, according to new Census Bureau data.

The majority of displaced Americans were uprooted due to severe hurricanes, floods, and wildfires caused by the worsening effects of climate change. Vulnerable populations in states like Louisiana and Florida saw the highest displacement rates.

**No one is immune to the effects of climate change. Without immediate action to tackle the climate crisis at its root causes, climate experts warn the number of displaced Americans will only rise.** [_**Will you contribute $10 right away to protect our planet?**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/58774899/392203761/931979156?refcode=BLU-JANE-20230215-1-EM&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImUzMzk1ZGNlLTgyYWQtZWQxMS05OTRkLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=IP98lerguWuKNOE5QJf2cTF7TM_vHFjLMaAx4YtOl3M=)

clean_body: No one is immune to the effects of climate change. | = | | | Natural disasters, boosted by climate change, displaced millions of people in the U.S. in 2022 \- NBC News | = An estimated 3.4 million Americans were forced to leave their homes due to climate-related disasters in 2022, according to new Census Bureau data. The majority of displaced Americans were uprooted due to severe hurricanes, floods, and wildfires caused by the worsening effects of climate change. Vulnerable populations in states like Louisiana and Florida saw the highest displacement rates. No one is immune to the effects of climate change. Without immediate action to tackle the climate crisis at its root causes, climate experts warn the number of displaced Americans will only rise. = | = | = The solution is clear – we need to end the use of fossil fuels and drastically scale up alternative energy sources to protect our communities. That’s why we need your support to elect climate champions up and down the ballot. Climate action cannot take an off-year, and we can’t let up during this crucial moment. = | | | = | = | = | = | = Let’s protect our communities, Jane Fonda Climate PAC | | = Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Six days to another House seat … if Jennifer McClellan wins the special election on the 21st. This could be the first of many steps to taking back the House from Kevin McCarthy & Marjorie Taylor Greene’s GOP.
body:
This House seat is up for grabs
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te1590217-21cf-4d9d-9c44-eb8cb0109c32/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, have you gotten a chance to pitch in for this special election? [**We Have Six Days To Shrink Kevin McCarthy's Majority — and we can do it if we can help Jennifer McClellan win this special election in Virginia!!**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T69ede71f-5962-42bc-a4ed-b0dfc696f5dc/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _In 6 days, there will be a special election in Virginia's 4th Congressional District. Our incredible Democratic candidate, Jennifer McClellan, would be the first African-American to represent the district and another vote for Leader Hakeem Jeffries!_ She describes herself like this: \--- _I believe in the power of government to make people’s lives better — and I’ve spent the past 18 years as a public servant helping Virginians and solving problems, from passing the Voting Rights Act of Virginia to the Reproductive Health Protection Act.

**But my work doesn’t stop here – because there are still more people to help and problems to solve.**

My team has a plan to win. We’re distributing yard signs, airing new ads, and meeting voters all over the district – but our critical voter outreach efforts are expensive._ _\---_
---
|
---
| | | | | | [**DONATE NOW**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T14c82e78-ddef-4247-9cd0-69043deaf755/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| **McClellan's opponent, Leon Benjamin, is a MAGA NUT who pushed the dangerous conspiracy theory Trump didn't lose the 2020 election and when Benjamin ran for this seat in 2022 and lost, he refused to concede. He's a bigot who attacks immigrants, a** nd _he'll provide Kevin McCarthy another vote in Congress._ [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T82960fe1-fcba-4a42-a907-ae9788c98a65/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **_We must ensure that in 6 days we send Jennifer McClellan, not that nutcase, to Congress. We don't need more Marjorie Taylor Greenes in the Capitol._** [**_Can you join us in rushing Jennifer McClellan $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can so she can put those funds to use and win this crucial congressional seat?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb6f8e29d-d1b9-4741-8ad7-f501b9dd8e7d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _Thank you so much, Blue Amp Action community!_ Cliff

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T35fc8693-16b3-4d8b-b3d1-3f0043f15509/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Jason
subject: Re: defending religious liberty
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Miyares for Virginia |
body:
the American people deserve to know if houses of worship are being infiltrated. | | | [](http://links.jasonforvirginia.com/u/click?_t=b7c680598d5648c3aaffcf8cea32abf4&_m=c3c9353f659241069d78a8d31d920e82&_e=aBYqYE08l5KpQa2jCIUhlkAuBcgrVdhh2SEC5L6IlIrzfDSI0iJZuobVwZ09zR4PHZ07rc4S-JhNiIQVNb77Oq0dDOouRu_7FReu2Sg3Dw3EC_3Pc6SuBHxTxHnJvA2DHsfDnSKSknI7-pwt0Hw7hWD7LZ_5BVkrDVv9Py8ov9OIsKJ6FrMCHugzAyY-c-CMZNB8M_BUdb3n20Qhge3EkpOpa3H-5wuZBg_9xRIrC4ZMzuk-hN8gX9mCA8ecrFWvonoEwAbI-fT-0WGtvGuuuxQY4bQTk1NwOsPtpqKdzx5_n04DVJypQjpLbQnmeisQzExy49h2m3BBgSnfYTsk3kkIXUDj9ygx9UlmGBbwZgw%3D)
---
Friend, 19 other attorneys general joined me in sending a letter to FBI Director Wray and AG Garland over a leaked FBI memo from the Richmond field office. They targeted Catholics as a potential threat due to their religious beliefs. In [**our letter**](http://links.jasonforvirginia.com/u/click?_t=b7c680598d5648c3aaffcf8cea32abf4&_m=c3c9353f659241069d78a8d31d920e82&_e=aBYqYE08l5KpQa2jCIUhlp46bjuyBpub8elh0rlux7230f7MmO7PxdUEOO6_PL_AdftdTe_MG4oU1sw5wsWiIneIHlaPTdEZPYxxqcc1dpcTPfozbasZeFVo6xnKCLOXnCyIn_Hv86dqKYE-lPuyOP3w3Xjkk7IhGbI-Bw4e1SwdRWNoh0emeV7ZGEGRCpkveuTKApJ1vAKGQDiP-2C6hor6XanRKbGrSJkNW5GVzZepoDovXvb4G69x02xMutlRxdqD-ns1Wxoc2MCdEEOL8iTGM5p3ZVruZyyAF-lXBBYJDo8hX50zL25MY_-780kCJ2GIOKNo9GBSTlwf-aJN_lBuPU-f3FmwwOj6OmPj8m8qN6_-JpUvFqHK4RELomEQptZlAWEcU56tbkOQpyWFqZQRDQ9iLfdknx-3w1Iz_oOfgFSX8lQ2E9EiLqGZ2OTKI39AH9xbymohOls0BICFvP-HtIbI4gVkgYbiRJqLkDvD_PckkhefwzcDaNCSnMmN), we demanded a full explanation of the document’s origin, documents related to the implementation, information about how this document has already affected the Commonwealth’s Catholic population, and whether the FBI is infiltrating houses of worship.
---
[**READ THE LETTER**](http://links.jasonforvirginia.com/u/click?_t=b7c680598d5648c3aaffcf8cea32abf4&_m=c3c9353f659241069d78a8d31d920e82&_e=aBYqYE08l5KpQa2jCIUhlnR88m_bXacoteDvbQXnu1h2o_e2_y0NC4mqAqVjVKyqko5CrIot7FmYYzgPp38dwOHXEOcHWreqI5C4uthWhXzfznA9GcNy7NhV1JsGf9OKyxSYpoXrxpMQlO0DojqAYkWKKwEP5oBkR0KHaOuhu_MKWimfUtBBBPl81Lq-g7FeWPk6fD6iyRXv_TaWpMnWjj5N2a3k52mCp4j4bEG6nqwJkWu1Wl-OWx2_nzMJ5GqLyzX86z1CoxTcN8o5w9RHbIpnTgTj8FRvGGaLvXX6tovCgc3lXSDn6ZMDPGrvNG1kulMZaKtfDnddp9cLkPVt6hhAOLxOnHRL_2ITJ4Uo_fIV7K3B6TXpxWEDa9PJ8NL-jl8jF5_tJ68gDK6sVAu7lg%3D%3D)
---
Friend, Virginia is the birthplace of religious freedom and has a long history of protecting the inalienable right to live your faith, free from government interference or intimidation. **The leaked memo from the Richmond FBI field office is unacceptable, unconstitutional, and un-American.****_And, frankly, it’s what I would expect from Communist Cuba._** As your attorney general, I’m defending religious freedom, the backbone of our nation and the bedrock of our Constitution. _[**Sign the petition to demand answers from the FBI.**](http://links.jasonforvirginia.com/u/click?_t=b7c680598d5648c3aaffcf8cea32abf4&_m=c3c9353f659241069d78a8d31d920e82&_e=aBYqYE08l5KpQa2jCIUhlkAuBcgrVdhh2SEC5L6IlIrzfDSI0iJZuobVwZ09zR4PHZ07rc4S-JhNiIQVNb77Oq0dDOouRu_7FReu2Sg3Dw3EC_3Pc6SuBHxTxHnJvA2DHsfDnSKSknI7-pwt0Hw7hWD7LZ_5BVkrDVv9Py8ov9OIsKJ6FrMCHugzAyY-c-CMZNB8M_BUdb3n20Qhge3Ekk5nSf4_OgP90m0qq2ctOSQHbmsxiJQYd68rs3bVI76cpqRqOEPGwJddRbj9ARvQzsB0gxhHeNJXeEGDN8XltPG_PZM_Pk8c74NKXSd0Ak5RnYltuwW5E7qWLi6b-1Fd7bfmmchBFtJVsoqVo0qZSJc%3D)_
---
[**ADD YOUR NAME**](http://links.jasonforvirginia.com/u/click?_t=b7c680598d5648c3aaffcf8cea32abf4&_m=c3c9353f659241069d78a8d31d920e82&_e=aBYqYE08l5KpQa2jCIUhlkAuBcgrVdhh2SEC5L6IlIrzfDSI0iJZuobVwZ09zR4PHZ07rc4S-JhNiIQVNb77Oq0dDOouRu_7FReu2Sg3Dw3EC_3Pc6SuBHxTxHnJvA2DHsfDnSKSknI7-pwt0Hw7hWD7LZ_5BVkrDVv9Py8ov9OIsKJ6FrMCHugzAyY-c-CMZNB8M_BUdb3n20Qhge3Eklq_JmkJtulKiVF9mb0b82h7KzIdtpNmiiUorObmpMC3qAH5ayzZrQ1JRiUxVWSAjpwii0LIHdHsaIlGnRBJ85URnfi9KBMJDFgj-LDIkMn-rpB6sJZ0zbboMwFYJfHNlmPOHecu_QXhYIGsd51HYdM%3D)

clean_body: the American people deserve to know if houses of worship are being infiltrated. | | | Friend, 19 other attorneys general joined me in sending a letter to FBI Director Wray and AG Garland over a leaked FBI memo from the Richmond field office. They targeted Catholics as a potential threat due to their religious beliefs. In , we demanded a full explanation of the document’s origin, documents related to the implementation, information about how this document has already affected the Commonwealth’s Catholic population, and whether the FBI is infiltrating houses of worship. Friend, Virginia is the birthplace of religious freedom and has a long history of protecting the inalienable right to live your faith, free from government interference or intimidation. The leaked memo from the Richmond FBI field office is unacceptable, unconstitutional, and un-American.And, frankly, it’s what I would expect from Communist Cuba. As your attorney general, I’m defending religious freedom, the backbone of our nation and the bedrock of our Constitution. | | Thank you,Jason Miyares | | | | | | A Personal Note from Jason: 50 years ago, my mother escaped Cuba and Fidel Castro’s socialist regime with just the clothes on her back. By the grace of God, she overcame unimaginable odds to become an American. Because of her courage, I went to school, became a prosecutor, served in the Virginia House of Delegates, and made history by becoming Virginia’s first Latino-American Attorney General. Now, the radical socialist ideas my mother escaped in Cuba are uprooting our laws and freedoms, but I will never stop fighting to protect the American Dream.
