[Please give a crucial $10, $25, $50, $100, or more IMMEDIATELY to fully fund my two critical, class action lawsuits and hard-hitting legal actions to FREE ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS!](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f1fe45cb26bb4790817069303fc0d73b&_e=FDPSnJr8-f_hAccyYeZ6kizKzPdRQacvgG2qyZWpJg2gM6WmIBjqFrb7b6v-qmpYz8lx7W08xnUzqa7SFpiNeCRFDuJZuu1yTyTW1bhs-bHMQ1RNfh7tXWup4XuDupd6v0UnlHt2ovZnPwq18ix0PBgrBqyVnO6VhdeAi7-Rf4J2Ftd7RwfrYNr0Ja5EAbaN4yi1XYOfr5iwogRUClsvO0scz6Fzm_Q-JrcdHer_bWH53B9BsTXcreMeymUsmAN4F6Jf8dM2chV3gsp8y1XupEVMcp08NC6ny8HCyw9PG4RM20xlAWh1IhYvBKyuToKk)

I just read the urgent letter signed by 34 innocent Americans, jailed in Washington, D.C for peacefully protesting the stolen 2020 presidential election.

**Patriot, what 's being done to them is so demonic, so foul, that they're BEGGING to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba...where vicious, America-hating terrorists get better treatment!**

I'm heartsick and deeply angry about what's being done to our fellow patriots.

Their letter reads like an appeal from dissidents in the Soviet Union.

Here are just a few examples of what they're enduring (I quote directly from their letter, published by Gateway Pundit):

* Begging for Help / Water / Medical Aid / Mercy through a 4-inch by 10-inch window of cold metal doors
* No visits from family, friends, lawyers, or clergy
* No Mass or Sunday worship service
* Laundry returning with brown stains, pubic hair, and or reeking of ripe urine
* Broken toilets that either wont flush or repeatedly explode in Cells
* Stuck in Cells for 9 days without a shower
* Solitary Confinement for 25 1⁄2 hours or more at a time

Outrageously, there's more.

**Guards deny them hot water and keep them from attending court. They severely beat, mace, harass, insult, and even sexually assault them.**

Their food is so disgusting and so low in nutrition, that some prisoners are losing their eyesight, their hair, and getting scurvy (from Vitamin C deficiency).

There's much, much more...all of it horrifying.

And this has been going on for up to a year and a half...in AMERICA.

**They conclude their letter by pleading to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba, where the Taliban, al-Qaeda, and ISIS terrorists get better treatment!**

This can't go on. I won't allow it.

I'm Larry Klayman, the founder ofstrong Judicial Watch and founder and General Counsel of Freedom Watch.

I'm a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who's fought for the American people for 45 years.

You've seen me on cable news outlets and heard me on radio talk shows. I'm proud to say I am the first lawyer to EVER obtain a court ruling that an American president committed a crime when I won my case against Bill Clinton.

I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers to IMPEACH criminal Bill Clinton.

And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

Not to mention that I also enjoined Obama's corrupt NSA from mass surveillance on hundreds of millions of Americans and killed Obama's illegal amnesty for over 5 million illegal aliens, a case that went all the way to the Supreme Court!

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents - AND WIN!**

And now I'm pursuing two class action lawsuits and other important legal actions to get justice for the January 6 Protesters and take on Joe Biden's rotten regime in court.

**Nobody else is doing what I 'm doing in court to get justice for these poor people.**

Patriot, please say a pray for the January 6 Prisoners. Their temptation to despair, to give up, must be enormous.

[Then I beg you to help me fight for them with your very best gift now of $10, $25, $50, $100, or even more. If you've given before, please give again. If you can, give more than you've ever given to Freedom Watch.](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f1fe45cb26bb4790817069303fc0d73b&_e=FDPSnJr8-f_hAccyYeZ6kizKzPdRQacvgG2qyZWpJg2gM6WmIBjqFrb7b6v-qmpYz8lx7W08xnUzqa7SFpiNeCRFDuJZuu1yTyTW1bhs-bHMQ1RNfh7tXWup4XuDupd6v0UnlHt2ovZnPwq18ix0PBgrBqyVnO6VhdeAi7-Rf4K1zfBiYVypTyhNDe_PNkx6zkhFHRt7Tn9Oh5Yxy19oHjjIhz5ijU5t60OmQtfLdWVuvs8WUftxd4J-9GQsNRYjsuIjz4FupWccN_aSzxaEex7tZZE4uDbe0vshW5TXc8ntjFvZhT3rHzpWLMSCQulc)

I can't do it without you, Patriot.

Thank you for doing whatever you can now.

Sincerely,

Larry Klayman
Founder of both Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch
Current Chairman and General Counsel of Freedom Watch, Inc.

P.S. Patriot, I'm heartbroken after reading that powerful letter from our fellow patriots who are rotting in jail in Washington, D.C. **These are innocent men and women, tortured and abused like they were political prisoners in a Third World dictatorship!**

[Please give what you can right now to help me fight to set them free. $5, $10, $25, $50, even more...whatever you can spare at this very moment. Each dollar counts.](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f1fe45cb26bb4790817069303fc0d73b&_e=FDPSnJr8-f_hAccyYeZ6kizKzPdRQacvgG2qyZWpJg2gM6WmIBjqFrb7b6v-qmpYz8lx7W08xnUzqa7SFpiNeCRFDuJZuu1yTyTW1bhs-bHMQ1RNfh7tXWup4XuDupd6v0UnlHt2ovZnPwq18ix0PBgrBqyVnO6VhdeAi7-Rf4KNwWzjdrQwmwYRRBmkAt6YBByKGL_-hkcw8TQzws3ZwXx6KwRfZvyNvwtt7SzqFxmLyjsZ3N3JTWTSdOJIKyN8qbYi8F76vgrmNxPwnv0Ne4HcHGflaQjMUS_2gb05hT046BhvhcDejs-2ogJ_9eJD)

**Free the January 6 Protestors!
**
Right now, un-American politicians and corrupt members of the Department of Justice are keeping innocent Americans in jail without due process...they're often abused and beaten...they're blocked from seeing their wives and children...and kept from seeing their lawyers and clergy!

At least one January 6 protestor has already died.

And another protester, a patriot grandma with cancer, just finished serving 60 days in federal prison for a crime she didn't commit.

[But there's something you can do about it ...you can donate immediately to Freedom Watch's critically important lawsuit to HELP FREE the rest of these persecuted patriots with your crucial gift today.](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f1fe45cb26bb4790817069303fc0d73b&_e=FDPSnJr8-f_hAccyYeZ6kizKzPdRQacvgG2qyZWpJg2gM6WmIBjqFrb7b6v-qmpYz8lx7W08xnUzqa7SFpiNeCRFDuJZuu1yTyTW1bhs-bHMQ1RNfh7tXWup4XuDupd6v0UnlHt2ovZnPwq18ix0PBgrBqyVnO6VhdeAi7-Rf4JgNth6Ytd95Wn8-bQn_7issqEqIYVPooF8PcZLRaEQXk5ccGNBr2lksVS5z87omwXUa_CTkR9R3VTvJ7aqmmEOPqsjkjhYhh7FFVV6TUzvWCSRgQZn-qv5G-C90J8PW9NW9WqUjSk14Rj704v3X1xR)

Peter,

We are officially at the halfway point before it's time to file our _first_ FEC quarterly-campaign finance report of the 118th Congress!

Now that we're in the fight to take back the House in 2024, it's important we kick our fundraising efforts into high gear to meet deadlines like this one.

We'd like to bring in 150 grassroots donors before midnight TONIGHT to prove the strength of our campaign. And with your support, I know we can get there!

Look, I'll never stop fighting for you on Capitol Hill. But with Republicans' new – but narrow – majority in the House, we've got our work cut out for us for the next year. So that's why I'm asking: **Will you consider chipping in $5, $10, or whatever you can, to support my efforts in Congress?[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kilmer-q1-2023](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58779065/392208343/-1919651591?refcode=em23_230215_mm2_fndd_gq_act___DK_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230215_mm2_fndd_gq_act___DK_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzNzUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODFkZTI4NDAtODdhZC1lZDExLTk5NGQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=r3ZeUeGOLI_MA7lyYyundNx5dCBx1Q7d183b66-ZZZk=)**

Thanks for all that you do! It's an honor to represent you,

Derek

name: Josh Shapiro
subject: real freedom
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SHAPIRO FOR PENNSYLVANIA
body:
When I was sworn in almost one month ago, I talked about something critical to who we are as Pennsylvanians: real freedom.

Derek, when I was sworn in almost one month ago, I talked about something critical to who we are as Pennsylvanians: **real freedom.**

Real freedom means being respected no matter who you are, what you look like, who you love, where you come from or who you pray to.

Real freedom means our kids can both be safe and feel safe.

Real freedom means our air and water is clean, our communities are healthy and our economy is strong.

Real freedom means your fundamental rights are protected, everyone gets a shot to get ahead and no one gets left behind.

Real freedom is what I’m fighting for every day as Governor – because real freedom is what Pennsylvanians deserve.

**[As we approach the one month anniversary of my swearing in, I hope you’ll chip in to help me keep up the fight for real freedom. clean_body: When I was sworn in almost one month ago, I talked about something critical to who we are as Pennsylvanians: real freedom. Derek, when I was sworn in almost one month ago, I talked about something critical to who we are as Pennsylvanians: real freedom. Real freedom means being respected no matter who you are, what you look like, who you love, where you come from or who you pray to. Real freedom means our kids can both be safe and feel safe. Real freedom means our air and water is clean, our communities are healthy and our economy is strong. Real freedom means your fundamental rights are protected, everyone gets a shot to get ahead and no one gets left behind. Real freedom is what I’m fighting for every day as Governor – because real freedom is what Pennsylvanians deserve. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | = | = | | | = | = | | | = | = Thank you, Josh Josh Shapiro Governor of Pennsylvania | | | = Text JOSH to 32210 By participating, you agree to the for recurring autodialed marketing messages from Josh Shapiro to the phone number you provide. name: Charlie Kirk, Turning Point USA
subject: Putting them on trial
body:
I am EXPOSING the College Cartel for the first time.

| | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zl0j2r4h3i70rsmpe0hjkavnom1d7ld646031c7g_rp22sh2s8i66pr3clg64p74cdh2bs)
---
Fellow Patriot, I am EXPOSING the College Cartel for the first time. _And now I want to send YOU a copy of the evidence against America's colleges and universities -- my NEW BOOK,_**The College Scam.** [**Will you claim YOUR copy of _The College Scam_ right now? All I'm asking for in exchange is a gift of ANY AMOUNT, even just a dollar, to Turning Point USA.**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z4ranbmb48hgokcfa2ikvdj68mdj8pmqp6s3ihi8_rp22sh2s8i66pr3clg64p74cdh2bs)
---
[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zpif960sitg5r7s0liakk1dsmb783h38ufo72fbo_rp22sh2s8i66pr3clg64p74cdh2bs)
---
_I was proud to share my new book,_ The College Scam,_
with President Donald Trump._
---
**I've spent 10 years leading Turning Point USA, the _BIGGEST_ and most _IMPACTFUL_ pro-America student organization with 500,000+ student activists in all 50 states.** And at Turning Point USA, I've met THOUSANDS of college students from every corner of the country -- and I've criss-crossed America to speak at HUNDREDS of colleges and universities. So I have seen firsthand how the College Cartel is BRAINWASHING an entire generation to hate our country and our freedom. _And I know that YOU have seen firsthand how their racist, sexist, Socialist ideologies have escaped college campuses and TAKEN OVER our culture, our politics, our media, our government, and our lives._ **I knew that I had to EXPOSE the College Cartel and put an END to the College Scam for good -- and that's why I wrote my NEW BOOK,_The College Scam_.** Now I want to reach as many grassroots patriots AS POSSIBLE with _The College Scam_ to learn the TRUTH about the College Cartel and their attacks on America. [**I'd like to send you a copy of my NEW BOOK,_The College Scam_ , as a special thank-you for a gift of ANY amount to Turning Point USA. Will you claim your book right now?**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zqbpfoa045hl34eubal79n79f156grs1e8jc0du8_rp22sh2s8i66pr3clg64p74cdh2bs)
---
[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zrpn1h22bbbtpo85369ghd0os6utade1dm4ktkqo_rp22sh2s8i66pr3clg64p74cdh2bs)
---
I wrote this book as an ESSENTIAL GUIDE for every patriot concerned about young people and the future of our country. When you read _The College Scam,_ you'll learn:
* my 10-point case that exposes higher education -- so YOU can be the judge

* the real reasons that administrators and professors attack American Greatness

* how the government and the education PR machine brainwashed a generation into taking on massive debt for minimal gain

**_And I want you to know -- this isn't just another book about Campus Leftists_.** Instead, it combines FRONTLINE EXPERIENCE from my 10 years criss-crossing America to speak with students ... EXTENSIVE RESEARCH into the dirty secrets of higher education (and how the government props it up!) ... and a PROSECUTOR'S INTENSITY to present my case against the College Cartel. [**Can I send you a copy of _The College Scam_ right now? All I'm asking for in exchange is a gift of ANY amount, even just a dollar, to Turning Point USA.**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zr3b34ods3aontidlasgb0icfci93vim94b06nho_rp22sh2s8i66pr3clg64p74cdh2bs) That means you'll get a copy of this exciting new book AND help support Turning Point USA's critical work to EXPOSE the Left’s college scam, DEFEAT the radical Left, and WIN the American Culture War!
---
[Get your copy](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zp14m233vscre97mgj0j04r22rl9i8r9d5cdkh9o_rp22sh2s8i66pr3clg64p74cdh2bs)
---
The College Cartel has created and spread the WORST and MOST TOXIC beliefs behind the Left's War on American Culture. And no one has exposed the FULL TRUTH of the College Scam -- until now. [**You don't want to miss it! Please claim your copy of _The College Scam_ RIGHT NOW. All I'm asking for is a gift of any amount to Turning Point USA to help cover shipping -- and support our efforts to WIN the American Culture War.**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zamsk0k24qho370ler6omaa17edp5rcc1akl3260_rp22sh2s8i66pr3clg64p74cdh2bs) Thank you for helping me EXPOSE the College Cartel and fight back against their toxic ideologies in the American Culture War!
---
Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA
---
---

---
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for 1600 Daily, [please use this preferences page](http://e.1600daily.com/prefs/9z2zl0vfpmcsd8sh8dkd926f70ddpc79g5lj6c7agb8).
625 First St #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zudie77oge2r141pscbbg33udoqmfr654orb10n8_rp22sh2s8i66pr3clg64p74cdh238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

body:
| | | **FROM THE DESK OF BEN STEIN**
---
|
---
# **Is Your Retirement At Risk?**
---
| | Rising interest rates. Skyrocketing inflation. Exploding debt. Global chaos. A looming recession. It’s no wonder Americans are becoming more and more concerned about their savings and investments. That’s why I wrote my newest report...

| **Protecting Your Retirement From Recessions & Depressions**
---
|
---
**_Lessons From My Father and The Great Depression_**
---
| | This [**FREE REPORT**](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJyFUMtuwyAQ_Bp8w4LFD3zwoambnnKomkdvFYF1jGITy9iy8vfFTtRLD0UItLszs6PBkmd5lsgMZBGZMgHFax3ZEhgIBjzlUvAki9EkAgqjzlwqVtQFSRh2yrZxPSCOjXVXHEyo77G-dVFTSq4gz0WuasnOGs5cq0RKY2TKlRSAUVs249h7Il4IbMOd5zkeUKP39ua8csZgPzwruq6ivF_EA5bxxR0RW19ra4iocsaTPVvPx-70RSBrg3LFGKdvK3UbXNL9wyatFp90g45-jmhdQGsX0DJNaZFyCiB56E1j9-1v06AxzP7hL9gOjZ26gF03Pptadb2yF_fXYzSUpp9t21qf5SHNy5rmEl6gtLa-lyTfEIDGGh--NSeYRnFUh8NuuFN3utL39AiXZQiv4R3vPf4inyIxPswAyasfX3OV2w) shows YOU how you could protect your retirement savings before it’s too late.

It reveals...
---
* Two critical lessons from my late father and economist, Herbert Stein.
* How everyday Americans are ruining their retirements (and how they could stop the bleeding).
* The time-tested strategies my father and I have have both used to battle recessions and depressions.
* Plus, so much more!

name: Jason Crow for Congress
subject: Kevin McCarthy’s America →
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jason Crow for Congress
body:
|
#
---
Team — In a desperate attempt to showcase Republican unity, Kevin McCarthy recently rolled out his “Commitment to America.” It’s meant to detail the GOP’s platform with McCarthy as their speaker. **Spoiler alert: It’s a whole lot of nothing.** We could run through the “commitments” McCarthy made, but we thought it would be easier to run through everything he _didn’t_ mention. Kevin McCarthy isn’t committed to defending reproductive rights. Kevin McCarthy isn’t committed to protecting the right to vote. Kevin McCarthy isn’t committed to uncovering the truth about the January 6 riots and the former administration’s role in inciting the insurrection. Kevin McCarthy isn’t committed to taking weapons of war off of our streets or banning assault weapons. Kevin McCarthy isn’t committed to defending our democracy. Kevin McCarthy isn’t committed to standing up to conspiracy and lies — including those from his own party like Marjorie Taylor Greene and George Santos. ...And that’s just scratching the surface. It seems like the only thing Kevin McCarthy _is_ committed to doing is putting politics over people. If this first month is an indication for the next 2 years, we’ll need to keep up our fight. [**Jason is on the front lines to deliver results for Coloradans. clean_body: | Team — In a desperate attempt to showcase Republican unity, Kevin McCarthy recently rolled out his “Commitment to America.” It’s meant to detail the GOP’s platform with McCarthy as their speaker. Spoiler alert: It’s a whole lot of nothing. We could run through the “commitments” McCarthy made, but we thought it would be easier to run through everything he didn’t mention. Kevin McCarthy isn’t committed to defending reproductive rights. Kevin McCarthy isn’t committed to protecting the right to vote. Kevin McCarthy isn’t committed to uncovering the truth about the January 6 riots and the former administration’s role in inciting the insurrection. Kevin McCarthy isn’t committed to taking weapons of war off of our streets or banning assault weapons. Kevin McCarthy isn’t committed to defending our democracy. Kevin McCarthy isn’t committed to standing up to conspiracy and lies — including those from his own party like Marjorie Taylor Greene and George Santos. ...And that’s just scratching the surface. It seems like the only thing Kevin McCarthy is committed to doing is putting politics over people. subject: Expose the College Cartel
body:
I am EXPOSING the College Cartel for the first time.

| | | [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zltqevsu4lcbrj1r6473v9ing0hcur94p34uv18o_rp22sh2s8i66pr3clg6co72c9h2bs)

Fellow Patriot, I am EXPOSING the College Cartel for the first time. _And now I want to send YOU a copy of the evidence against America's colleges and universities -- my NEW BOOK,_**The College Scam.** [**Will you claim YOUR copy of _The College Scam_ right now? All I'm asking for in exchange is a gift of ANY AMOUNT, even just a dollar, to Turning Point USA.**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z0b62cnip8cvjg6ulbt287vf946978i7umdt4gfg_rp22sh2s8i66pr3clg6co72c9h2bs)

---
_I was proud to share my new book,_ The College Scam,_
with President Donald Trump._
---
**I've spent 10 years leading Turning Point USA, the _BIGGEST_ and most _IMPACTFUL_ pro-America student organization with 500,000+ student activists in all 50 states.** And at Turning Point USA, I've met THOUSANDS of college students from every corner of the country -- and I've criss-crossed America to speak at HUNDREDS of colleges and universities. So I have seen firsthand how the College Cartel is BRAINWASHING an entire generation to hate our country and our freedom. _And I know that YOU have seen firsthand how their racist, sexist, Socialist ideologies have escaped college campuses and TAKEN OVER our culture, our politics, our media, our government, and our lives._ **I knew that I had to EXPOSE the College Cartel and put an END to the College Scam for good -- and that's why I wrote my NEW BOOK,_The College Scam_.** Now I want to reach as many grassroots patriots AS POSSIBLE with _The College Scam_ to learn the TRUTH about the College Cartel and their attacks on America. [**I'd like to send you a copy of my NEW BOOK,_The College Scam_ , as a special thank-you for a gift of ANY amount to Turning Point USA. Will you claim your book right now?**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zlsa2seph9kjtiqrk00k4vifvfujg5mdml8a8pi0_rp22sh2s8i66pr3clg6co72c9h2bs)

[](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zkiev0aockcr8k3fv3rnptgsei84tlc4k0iq69uo_rp22sh2s8i66pr3clg6co72c9h2bs)
---
I wrote this book as an ESSENTIAL GUIDE for every patriot concerned about young people and the future of our country. When you read _The College Scam,_ you'll learn:
* my 10-point case that exposes higher education -- so YOU can be the judge

* the real reasons that administrators and professors attack American Greatness

* how the government and the education PR machine brainwashed a generation into taking on massive debt for minimal gain

**_And I want you to know -- this isn't just another book about Campus Leftists_.** Instead, it combines FRONTLINE EXPERIENCE from my 10 years criss-crossing America to speak with students ... EXTENSIVE RESEARCH into the dirty secrets of higher education (and how the government props it up!) ... and a PROSECUTOR'S INTENSITY to present my case against the College Cartel. [**Can I send you a copy of _The College Scam_ right now? All I'm asking for in exchange is a gift of ANY amount, even just a dollar, to Turning Point USA.**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zimfnv8fm63cqg1kr50qf9k46qq7l6kuflpjv750_rp22sh2s8i66pr3clg6co72c9h2bs) That means you'll get a copy of this exciting new book AND help support Turning Point USA's critical work to EXPOSE the Left’s college scam, DEFEAT the radical Left, and WIN the American Culture War!

The College Cartel has created and spread the WORST and MOST TOXIC beliefs behind the Left's War on American Culture. And no one has exposed the FULL TRUTH of the College Scam -- until now. [**You don't want to miss it! Please claim your copy of _The College Scam_ RIGHT NOW. All I'm asking for is a gift of any amount to Turning Point USA to help cover shipping -- and support our efforts to WIN the American Culture War.**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z9unsni1u5ldtkacfm0arf7uc6svku2bb7r99la0_rp22sh2s8i66pr3clg6co72c9h2bs) Thank you for helping me EXPOSE the College Cartel and fight back against their toxic ideologies in the American Culture War!

Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA

body:
| Hi there,

It’s nice to meet you! My name is Mohona, and I’m Sharice’s new campaign manager for the 2024 election.

I came to work for Sharice because she is a fighter for Kansans. She’s won her consistently tough races because she remains focused on delivering for families across Kansas and has led the charge to defend reproductive rights, lower the cost of living, fight climate change, protect marriage equality, and so much more.

In the midterms last year, Sharice won a decisive victory thanks to folks like you showing your support. We’re laying the groundwork to do it all again in 2024. **[Now, I’m asking you to join us, so I can start my first full week on the campaign off strong. subject: RSVP Today! Caffeinate and Conversate with Canepa on Feb. 18th. in SSF at Philz Coffee
body:
| | | |
---
| | | Please join me and some special guest speakers for our Caffeinate and Conversate with Canepa monthly events on Saturday, February 18 at Philz Coffee in Westborough Square in South San Francisco from 10 a.m. to noon.

This month’s topic is about mental health, a timely issue considering the mass shooting in Half Moon Bay and for those residents who were severely impacted by the devastating storms that caused significant damage from flooding, mudslides, power outages and downed trees.

We will hear about the resources the county provides related to mental health, including behavioral health counseling and learn about nonprofit advocates that help to improve mental health services throughout our county, reduce the stigma associated with mental illness and support effective treatment and recovery programs.
[**_RSVP NOW!_**](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=5fe2e6f6bd&e=c0babbc643)
[](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=90936d54e9&e=c0babbc643) In friendship, David J. Canepa
---

body:
The clock's ticking. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58785703/392213338/-1230998127?refcode=em230215-2-15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDA4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZjgwMjlkYi04Y2FkLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GHkoGwtvqHH91nMisYeoVf7nNwTqrAAVqeBgaMVQwYY=&emci=a548e3d7-3dad-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=4f8029db-8cad-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=35610790)
---
Friends — With the clock ticking down ahead of tonight's mid-month fundraising deadline, we wanted to share **three reasons** to make your first $5 contribution to Ilhan Omar today: 1️⃣. With the Republican leadership making Ilhan one of their top-priority targets this campaign cycle, **we've set some pretty ambitious fundraising goals** to make sure we have the resources required to take them on. 2️⃣. But the truth is, while we started the month strong, things have slowed down a bit. **And right now we're projecting to come up short** of where we need to be today. 3️⃣. **So we need to have a big hour** — 60 minutes where everyone gives it everything we've got — to get back on track before midnight. clean_body: The clock's ticking. | Friends — With the clock ticking down ahead of tonight's mid-month fundraising deadline, we wanted to share three reasons to make your first $5 contribution to Ilhan Omar today: 1️⃣. With the Republican leadership making Ilhan one of their top-priority targets this campaign cycle, we've set some pretty ambitious fundraising goals to make sure we have the resources required to take them on. 2️⃣. But the truth is, while we started the month strong, things have slowed down a bit. And right now we're projecting to come up short of where we need to be today. 3️⃣. So we need to have a big hour — 60 minutes where everyone gives it everything we've got — to get back on track before midnight. Our entire campaign is funded the right way — lots and lots of people chipping in small amounts. It all adds up quickly, but it's incredibly important that we keep up the pace if we're going to continue building our movement together. We wouldn't ask if it weren't so critical to everything we do, so please: = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Let's cross this finish line strong. Thank you in advance for adding anything you can. And here’s what’s even scarier: the Republican that could win this seat might be Kari Lake. Yes, that Kari Lake, the anti-abortion extremist, the woman who literally rolled out the red carpet for Donald Trump, who is still spreading lies about election integrity, and who is calling herself the “rightful Governor of Arizona” even after she lost to Governor Katie Hobbs.

Unfortunately, Kari Lake is exactly the kind of crazy that the Republican base loves. And she does better in the race than other Republicans... according to the polls, she even would do better than former Governor Doug Ducey.
In a two-way race, Democrat Ruben Gallego defeats Kari Lake. But in a three-way race with Sinema, Gallego and Lake are TIED – because Sinema is taking more votes away from the Democrat than the Republican.
****
**[Kari Lake is a danger to our democracy. But make no mistake, she’s getting ready to run for this Senate seat, and she could win.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zJ5XI6YHChR2bS-m44B_fcrYRO46p90pZyMhWSCX9mhbrpsbBaMT_JhlQeLX08w-c0E6w-Eh3lXqCNmDmLCc7RGRXNRXAds6WaQ6XYOPjsH-7VpeHSt74eS7EVxlNc8zI7t_LCOokzbdNJ_J0P7xkpPYw1PW2mgczJpLN9uWFV17k-1DYmSnFzZ3-kAtRujdavLHu19AsNCQs_nTBn6pJw80AXrKEPCMAU9AMgk3vTW89KI9oM6oUoEJOU06d8HCHbKooGZpSA_ykzCq4vg5CKUBLzNDuAR8EPvf8DrgRG_XaZ7X03lN0ZVk3FxMEM3sQ/3tq/-JCd_S1VR3yLpc6XQglQWQ/h7/8Hv-BCOJPVB0Lflz-mKJgHybp8-YFXubgzwmr2kPCtA)**
How do we know Kari Lake is thinking about running? The same way we know Kyrsten Sinema is gearing up for re-election: they’re meeting with donors, having fundraisers, and raising money.
Kari Lake was also just in Washington, DC, meeting with the National Republican Senatorial Committee – Mitch McConnell’s political arm dedicated to electing more Republican Senators.
**Arizona deserves better than either Kyrsten Sinema or Kari Lake.** That’s why our job has to be to show voters how terrible Sinema is, so that she doesn’t take too many votes from the Democratic nominee – and it’s why we must unite behind the eventual Democratic nominee so that he or she can win a three-way race.
****

clean_body: | | Peter – Our most recent poll of likely Arizona voters proved that next year’s Senate race is going to be a TIGHT one. As a surprise to no one, it showed that Kyrsten Sinema’s chances of winning are little to none. But unfortunately, Sinema is playing SPOILER in the race, taking too much support away from the Democrat and helping the Republican win. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | | And here’s what’s even scarier: the Republican that could win this seat might be Kari Lake. Yes, that Kari Lake, the anti-abortion extremist, the woman who literally rolled out the red carpet for Donald Trump, who is still spreading lies about election integrity, and who is calling herself the “rightful Governor of Arizona” even after she lost to Governor Katie Hobbs. Unfortunately, Kari Lake is exactly the kind of crazy that the Republican base loves. And she does better in the race than other Republicans... according to the polls, she even would do better than former Governor Doug Ducey. In a two-way race, Democrat Ruben Gallego defeats Kari Lake. But in a three-way race with Sinema, Gallego and Lake are TIED – because Sinema is taking more votes away from the Democrat than the Republican. ** How do we know Kari Lake is thinking about running? The same way we know Kyrsten Sinema is gearing up for re-election: they’re meeting with donors, having fundraisers, and raising money. Kari Lake was also just in Washington, DC, meeting with the National Republican Senatorial Committee – Mitch McConnell’s political arm dedicated to electing more Republican Senators. Arizona deserves better than either Kyrsten Sinema or Kari Lake. That’s why our job has to be to show voters how terrible Sinema is, so that she doesn’t take too many votes from the Democratic nominee – and it’s why we must unite behind the eventual Democratic nominee so that he or she can win a three-way race. ** -the team at Replace Sinema and Change for Arizona 2024 PAC Paid for by Change for Arizona 2024 PAC. | | Sent via . body:

[**My Video Response to Joe Biden’s Border Crisis >>>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c/33013/5558dbbc44c3f652/e2acdcdd9cd9cc25c3d6b838967d376c/33013)
Peter, Contrary to what Joe Biden and his head-in-the-sand Democrats ‘reported’ to us during the State of the Union, it doesn’t take a fancy degree to know we are being put directly into harm’s way by this White House. As fentanyl and human trafficking steal the innocence and lives of thousands, President Biden has the gall to address the American people with a smile and grin as tens of thousands more criminals mock our homeland by illegally entering America.** ** **America’s safety is no laughing matter** ...
---
[**WATCH THE VIDEO**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c/33013/5558dbbc44c3f652/dbc5351159deaa20c3d6b838967d376c/33013)
---
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c/33013/5558dbbc44c3f652/411ad909c9a6ff49c3d6b838967d376c/33013)
---
**The solution is simple: secure the border and provide the tools to get the job done.** During my border visit in October 2022, I spoke directly with the brave men and women charged and entrusted with defending our borders. Unlike talking heads and out-of-touch D.C. politicians, _I actually listened to them_. President Biden’s radical policies are a two-fold failure: shut down our economy and open up our border to lawlessness and chaos. I take my oath of office seriously, and it’s time Joe Biden does the same – I’m not _holding my breath_ for the latter to happen, but with the help of my Republican friends in Congress, and you, **we will hold him _accountable_**. **[Here’s how we’ll do it together.](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c/33013/5558dbbc44c3f652/233a1da4b0dd2424c3d6b838967d376c/33013)** – Coach Tuberville
---

name: Candace Owens
subject: The ugly truth about Black History Month
body:
The month when a bunch of people who know nothing about black history take the time to celebrate people like Frederick Douglas -- but have never read any of his works.

[](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5108a3b7e80149b680046d40befafd76&_e=RJ9VZr1inpGVGfm0uhA4xrRRIqTk0Vw3ShSdwBDdb4wtrFtVj3Ci_GiMWnRVuehV_jafP_zim8qnX5q8gxuaXs0z2KfP3Eu4I1nSGY-gfPC3MAi0_96f3kxZTYIKQeFcKfU1v0_BD_O-fgJksHYQXIk2Yzhl6S6KtBYIf5ywrFMp-v9zFEI42nacdIyn34WAHqo-tBS-cUIezz_vqKkUETcxPAGcJdSyttwoIBmGOh_bB_oW_Y0pMQJ_hbQLkeNscI4dNToQsaokyshVwVsrD78czQG_6WrCTzWDolh1IGs%3D)

Friend,

It's Black History Month. . . The month when a bunch of people who know nothing about black history take the time to celebrate people like Frederick Douglas -- but have never read any of his works.

Black History Month isn't about celebrating the Black men and women who've changed the world for the better.

It's nothing more than a way for woke radicals to push identity politics and glorify division in America.

I don't want a Black History Month, and I can't say "why" better than Morgan Freeman did:

_" You're going to relegate my history to a month? **Black history is American history.** "_

My name is Candace Owens, and I am a co-founder of the BLEXIT Foundation. One of the reasons I helped found BLEXIT was to teach REAL history to Black and minority communities.

To teach true American history -- _and not the socialist, woke version that 's pushed today_ -- I've set a goal to raise $50,000 this month.

[_**Will you join me in the push for TRUE history, Friend, by sending a gift of $10, $35, $50, or any amount? Click here to show your support >>>**_](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5108a3b7e80149b680046d40befafd76&_e=RJ9VZr1inpGVGfm0uhA4xrRRIqTk0Vw3ShSdwBDdb4wtrFtVj3Ci_GiMWnRVuehV_jafP_zim8qnX5q8gxuaXs0z2KfP3Eu4I1nSGY-gfPC3MAi0_96f3kxZTYIKQeFcKfU1v0_BD_O-fgJksHYQXELr_BuTCgGxiuy0irKOGnQmQzuK0oRccGKIzct_1ccq154dgTKeSI-asfci0PkzUmkfJtaHEZfNnIwWqbO4oKumdEqUY5b3rYF0AoAp8YUo6ioRLkhdf8JLeABr3h9HmDAzfsZlKB5ZHV4i62jEnUI%3D)

BLEXIT honors independent black voices like. . .

. . . Thomas Sowell, a well-known American conservative and is considered one of the most influential black conservatives who has authored over 40 books.

. . . Clarence Thomas, a Constitutional originalist and Associate Justice of the Supreme Court of the United States.

. . . Walter Williams, an American economist, commentator, author, and academic and former John M. Olin Distinguished Professor of Economics at George Mason University.

That's why I hope you'll join me in our effort to celebrate Black Excellence and work to build a better future for Black and minority communities. [_**Click here to send a gift of $10, $35, $50, or any amount >>>**_](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5108a3b7e80149b680046d40befafd76&_e=RJ9VZr1inpGVGfm0uhA4xrRRIqTk0Vw3ShSdwBDdb4wtrFtVj3Ci_GiMWnRVuehV_jafP_zim8qnX5q8gxuaXs0z2KfP3Eu4I1nSGY-gfPC3MAi0_96f3kxZTYIKQeFcKfU1v0_BD_O-fgJksHYQXE467d1HzHbwwSj1Vk1PuSi_kZobVpHGx-ZMUeMMRaU7PKeb-4A26KiJ6K8k3G6hApuMZmc1zXIGgJPfHsw7omCVkXE9zXSoaqO8dCJMM0Ni1EsLZZ0s_dDU_7pSGBgKza4yhK5ocNsSWFjnS-CB9f8%3D)

Here's how we're reaching Black and minority communities with American history:

**BLEXIT 's Liberation Camps** provide an American History curriculum to children in Kindergarten through 8th grade who live in low-income communities. We also teach key life skills and character development.

The children experience 18 weeks of after-school programming, six weeks of full-day summer camp programming, 25 full-day programs when schools had in-service days, and 20 parents-night-out programs and field trips.

**And through our 43 State Chapters made up of more than 14,000 volunteers! **

Our chapter members bring BLEXIT's five pillars to life through events and outreach efforts to places where no other organizations can effectively reach to combat the victimhood mentality.
1. **Advocating** for School Choice.
2. **Promoting** criminal justice reform by developing positive relationships between police and minority communities.
3. **Championing** entrepreneurship and free enterprise.
4. **Developing** history programs that will inspire minority children.

Presenting the message of BLEXIT through art and live experiences.

BLEXIT State Chapter members work within their local communities to help change the narrative that surrounds America's minority communities.

Friend, can you help us reach our goal of raising $50,000 this month? **Click below to send your support.**

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5108a3b7e80149b680046d40befafd76&_e=RJ9VZr1inpGVGfm0uhA4xrRRIqTk0Vw3ShSdwBDdb4wtrFtVj3Ci_GiMWnRVuehV_jafP_zim8qnX5q8gxuaXs0z2KfP3Eu4I1nSGY-gfPC3MAi0_96f3kxZTYIKQeFcVb_wOSM7Jjb_X0OaVbRvnSliiytoiluD5MQ5yU2AAG0Lv_wf15gImISTpXyTAY3RFPHFAu7XDPUQYsK4x-D03gLpqP8984uwvX2k9QoDOv1Oo76brr4hsuBLReZKosSbemuvqMBiDS5OwaWzol3foVsJM4z9UJK3zfY7jjjQ9t8%3D)

clean_body: The month when a bunch of people who know nothing about black history take the time to celebrate people like Frederick Douglas -- but have never read any of his works. Friend, It's Black History Month. . . The month when a bunch of people who know nothing about black history take the time to celebrate people like Frederick Douglas -- but have never read any of his works. Black History Month isn't about celebrating the Black men and women who've changed the world for the better. It's nothing more than a way for woke radicals to push identity politics and glorify division in America. I don't want a Black History Month, and I can't say "why" better than Morgan Freeman did: " You're going to relegate my history to a month? Black history is American history. " My name is Candace Owens, and I am a co-founder of the BLEXIT Foundation. One of the reasons I helped found BLEXIT was to teach REAL history to Black and minority communities. To teach true American history -- and not the socialist, woke version that 's pushed today -- I've set a goal to raise $50,000 this month. BLEXIT honors independent black voices like. . . . . . Thomas Sowell, a well-known American conservative and is considered one of the most influential black conservatives who has authored over 40 books. . . . Clarence Thomas, a Constitutional originalist and Associate Justice of the Supreme Court of the United States. . . . Walter Williams, an American economist, commentator, author, and academic and former John M. Olin Distinguished Professor of Economics at George Mason University. That's why I hope you'll join me in our effort to celebrate Black Excellence and work to build a better future for Black and minority communities. Here's how we're reaching Black and minority communities with American history: BLEXIT 's Liberation Camps provide an American History curriculum to children in Kindergarten through 8th grade who live in low-income communities. We also teach key life skills and character development. The children experience 18 weeks of after-school programming, six weeks of full-day summer camp programming, 25 full-day programs when schools had in-service days, and 20 parents-night-out programs and field trips. And through our 43 State Chapters made up of more than 14,000 volunteers! Our chapter members bring BLEXIT's five pillars to life through events and outreach efforts to places where no other organizations can effectively reach to combat the victimhood mentality. 1. Advocating for School Choice. 2. Promoting criminal justice reform by developing positive relationships between police and minority communities. 3. Championing entrepreneurship and free enterprise. 4. Developing history programs that will inspire minority children. Presenting the message of BLEXIT through art and live experiences. BLEXIT State Chapter members work within their local communities to help change the narrative that surrounds America's minority communities. Friend, can you help us reach our goal of raising $50,000 this month? Click below to send your support. Thank you, Candace Owens President BLEXIT Foundation BLEXIT is a 501(c)3 tax-exempt organization. All contributions are tax-deductible to the extent provided by law. Sent to Conservative Liberty Wire subscribers. 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: =?utf-8?Q?Chairman=20Caleb=20Heimlich?=
subject: Expanding Local Leadership
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Washington State Republican Party
body:
Campaigns that we helped in 2021 had a remarkable 75% win rate - leading to local conservative leaders in cities and counties across Washington State

http://wsrp.org
Ballots Are Out, Vote By November 2nd!

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=WeGlgXqOx-Y

With ballots out, now is the perfect time to get out there and volunteer on a conservative campaign. Every door you knock on in these local races matter a lot and the results of this election year will be used as a bellwether for the 2022 midterms.

We are also hosting another WSRP Statewide Day Of Action on Saturday, October 30th! Bring a friend or neighbor to volunteer for a few hours to help local conservatives win in November! Sign up here to join our Statewide Day Of Action! (https://form.jotform.com/212737084845058)
State Sen. Gildon On Vaccine Mandates
https://soundcloud.com/user-450836972/wagop-report-state-sen-chris-gildon-on-vaccine-mandates-and-democrat-anti-policing-laws
State Senator Chris Gildon (R - Puyallup) joins the podcast this week to discuss vaccine mandates, anti-policing laws, the Long-Term Care Tax, and how he got his start in politics. WAGOP is now on Apple Podcasts and Spotify, follow us and never miss an episode! Listen here. (https://soundcloud.com/user-450836972/wagop-report-state-sen-chris-gildon-on-vaccine-mandates-and-democrat-anti-policing-laws)
Republican Leaders Fight Inslee's Mandate
Thanks to our Republican leaders in the State House and Senate for fighting back and offering a strong rebuke of Inslee's harmful vaccine mandate. Below is an excerpt of their most recent statement to the press:

“We are already experiencing higher prices and empty shelves partially as a result of COVID's shutdowns and workforce shortages. Today's deadline, with its unnecessarily hardline consequences, will only make that worse when hundreds, if not thousands, lose their jobs and are denied unemployment benefits. It also threatens public safety by reducing our police forces at a time when crime is already rising. People feel unsafe. They are afraid of what criminals will do when there are even fewer law enforcement officers to respond. And they are worried about people's chances of survival if there aren't enough first responders to help in an emergency. The governor underestimates the potential impact of his actions.

“Coercion, intimidation, threats and public shaming are not tactics a leader should be using against the people. The governor's obvious disdain for those who are choosing to lose their jobs rather than compromise their right to make their own medical decisions is unhelpful. He is dividing the public – segregating us and turning people against each other. Yesterday, even unvaccinated health-care workers were heroes. Today, they become villains in the governor's narrative."

Read the full statement. (https://jtwilcox.houserepublicans.wa.gov/2021/10/18/republican-leaders-todays-vaccine-deadline-threatens-critical-services-public-safety/?fbclid=IwAR3WxI9H29hbbmfbZhdkDS9QjqdVd2TIRCdjNjUkUlLdeThtbUjK_WBWJuw)
Smiley Campaign Shows Grassroots Support In Latest Fundraising Quarter
Tiffany Smiley is fighting hard to retire Patty Murray and her latest fundraising numbers show not only has Tiffany raised more than $1.6 million but she also has unequivocal grassroots support, with over 10,000 donors from Washington State. Flipping a U.S. Senate seat is hard work but Tiffany has shown in the only 5 months since starting her campaign, that she is a force to be reckoned with. Learn more about how Tiffany stands on the issues here (https://www.smileyforwashington.com/issues) .
Contact:
Steve Johnson
Communications Director
Washington State Republican Party
(425) 460-0570
steve@wsrp.org (mailto:steve@wsrp.org)

Flipping a U.S. Senate seat is hard work but Tiffany has shown in the only 5 months since starting her campaign, that she is a force to be reckoned with. Learn more about how Tiffany stands on the issues here () . Contact: Steve Johnson Communications Director Washington State Republican Party (425) 460-0570 steve@wsrp.org (mailto:steve@wsrp.org) ============================================================

name: Britney VanCitters
subject: FWD: RSVP Today for OLCV/OCN Virtual Lobby Day(s)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Oregon League of Conservation Voters
body:
| | | Hi Peter, We are so excited for our upcoming **[virtual lobby days from March 21st to 23rd!](https://click.everyaction.com/k/58767967/392178974/-462272089?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjcwZTMxMjliLTY5YWQtZWQxMS05OTRkLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=VgEZMn1k0GgX-rc-0rQT9naNKZne5twTZZXmuMb3-5g=&emci=698cae45-67ad-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=70e3129b-69ad-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=2107230)** It makes a big difference when lawmakers see the incredible support for this year’s top environmental and climate priorities. And it’s fun! **[I hope you will join us and sign up today for OLCV/OCN Virtual Lobby Days!](https://click.everyaction.com/k/58767968/392178975/-462272089?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjcwZTMxMjliLTY5YWQtZWQxMS05OTRkLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=VgEZMn1k0GgX-rc-0rQT9naNKZne5twTZZXmuMb3-5g=&emci=698cae45-67ad-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=70e3129b-69ad-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=2107230)** The Clean Green Lobby Machine is powered by people like you who believe we need to protect our environment and our climate. If you have any questions about this year’s lobby days, you can email me directly at [Britney@olcv.org](mailto:britney@olcv.org). Thanks for all you do! Britney VanCitters, OLCV Organizing Manager Dear Peter, From March 21st to 23rd, Oregon’s environmental community is going to make a big, virtual splash! The legislative session is heating up, and that means it’s time for us to gather (virtually) and meet with Oregon lawmakers! [Can you join us?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/58767969/392178976/-462272089?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjcwZTMxMjliLTY5YWQtZWQxMS05OTRkLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=VgEZMn1k0GgX-rc-0rQT9naNKZne5twTZZXmuMb3-5g=&emci=698cae45-67ad-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=70e3129b-69ad-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=2107230) The Clean Green Lobby Machine is back, with just a few changes this year. But a few things won’t change. You will still get a chance to meet with your lawmakers. You will be able to tell your story and urge decision-makers to prioritize the environment and climate change this legislative session. And, it will be a great time with your fellow environmental and climate advocates! What’s different? Rather than an entire day on Zoom, we are breaking it up over three days. We hope this will reduce the Zoom fatigue, and increase the effectiveness and fun! **OLCV/OCN Virtual Lobby Days – March 21st to 23rd**
The Virtual Clean Green Lobby Machine Returns (via Zoom) to Support 2023 Priorities for a Healthy Oregon
**Tuesday, March 21st, from 6pm-8pm **
Priority Presentations & Training (all participants)
**Wednesday, March 22nd, hold from 9am-5pm**
Lobby Meetings for SDs 1-16
**Thursday, March 23rd, hold from 9am-5pm**
Lobby Meetings for SDs 17-30
[You can look up your senate district (SD) here](https://click.everyaction.com/k/58767970/392178977/1765198759?appid=fd070b56c975456ea2a25f7e3f4289d1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjcwZTMxMjliLTY5YWQtZWQxMS05OTRkLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=VgEZMn1k0GgX-rc-0rQT9naNKZne5twTZZXmuMb3-5g=&emci=698cae45-67ad-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=70e3129b-69ad-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=2107230)
Place: Entirely on Zoom (links sent to RSVPs a few days prior)
[**RSVP today!**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/58767971/392178978/-462272089?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjcwZTMxMjliLTY5YWQtZWQxMS05OTRkLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=VgEZMn1k0GgX-rc-0rQT9naNKZne5twTZZXmuMb3-5g=&emci=698cae45-67ad-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=70e3129b-69ad-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=2107230) On March 21st, we will kick it off with an evening training and presentations on all our priorities. Then, your lobby day meetings will be held either on March 22nd or March 23rd, depending on where you live. You should plan to hold the entire lobby day you are assigned since we don’t know yet the time of your meetings. However, it will end up only requiring two one-hour blocks of time. **[We are starting to schedule your legislator meetings now so RSVP today!](https://click.everyaction.com/k/58767972/392178979/-462272089?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjcwZTMxMjliLTY5YWQtZWQxMS05OTRkLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=VgEZMn1k0GgX-rc-0rQT9naNKZne5twTZZXmuMb3-5g=&emci=698cae45-67ad-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=70e3129b-69ad-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=2107230)** At the Oregon League of Conservation Voters (OLCV) and Oregon Conservation Network (OCN) lobby days, we will advocate for the top environmental priorities facing lawmakers in Salem right now: Building Resilience (healthy and climate-friendly homes and buildings), carbon sequestration on forested and agricultural lands, a moratorium on new and expanded factory farms, better protections from toxic chemicals, reducing plastic pollution, and ensuring necessary funding for our natural resource agencies. We will also be a voice to stop some bad environmental bills from passing! For the safety of all involved and because of construction at the Capitol, the entirety of the OLCV/OCN Lobby Day will be held virtually over Zoom. We are committed to always trying to make our lobby day as effective and enjoyable as we can. So, we hope the new approach of spreading it out over three days will make it even more accessible for you to join us. We didn’t let the pandemic stop the return of the Clean Green Lobby Machine, and we won’t let Capitol construction stop it either! **[RSVP today for the OLCV/OCN Virtual Lobby Days on March 21st to 23rd!](https://click.everyaction.com/k/58767973/392178980/-462272089?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjcwZTMxMjliLTY5YWQtZWQxMS05OTRkLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=VgEZMn1k0GgX-rc-0rQT9naNKZne5twTZZXmuMb3-5g=&emci=698cae45-67ad-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=70e3129b-69ad-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=2107230)** Sincerely, Julia DeGraw
Coalition Director, OLCV | |
---|---|---

name: 2A Task Force
subject: The fight isn’t over. The fight has only just begun.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by 2nd Amendment Task Force [2ataskforce
body:
| |
---
|
---
| | Friend, **The fight isn’t over. The fight has only just begun. ** As we welcome the Republican controlled house, we undertake an era of divided government. The Democratic rule is officially over, and house Republicans have promised to hold the out-of-touch Democrats accountable by launching major investigations. YET, this won’t stop the Democratic-controlled Senate from taking advantage of their majority and passing restrictive gun bills that harm law-abiding gun owners like **YOU** – as they continue to do nothing to prevent the rising crime rates facing our major cities.
---

This is why 2A Task Force was created, to protect our constitutional rights and to stop the Democrats that are hell-bent on taking away our freedoms. The Second Amendment ensures that we can keep our communities and the ones we love safe from harm, but also protects us from tyrants using the power of government to take away our liberties. There are now actual checks and balances, but it's not an excuse to **STOP** building an army of 2A Task Force warriors, who are devoted to ensuring that Senate Democrats fail to disarm American citizens. What do you say, Friend? Join the fight and support 2A Task Force.

name: Katie Porter
subject: Valentine's Day & a story about waffles
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=17760%2E3422442%2E59792h)
However you celebrated, I hope you had a happy Valentine’s Day!
As my kids have gotten older, they’ve taken on the responsibility of doing something special for me on holidays (yes, they’re the best). **And growing up in a single parent household, that often means their thoughtful gestures happen with little adult oversight.**
One of my favorite memories is of them making me homemade waffles.
Now, you might look at this picture and think they forgot the non-stick spray. But in fact, this is what happens when you mistakenly put pancake batter in a waffle maker.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230215-1?refcode=em20230215-1&refcode2=17760_3422442_59792h&akid=17760%2E3422442%2E59792h)
Nonetheless, I so appreciated their attempt at making me breakfast. And a valuable life lesson about reading the fine print was learned!
Happy (belated) Valentine’s Day,
Katie Porter
**[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230215-1?refcode=em20230215-1&refcode2=17760_3422442_59792h&akid=17760%2E3422442%2E59792h)**

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=EMAF15_1_VAL_20230215_V1_F&t=2&refcode2=17760_3422442_59792h&akid=17760%2E3422442%2E59792h)**
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-kp4s-emails/?t=3&akid=17760%2E3422442%2E59792h)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kp4s-em-update-info-footer)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/unsubscribe/kp4s-unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=17760%2E3422442%2E59792h)

To give by check:
Katie Porter for Senate
PO Box 5176
Irvine, CA 92616
Email us: [info@katieporter.com](mailto:info@katieporter.com)
Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
clean_body: However you celebrated, I hope you had a happy Valentine’s Day! As my kids have gotten older, they’ve taken on the responsibility of doing something special for me on holidays (yes, they’re the best). And growing up in a single parent household, that often means their thoughtful gestures happen with little adult oversight. One of my favorite memories is of them making me homemade waffles. Now, you might look at this picture and think they forgot the non-stick spray. But in fact, this is what happens when you mistakenly put pancake batter in a waffle maker. Nonetheless, I so appreciated their attempt at making me breakfast. And a valuable life lesson about reading the fine print was learned! Happy (belated) Valentine’s Day, Katie Porter Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma.

**Team -- In just two years, President Biden has accomplished what some presidents could only dream of doing in _two terms!_**

From passing the most comprehensive gun safety legislation in decades to confirming Justice Ketanji Brown Jackson as the first Black woman on the Supreme Court, the Biden administration and our Democratic Senate have set us on a _historic_ path forward -- and the American people are taking notice.

But, Republicans are going all-in to attack President Biden and paint a very different picture. They want to distract from our huge wins -- and we can't let that happen.

That’s why we’re asking top Democrats like you to show your support and weigh in on President Biden’s first term so far -- _but our URGENT poll closes at midnight, and your input is missing._ **Please, answer now:**

name: =?utf-8?Q?Leon=20Benjamin?=
subject: The Individuals With Disabilities Education Act
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Friends of Leon Benjamin, Inc
body:
Protecting our most vulnerable students has always been a priority. | | | |
---
| | |
#### For Immediate Release:
---
|
---
| The Individuals with Disabilities Education Act
---
| **FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE: THURSDAY, FEBRUARY 14, 2023**

Waverly Woods
Campaign Manager
_info@Benjamin4Congress.com_
804-352-3348

**Richmond, VA** \- Leon Benjamin is a proud proponent of The Individuals with Disabilities Education Act.

"IDEA" is a civil rights law that was created by Congress to protect students with disabilities and their families, not exploit them for financial gain.

Leon was disappointed to know that in Hampton, Virginia, a case is being waged against Hampton City Schools regarding the unfair treatment of a child with disabilities.

This lawsuit is part of a much bigger lawsuit being waged in Fairfax County Public Schools for similar reasons.

Leon Benjamin said in a statement on Tuesday:

"As your next Congressman, I will fight to hold School Administrators accountable to the law.

The allegations in this lawsuit are shocking to the conscience and require immediate action by the Virginia Department of Education, the US Attorney General, and the Virginia State Bar.

Families of students with disabilities are entitled to a fair process and a good education. The national average for services provided to students with individualized education plans (IEP) is 30%, while the average in Virginia is only 3%.

Under no circumstances should we allow violations of the due process safeguards in terms of special education. We need to stop the violations of parental rights and demand a fair system that improves educational outcomes.

I encourage parents, politicians, and other community leaders to demand an investigation by the US Attorney general and remove profit-driven attorneys with questionable ethics from representing this case.

We need to do better for our children, and I plan on doing that as the next Congressman for the 4th District."

###
---
| Paid for and Authorized by Friends of Leon Benjamin, Inc.

|
---

clean_body: Democrats only need to flip 5 seats from red to blue to win back the House - but Republicans are also planning on targeting toss-up seats like mine to flip them from blue to red. | = | Peter, Over the past few months, I’ve been extremely vocal about why we need to take back the House from MAGA extremists like Marjorie Taylor Greene (and enablers like Kevin McCarthy). And today, I want to talk about how we’re going to do it. Democrats only need to flip 5 seats from red to blue to win back the House - but Republicans are also planning on targeting toss-up seats like mine to flip them from blue to red. In order to win back the House, we have to have a two-prong approach: 1. Protect our firewall aka save our democratic toss-up seats 2. Expand our battlefield aka flip 5 Republican seats Both are going to be very difficult, but if we stay focused on those goals, I feel confident we can pry back the gavel from Kevin McCarthy. = = If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your payment will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = ---|--- = | = ---|--- Every single House seat is up for grabs again next year, but the truth is - there are only a handful of competitive races that are going to decide this election and mine is one of them! With Trump on the ballot, Republicans are laser-focused on flipping seats like mine red in order to keep their grip on the House Majority. I refuse to let them win. = We can do this! \- Josh *

name: Fight for Progress
subject: 🚨Senate Poll Alert
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fight for Progress PAC and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee
body:

_Original message from Executive Director Brett Broesder:_

America is in crisis.

Last night, on the eve of the fifth anniversary of the Parkland school shooting, we got news of yet another mass shooting, this time on the Michigan State University campus.

There are so many mass shootings in our country that it is far too easy to become numb to them, to shut out the pain that so many families face. And it's not just mass shootings. **On average, more than 100 Americans are killed with guns every single day.**

[We need action. I’m asking that you join President Biden in calling for Congress to BAN assault weapons. Sign on now:](https://click.everyaction.com/k/58769225/392186555/-166758528?source=DS_EM_PT_90DO_230215_1_2&refcode2=521bf86c-6dad-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&contactdata=Qp+MNmcXR2iZS2gxJ8VNixv+7+DQpzowd9cCg5gdL22NeylrNDZvzrZpP8ffzzqO8BnPK1ek2TLoMMuxODhUlA==&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkwNzg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjUyMWJmODZjLTZkYWQtZWQxMS05OTRkLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=TA_4Bv9BYndSxu3_Dx2CTqcRiI70AqGMuCBCgyD0B8Y=&emci=82e8b8a5-48ad-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=521bf86c-6dad-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=10067282)

At Democrats Serve, we recruit, support, and train the public service professionals who experience first-hand the impacts of our gun violence crisis — from the teachers whose lives are endangered in school shootings to the first responders who walk into homes where gun violence has just happened to the counselors who help families cope with the aftermath.

We must not become numb. We must work together to keep our communities safe from gun violence.

[Let’s start by reinstating the Assault Weapons Ban that would eliminate the weapons of war that were used at Parkland, Uvalde, and too many other mass shootings to count.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/58769228/392186557/-166758528?source=DS_EM_PT_90DO_230215_1_2&refcode2=521bf86c-6dad-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&contactdata=Qp+MNmcXR2iZS2gxJ8VNixv+7+DQpzowd9cCg5gdL22NeylrNDZvzrZpP8ffzzqO8BnPK1ek2TLoMMuxODhUlA==&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkwNzg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjUyMWJmODZjLTZkYWQtZWQxMS05OTRkLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=TA_4Bv9BYndSxu3_Dx2CTqcRiI70AqGMuCBCgyD0B8Y=&emci=82e8b8a5-48ad-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=521bf86c-6dad-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=10067282)

Democratic candidates with professional experience serving their communities in government have a pragmatic approach to governing and know how to get things done, making for strong narratives and an ability to connect with voters uniquely.

However, when running for office, they often lack access to the professional campaign staff and wealthy donor networks that non-working class candidates do.

body:
The Democrats want it back... | [](http://links.dayofthepatriot.com/u/click?_t=1881c777777846d7b15cfb687edbd7a9&_m=317986d249304560ada410c8fba9cfda&_e=VspTvXoM1-NfoJ9JC22mAunnPbsKg9ljL691qKhQHV4pfnyYop7McxQ5TrHZjd5rEgHiyd0V0DHXuQRn-YalDX65dq28aUHYsMCCox5s0GMWV5WtLOblLr0l-KSvWvWx4nk7CqrAtKrCm0MZMSRzeMy_ynA0KPV6lqpCdCqU2K6oBzPLa6QUeQ-KgbgHpOY0fwhumaYpFZoJNwLuR3AYdEMvPVATHBcA8GLKA2iUk8iL5t0HgHZdjS_gJ_NcGLAg8AMT1WCaIr3DwrMcfGz7knBDY6b2gfpr57ZT5U5iYAQcOgQk1nqwasBAyE1eyw90bg4Og7gvh3bU07A7V5rdWr6dOxQdfMJiJIAnUfKqFOQr_woyPtH2mRDoPAxA9XdM57V5dNm1wP0AT435kjUFjA%3D%3D)

Fellow Conservative,

My name is Kevin Cramer. I am an America First Republican and **conservative warrior who flipped a critical Senate seat from the Democrats in 2018** -_becoming the first Republican to hold this North Dakota seat in my lifetime._

The Democrats will stop at nothing to force their socialist agenda on America and try to unseat any steadfast conservative who stands in their way. **And since I took this seat from the radical Left...**

**I am the Democrats’ TOP TARGET in 2024.**

Fellow Conservative,

President Biden's speech to Congress was disappointing, dangerous, and at times, downright _bizarre_.

I hate to break the bad news to him, but 70% of Americans believe our country is headed in the wrong direction. They believe the economy is weak, that energy prices are too high, and the federal government wastes the hard-earned tax money they send to Washington.

They believe Biden's open border has contributed to a dangerous increase in crime, and that for the past two years, America has projected an image of weakness to the world when we should be projecting strength and leadership.

Contrast that reality with what we heard in Biden's speech, where he had the nerve to say the economy was booming, the border was secure, and he was standing up to China.

Really? Does he define "standing up to China" as letting a Chinese spy balloon hover over American military assets for only a week, instead of a month?

If Biden and the Democrats had a record to run on, they would! But they don't, so instead they dodge, distract, and deceive...and hope the mainstream media lets them get away with it.

What you won't hear from the mainstream media are the crazy policies they DO support, like:

* letting biological boys compete against girls in sports
* believing men can get pregnant
* open borders, and
* sending free money to able-bodied people who don't work, while defunding the police who put their lives on the line every day to protect us

They're hiding their real agenda, but I'm glad to say our House Republican majority is stepping up to stop it.

**[What I'm very curious to know - and why I'm emailing you today - is to find out whether you trust the government. More pointedly, do you trust Democrats to be truthful with you?](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0209ae4f689f479fae05fbaf106e452b&_e=aAc8MUrCxDd3xjABzUgn1oOi7PmbA5d7525hknSgQenQgR0i6vpfv_wGQhnpmfBrGNtUp8YFvA-Pk0WemPbFWxsf1dIOxORZgQXkvcEOLkvN7G2IM28PlWjznMEL1gUVhZwe-o95zbqks29LjD0WhCoDxR07L_MpFRuhzdtauJJbINQlL9pn8K0iXUXWuV73Xtca0EUHrgW879KdTpHihTooKjRmsZTYNKgAI06ssVGqbWMUexSnJROTBiTnc0exB4z1Y3zxAiHaqFTmSebcOTAQI_7mMGoWOIvk_s2tB246uObV8WcVhGS-cxQ9nq6qjOg6g_HL5pqHdvFXAjXPe1DTnkDPo06HQ_RyPSjf1eOqTxcjwP59cqfelaSAqT8MKXugs_9X0eRh_DeJDk_vCvutfruv92gQy3Y7TkJLe0MwhGSuA2B-dUfcdmNKvN1WxgWZUHnLVUvEGY2Wn3N6cpeXUATL14QBM-_ARSKoCDY%3D)**

I'm worried that we could be losing support for our movement. My team tells me that folks aren't opening our emails as often as they once did or even engaging with the content we send. Jim Jordan

**About Jim Jordan:** | Leading the fight to hold Washington accountable.

**
In Washington, Jim Jordan is focused on his oversight role, helping lead investigations into federal agencies

In Congress, Jim Jordan continued to fight for fiscal responsibility,and he offered the only balanced budget of any member of the House or Senate.

As a state legislator, he took on the powerful special interests and the leaders from both political parties who wanted to put Ohio on an unsustainable path of higher taxes and spending.

He built a conservative, pro-family voting record, and authored an alternative state budget that balanced without raising taxes. He became the only legislator in state history to win both the Defender of Life award from Ohio Right to Life and the Pro-Life Legislator of the Year award from the United Conservatives of Ohio.

I'm honored to represent Oregon's Sixth Congressional District in Congress. **I'll explain more about what I'm fighting for in Congress in a moment, but first:** [**Last week,_The Cook Political Report_ predicted our race in OR-06 will be one of the most competitive races in the country in 2024. The last election taught us that the earlier we prepare, the stronger we will be, so is there anything you can chip in today to help our team?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58769980/392188523/-1412762645?refcode=em_fr_2023.02.15_b1_AS_all-nd&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYjFlYmVlZC02ZmFkLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5IVKAVzVCK9CaRv5wTQsaXdB4r-nrNiBEgS2mZB1ewU=) | _[CHIP IN](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58769981/392188524/-1412762645?refcode=em_fr_2023.02.15_b1_AS_all-nd&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYjFlYmVlZC02ZmFkLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5IVKAVzVCK9CaRv5wTQsaXdB4r-nrNiBEgS2mZB1ewU=)_

In Oregon, I worked hard to bring progress to the people of my state. I held Big Pharma accountable, increased the minimum wage, and helped pass the strongest abortion protection law in the country.
**Now I’m in Congress, and I’m still fighting for the people of Oregon. I’m taking on our national mental health crisis, working to bring back manufacturing jobs to Oregon, and advocating for the farmers and growers in Willamette Valley.**
**_I’m just getting started._** And with election experts already projecting our race in 2024 to be hyper-competitive, I don’t want to let anything stop the progress we’re making.
[**That's why I need your help _right now._ I’m ready to keep fighting in Congress, and I’m asking for your support. Can you chip in to my people-powered campaign today to help us prepare for the challenges in 2024?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58769982/392188525/-1412762645?refcode=em_fr_2023.02.15_b1_AS_all-nd&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYjFlYmVlZC02ZmFkLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5IVKAVzVCK9CaRv5wTQsaXdB4r-nrNiBEgS2mZB1ewU=)

clean_body: And with election experts already projecting our race in 2024 to be hyper-competitive, I don’t want to let anything stop the progress we’re making. = Hey folks, it's Andrea. I'm honored to represent Oregon's Sixth Congressional District in Congress. I'll explain more about what I'm fighting for in Congress in a moment, but first: = | = In Oregon, I worked hard to bring progress to the people of my state. I held Big Pharma accountable, increased the minimum wage, and helped pass the strongest abortion protection law in the country. Now I’m in Congress, and I’m still fighting for the people of Oregon. I’m taking on our national mental health crisis, working to bring back manufacturing jobs to Oregon, and advocating for the farmers and growers in Willamette Valley. I’m just getting started. And with election experts already projecting our race in 2024 to be hyper-competitive, I don’t want to let anything stop the progress we’re making. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = = All my thanks, Andrea = | | = Andrea Salinas for Oregon PO Box 230985 Tigard, OR 97281 Paid for by Andrea Salinas for Oregon Andrea is fighting for Oregon, fighting for affordable quality health care, an economy that works for everyone, and clean air, land, and water. Now, Andrea's ready to show Washington what hard work can accomplish – real, meaningful change for all of us. | =_

name: Steve (NRSC Chairman)
subject: The future of our Senate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Steve Daines for Montana
body:
The Democrats are doing everything they can to expand their majority and raise millions from their radical socialist donors. | [](http://links.action.supportstevedaines.com/u/click?_t=71faa67ca88f4c4b899697b6a4621901&_m=6d923c4704de4200a3c40f3280846694&_e=JJPkBKELAdf7rXhlaExDLqEKzLZ7TmsbU9cDTfeUX4dHcYbKY2ksPY8sm261CzVKV55eDANYyGeu8CgBPyFLjm8fJId2Pqa91k5ndanXt8C8PnVxgwtcq4Y-5QeS1rv8NB1zzRupDP9JklOzXkVRYALnRS17xt0LeKId9XXsZ1H3IDMICTjCmZMSkKD4DUwZX7nlXzGq8vMYLZ62kgphukE1iBNPyHTky96cyrAay1lTOZhb-gE9_iEz-KdRHAqUWM9GUv6mwJ-16rApFmFFubBEHBq2yqbWB-5Gs_89rtQXp4U2z5Bdl6zk0xd6NLLhNxV6DsLE_tOrp9txjEI0Y5hP1A09lIGIu8sj8Jo5NfZd48YtjReDMwnpcJs-6PRB)
---
Fellow Conservative,

When I was elected Chairman of the National Republican Senatorial Committee, I came in with one very simple goal: To stop the radical left and to restore a conservative Republican Senate majority.

The Democrats are doing everything they can to expand their majority and raise millions from their radical socialist donors. **[I need your help to stop them.](http://links.action.supportstevedaines.com/u/click?_t=71faa67ca88f4c4b899697b6a4621901&_m=6d923c4704de4200a3c40f3280846694&_e=JJPkBKELAdf7rXhlaExDLqEKzLZ7TmsbU9cDTfeUX4dHcYbKY2ksPY8sm261CzVKV55eDANYyGeu8CgBPyFLjm8fJId2Pqa91k5ndanXt8C8PnVxgwtcq4Y-5QeS1rv8NB1zzRupDP9JklOzXkVRYALnRS17xt0LeKId9XXsZ1H3IDMICTjCmZMSkKD4DUwZX7nlXzGq8vMYLZ62kgphukE1iBNPyHTky96cyrAay1kfoGE26V60MwgsobT3ZoBO1wUbCLxaFeQztzREZ6B8zZlyM7_zN8ceHOaYNUKTVAZqXjg5Ba38bK39Rkm6vldeQlmPEK0X07GrnIm1Z02EzoBHikrQVXI5hFHeD1GjdPmSPo_87KsQgYuDptfilPBM)**

[**STOP THE SOCIALIST LEFT
RESTORE A CONSERVATIVE SENATE MAJORITY -> **](http://links.action.supportstevedaines.com/u/click?_t=71faa67ca88f4c4b899697b6a4621901&_m=6d923c4704de4200a3c40f3280846694&_e=JJPkBKELAdf7rXhlaExDLqEKzLZ7TmsbU9cDTfeUX4dHcYbKY2ksPY8sm261CzVKV55eDANYyGeu8CgBPyFLjm8fJId2Pqa91k5ndanXt8C8PnVxgwtcq4Y-5QeS1rv8NB1zzRupDP9JklOzXkVRYALnRS17xt0LeKId9XXsZ1H3IDMICTjCmZMSkKD4DUwZX7nlXzGq8vMYLZ62kgphukE1iBNPyHTky96cyrAay1m4HE1QRWo3m0zKYR0f8BEw_teM6RB1778k6IoifJIaslrLdCJmLgPOmp7p7khFTTTTC0ZiHNKmdIpGm-f8A8B5AWIruTYZ5uJEWam-kNo7MybWEveiSmQyRQLqEJwUF_XLbZyFLIcqJhLynfZbfS6f)
You see Fellow Conservative, The Democrats only need one more seat to eliminate the filibuster, and if they succeed, every single right, freedom, and liberty we take for granted is jeopardized.

As a Senator and as a Representative, I have always fought to protect your rights from all enemies, foreign and domestic. **[I can’t do it alone Fellow Conservative, and the Democrats know this.](http://links.action.supportstevedaines.com/u/click?_t=71faa67ca88f4c4b899697b6a4621901&_m=6d923c4704de4200a3c40f3280846694&_e=JJPkBKELAdf7rXhlaExDLqEKzLZ7TmsbU9cDTfeUX4dHcYbKY2ksPY8sm261CzVKV55eDANYyGeu8CgBPyFLjm8fJId2Pqa91k5ndanXt8C8PnVxgwtcq4Y-5QeS1rv8NB1zzRupDP9JklOzXkVRYALnRS17xt0LeKId9XXsZ1H3IDMICTjCmZMSkKD4DUwZX7nlXzGq8vMYLZ62kgphukE1iBNPyHTky96cyrAay1kWkmjVg2G5CcZSMD4Dgq-HFk-rvYuvvMrSLm7uXxPu3Po59cNNWju9o9bKS1CByzGy2mvLlo25Z29PtEJTsVWbLpLegKnAbH5ysLgS8K8eI1Td8t87Vrm1dkr_A5ht5YXb5MYcv8unIUiWpjRbm4XR)**

That’s why they are targeting my friend and close Senate ally, Senator Kevin Cramer.

Kevin has always stood firm against the radical left: He has fought for our energy independence, the Second Amendment, the right to life, and against communist China.

Now the Democrats are going all out to take him down. They will spend millions on replacing this conservative warrior with their handpicked liberal candidate. **[Will you chip in $100, $25, $10, or anything you can to protect his seat?](http://links.action.supportstevedaines.com/u/click?_t=71faa67ca88f4c4b899697b6a4621901&_m=6d923c4704de4200a3c40f3280846694&_e=JJPkBKELAdf7rXhlaExDLqEKzLZ7TmsbU9cDTfeUX4dHcYbKY2ksPY8sm261CzVKV55eDANYyGeu8CgBPyFLjm8fJId2Pqa91k5ndanXt8C8PnVxgwtcq4Y-5QeS1rv8NB1zzRupDP9JklOzXkVRYALnRS17xt0LeKId9XXsZ1H3IDMICTjCmZMSkKD4DUwZX7nlXzGq8vMYLZ62kgphukE1iBNPyHTky96cyrAay1lgGkJ7p2HhjNKeGmbvDLLWsvLqxzaqiae8tv-JAmDjv0-aouyR8pkswr8pC25Q-LoYobqnicRV8GlKhPTYIJHytOT95jyzbhe-b8F5S3-AHKxyYNDmiookdE7FIgb50W7w3E1apBc1mC_ZIt6ooLcV)**

I wouldn’t be reaching out to you unless the situation was drastic Fellow Conservative, but here's our problem: Control of the Senate will come down to just one seat: We cannot afford to lose Kevin's seat if we want to take back control of the Senate.

**[Can I count on your support to help us protect his seat and regain control of the Senate?](http://links.action.supportstevedaines.com/u/click?_t=71faa67ca88f4c4b899697b6a4621901&_m=6d923c4704de4200a3c40f3280846694&_e=JJPkBKELAdf7rXhlaExDLqEKzLZ7TmsbU9cDTfeUX4dHcYbKY2ksPY8sm261CzVKV55eDANYyGeu8CgBPyFLjm8fJId2Pqa91k5ndanXt8C8PnVxgwtcq4Y-5QeS1rv8NB1zzRupDP9JklOzXkVRYALnRS17xt0LeKId9XXsZ1H3IDMICTjCmZMSkKD4DUwZX7nlXzGq8vMYLZ62kgphukE1iBNPyHTky96cyrAay1mpWFbq7kXN9BCmQSJipjVPtOTgkQZuxsSlgYTNm5sSi4vtmhdvqkRw2I-B-RPYQdBnIDVkIaY_HqzRjQMeJ3GeY76edavYpn39YL-jyrbZ6GyLC5sktyPCK_SNhDLfy1SaT8kjzSHcRWfSgar-UtFj)**

Thank you,

Senator Steve Daines

|
_Steve Daines is a fifth-generation Montanan, life-long sportsman and father of four serving the people of Montana as their Senator. Steve is committed to always putting Montana first as he works to bring real change to Washington and fights for more jobs, less government and common sense solutions to get our country back on track.[Chip in $10 or more to help Steve today!](http://links.action.supportstevedaines.com/u/click?_t=71faa67ca88f4c4b899697b6a4621901&_m=6d923c4704de4200a3c40f3280846694&_e=JJPkBKELAdf7rXhlaExDLqEKzLZ7TmsbU9cDTfeUX4dHcYbKY2ksPY8sm261CzVKV55eDANYyGeu8CgBPyFLjm8fJId2Pqa91k5ndanXt8C8PnVxgwtcq4Y-5QeS1rv8NB1zzRupDP9JklOzXkVRYALnRS17xt0LeKId9XXsZ1H3IDMICTjCmZMSkKD4DUwZX7nlXzGq8vMYLZ62kgphukE1iBNPyHTky96cyrAay1kqVem_JBQmro5rz0L5pN8ty48Ead5tEtbytknEQLtWKSKc0L0Q3l4A9aG-Uxf_wTdSU1CdaxSCyFIRxtty_6ESsQYXIoeC95HS-kX4aPs9an6GPfjXqNJ483yizwOahFkLCaqqFPXD3a13pXTA-nsY)
