name: Kirsten Gillibrand
subject: major deadline
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
| Please, this will only take a minute of your time:

Tonight marks one of our first big fundraising deadlines since I officially launched my reelection campaign. **But right now, we're falling way short of our $30,000 midnight goal, so I'm counting on your help to close this gap ASAP.**

**Republicans only need to win two more seats to deliver Senate control back to Mitch McConnell.** And here in New York, they just had their best election cycle in _two decades_ — winning enough seats to deliver the House majority to the GOP. Now, they're zeroing in on my seat to flip the Senate next.

**Missing this major goal would send a message to McConnell and the GOP that this seat is vulnerable — plus, it would mean starting this campaign at a serious fundraising disadvantage. I don't take any money from corporate PACs, so I can't reach this goal in time without your urgent grassroots support.** [_So please, will you split $10 between my campaign and Voter Protection Project right now to help us reach our midnight goal, defeat the GOP in New York and defend the Senate for Democrats?_](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/40388?t=6&akid=6390%2E878179%2ElqW10u) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Kirsten Gillibrand and VPP will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/40389?t=7&akid=6390%2E878179%2ElqW10u)

[Or a custom donation »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/40388?t=11&akid=6390%2E878179%2ElqW10u)
Thank you,

Kirsten Gillibrand
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=6390%2E878179%2ElqW10u). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=6390%2E878179%2ElqW10u).**

Take a look at some of her votes so far:
* **NO on the Family and Small Business Taxpayer Protection Act.** This misleading legislation would repeal the IRS expansion laid out in the Inflation Reduction Act — leaving the IRS underfunded, understaffed, and without the resources to hold the ultra-wealthy accountable for paying their fair share.
* **NO on the Born-Alive Abortion Survivors Protection Act.** This farcical resolution is dangerous and unnecessary, and seeks to advance Republicans’ extremist agenda to restrict our bodies and reproductive healthcare.
* **YES on the Energy Cybersecurity University Leadership Act of 2023.** This bill establishes the Energy Cybersecurity University Leadership Program, which will provide financial assistance and resources to students studying cybersecurity related to energy infrastructure.

**Becca is also the co-sponsor of critical legislation to bring Vermont’s values to the House floor — and to the rest of the country.** Currently, she is cosponsoring legislation to require a background check for every firearm sale, ensure affordable abortion coverage and care for every person, and admit DC as a Commonwealth into the United States. **After being in Congress for just over a month, Becca is proving that she has our backs in Washington. name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Montana’s GOP has their eyes on Jon Tester’s Senate seat. They might get it if Democrats across the country don’t step in to help him build a campaign early. They have a lot of advantages in a state that Trump won by 20 percent, but Sen. Tester has all of us who appreciate his support for working families.
body:
GOP Senate pickup?
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td912c644-fb4b-4f9a-a7c2-c86690fe733e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, _We can't afford to lose Jon Tester’s seat in Montana, in 2024, or we lose the Senate. And 2024 isn’t as far off as it seems. The campaign season is already underway._ _[](https://default.salsalabs.org/T0989e7fd-1802-4b6b-8c45-0cc546470e0b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)_ _Senator Jon Tester is running for reelection in Montana. _**_Tester has been everything you'd hope for as a Senator from a bright red state running as a Democrat._** He breaks with us on some issues where he has to represent his constituents. [**_Will you join us in showing Jon Tester how much we appreciate his political courage and in ensuring we hold onto the Senate majority, by giving Senator Tester $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T784606be-1b9b-42b3-9510-d478e4251103/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **_But whether it's key national issues like codifying choice or passing universal background checks on guns, or joining us on defining legislation such as the COVID stimulus & Inflation Reduction Acts, there is just never any question Jon Tester will be there, behind us 100%._**
---
|
---
| | | | | | [**DONATE NOW**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T91d313ed-5c8f-402f-8e25-604f09d1568a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| _No huffing and puffing his chest for the cameras. No negotiating on Meet The Press, or, worse, FoxNews. No attacking his own party or bragging about how much he disagrees with it. In other words, the anti-Joe Manchin._ **_Tester, like Manchin, comes from an overwhelming Trump state. Trump won Montana by 20% in 2016, yet Tester still stood up for his progressive values--FOR US--and was reelected in 2018 on his record and very Montana-esque being. He's perfect for the state, and perfect for the Democratic Party._** **_If we don't re-elect Tester, we will lose the Senate._** It's that simple. _And if we don't reward Tester for taking bold, progressive stands, even knowing he'll have to overcome the HUGE Trump lean of his state, then we can expect future Democrats from states like Montana to all be Joe Manchins._ A disaster. [**_So will you join us in showing Jon Tester how much we appreciate his political courage and in ensuring we hold onto the Senate majority, by giving Senator Tester $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6aee1636-0ad3-4c69-8232-2c98c89d7f78/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _Thank you for helping us reelect the good ones in hostile electoral territory._ Cliff
---
| | |
---
|
---
| | | | [**DONATE NOW**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf87ae8fd-c68b-4019-8b18-c5a800ea6c29/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | |
---
| | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good
---|---
| | |
---
| | Follow Us | [](https://twitter.com/intent/follow?screen_name=cliffschecter)| [](https://linkedin.com/in/cliffschecter-0873a448/)
---|---
| **Blue Amp Strategies**
1776 Mentor Ave. #411 | Norwood, Ohio 45212
513.438.0171 | info@blueampaction.com
---
| Having trouble viewing this email? [View it in your web browser](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/jontester5-n?wvpId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | |
---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf4c9a041-82fd-4f77-ab31-ddc62f7215eb/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
| | [Unsubscribe](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/manage-your-subscription?eId=d18e04f2-a4dc-4f49-adbf-12f28647951f&eType=EmailBlastContent&sId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) or [Manage Your Preferences](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/manage-your-subscription?eId=d18e04f2-a4dc-4f49-adbf-12f28647951f&eType=EmailBlastContent&sId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---

subject: We could use your help…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Ohio Democratic Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Already, we know that we're going to be facing an onslaught of attacks and spending from extreme National Republicans who will stop at nothing to try and unseat Sherrod Brown and take back the Senate majority.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58770313/392189482/-438463598?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MTdkYjk5OS03MWFkLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=B6VtqtsMaOJpRc6qJBs8hmiIzVfTsUWjtBn86bqDRHY=) | Team, I'll get straight to the point:

We're coming up on a crucial mid-month deadline, and we need your help to reach our $15,000 fundraising goal before midnight TONIGHT.

Look, 2024 may seem far away — _but it's just around the corner._

We know already that National Republicans will stop at nothing to unseat Senator Sherrod Brown. And with the GOP more than ready to put special interests over the American people, slash programs like Social Security and Medicare, strip reproductive rights, and disenfranchise Ohio voters, we're fighting back to protect the rights of Ohioans and the future of our state.

name: Andy Kim
subject: A truly bipartisan issue
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Andy Kim for Congress
body:
I was glad to hear President Biden list boosting veteran services as a top priority in his State of the Union address last week.

Improving the lives of our veterans is truly a bipartisan issue.

Since Day One in Congress, getting a new health clinic for New Jersey veterans has been a top priority. The thousands of vets in our community deserve a world-class facility that can give them the care they need – affordably and close to home. I'm proud of our work to deliver a new clinic and am grateful for the positive impact it will have on our veterans and our community.

Veteran suicide is a severe problem, but it is getting better . There were fewer veteran suicides in 2019 than in 2020, thanks to services like peer mental health support and additional funding for veteran crisis care. I led a bipartisan letter, signed by 113 members calling for increased mental health support. Because of that and more work, we secured $13.2 billion in additional mental health service funding.

We have the momentum. We must continue this work so that all veterans can get the care they have earned.

The hard truth is that about one-third of adult homeless people are veterans. In Congress, I've worked hard to pass legislation that ensures veterans have access to low-income housing and allowances based on cost of living needs. Everyone, especially veterans, deserve to have a roof over their heads. We secured $2.7 billion in additional funding for VA homeless assistance programs that are helping veterans across the country.

Thanks to bipartisan efforts, the number of homeless veterans declined by 11% from 2020 to 2022. And in 2022 alone, we permanently housed 40,000 veterans. This is amazing, and I'm committed to getting the number of homeless veterans down to zero.

Like President Biden, I believe our veterans deserve more than the bare minimum. I am committed to job training and workforce development programs for veterans and their families. Veterans deserve to live with dignity.

I'm proud to have sponsored legislation providing veterans with career training and apprenticeship opportunities. The work must continue as thousands of service members transition to civilian life every year.

Improving the lives of veterans and their families is a worthy goal that everyone should get behind. Veterans had our back. Now it's our turn to have theirs.

Let's get it done,

Andy

name: Jon Tester
subject: there’s no “secret sauce”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic Party of Georgia
body:
|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58770610/392190442/227139380?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YmY3NWU2ZS03M2FkLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lpJcgt7SwsmnPj_7dWOF4_USXJ9yWN6SwwtDP06TDgs=&emci=6c73de23-94ac-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=7bf75e6e-73ad-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=43566853)

| | Peter,

As a vulnerable Democrat who won a Senate race in a Trump-won state in 2018, I know exactly what it takes to overcome the odds and win.

But let me tell you, folks, **there’s no secret sauce.**

Whether you live in a big city or on a family farm like me and my folks, everyone wants their representatives to fight for the same priorities: affordable health care, a living wage, and a government that answers to the people, not wealthy special interests.

But the message isn’t getting through to my GOP friends in the Senate. They’ve let big donors, dark money groups, and billionaire-funded super PACs run rampant in Washington, and they’ve got no plans to stop.

Well, I’ve had it with these shenanigans. And I’ll bet you have, too.

[**_If you’re with me, I need you to chip in $15 right now before our midnight mid-quarter deadline, split between me and the Democratic Party of Georgia to help us protect our Democratic majority in the Senate. clean_body: | | | Peter, As a vulnerable Democrat who won a Senate race in a Trump-won state in 2018, I know exactly what it takes to overcome the odds and win. But let me tell you, folks, there’s no secret sauce. Whether you live in a big city or on a family farm like me and my folks, everyone wants their representatives to fight for the same priorities: affordable health care, a living wage, and a government that answers to the people, not wealthy special interests. But the message isn’t getting through to my GOP friends in the Senate. They’ve let big donors, dark money groups, and billionaire-funded super PACs run rampant in Washington, and they’ve got no plans to stop. Well, I’ve had it with these shenanigans. subject: FWD: Did you see my message here, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by James for NY
body:
Peter, did you see my urgent message?
---
**I’m still falling short of my goal by $3,391. And, according to my finance team’s most recent report, you have _still not made a contribution toward my February mid-month fundraising goal._**
Peter, for over four years I’ve fought tirelessly to hold the powerful and corrupt accountable. But millions of Americans are still without reproductive care, LGBTQ+ people are still being threatened, and mass shootings still devastate communities around our nation.
That’s why, before I fall short of my goal and have to face some difficult budget cuts: [**Will you donate $5 or more now so I can continue to fight for the voiceless and vulnerable?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58770980/392191930/-1577261820?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk976-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMTI5Y2RiMy03M2FkLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dEE-7-TggFG2xEZf9m7WfjeecsSeV3MOrlHjolZ7hRg=)
**Here’s the best link to give:[https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jamesforny-23](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58770981/392191931/-1577261820?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk976-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMTI5Y2RiMy03M2FkLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dEE-7-TggFG2xEZf9m7WfjeecsSeV3MOrlHjolZ7hRg=)**

Thank you,

Letitia

_Sent from my iPhone_
\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: **Letitia James**
Date: Tue, Feb 14, 2023
Subject: Please let me explain, Peter
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58770982/392191932/1632462062?refcode=jtk976-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMTI5Y2RiMy03M2FkLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dEE-7-TggFG2xEZf9m7WfjeecsSeV3MOrlHjolZ7hRg=)
---
Peter, sorry to bother you on Valentine’s Day. In a moment, [**I’m going to ask you to contribute to my progressive campaign**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58770983/392191933/-1577261820?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk976-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMTI5Y2RiMy03M2FkLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dEE-7-TggFG2xEZf9m7WfjeecsSeV3MOrlHjolZ7hRg=), but first I wanted to explain what’s at stake.
I didn’t grow up with power or privilege.
I had no special strings to tug on and no way to stop the manipulative landlords, predatory lenders, and powerful corporations that had ruled New York for _generations_ from preying on families like my own. I felt voiceless.
When we made history in 2018 by helping me become the first Black woman ever to serve as New York’s attorney general, I knew that I had to do everything in my power to _never_ let another American feel how I did then – and I’m proud to say that that’s exactly what I’ve worked toward.
Peter, during my time in office, I have taken gun manufacturers and sellers to court, won over a BILLION dollars from Big Pharma for New Yorkers harmed from the opioid epidemic, taken legal action against attorneys general in other states to defend LGBTQ+ children from their harmful laws, fought tirelessly for reproductive freedom, and _more_.
**But I’ll level with you: Being a champion of the people has made me an _enemy_ of the powerful and corrupt. And, as a Black woman who has had to fight every second to get to this platform, I cannot take anything for granted.**
That’s why I’m asking for your support today, Peter. Because, even though you helped me make history _once again_ and win re-election in November, my hard work is nowhere near complete – especially with the powerful and corrupt sizing up my every move to see where they can cut me down.
**I need to raise at least $10,000 to keep pace with my 2023 goals, so please:[Will you rush a donation of $5 or more before my fundraiser ends at 11:59 p.m. tomorrow night? I can only win my fight for progress with your help.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58770984/392191934/-1577261820?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk976-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMTI5Y2RiMy03M2FkLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dEE-7-TggFG2xEZf9m7WfjeecsSeV3MOrlHjolZ7hRg=)**

---
| | [$25](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58770986/392191936/-1577261820?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=jtk976-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMTI5Y2RiMy03M2FkLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dEE-7-TggFG2xEZf9m7WfjeecsSeV3MOrlHjolZ7hRg=)

| | [$50](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58770987/392191937/-1577261820?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=jtk976-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMTI5Y2RiMy03M2FkLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dEE-7-TggFG2xEZf9m7WfjeecsSeV3MOrlHjolZ7hRg=)

| | [Other](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58770988/392191938/-1577261820?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk976-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMTI5Y2RiMy03M2FkLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dEE-7-TggFG2xEZf9m7WfjeecsSeV3MOrlHjolZ7hRg=)

Letitia

name: =?utf-8?Q?Rep.=20Jake=20LaTurner?=
subject: A quick update from Jake
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kansans for LaTurner
body:
Here's what House Republicans are up to >> | |
---
| | |
---
| Friend,

It's Jake LaTurner here. Since we took the gavel from Nancy Pelosi, House Republicans have hit the ground running to hold Joe Biden accountable, push back on Democrats' far-left agenda, and promote freedom and liberty across our great nation.

Thanks to all your help, we are **FINALLY** getting America back on track. I am so grateful for your continued trust and support.

\- Jake
---
|
---
| **DEFUNDING 87,000 IRS AGENTS**
---
|
---
| I promised on the campaign trail that the first vote I would take in the Republican majority would be to defund Joe Biden's army of 87,000 IRS agents.

The IRS leaked sensitive tax information to journalists, tried to spy on our bank accounts and Venmo transactions, and is now going after waiter and waitress tips.

This is another attempt by Democrats to take more of our hard-earned tax dollars and control every aspect of our lives. I will**NEVER** stand for it. I proudly voted to **DEFUND** the $80 billion Democrats' wanted to use to beef up the IRS.
---
|
---
| **DEMANDING ANSWERS ON CLASSIFIED DOCS**
---
| [ ](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=68c99c53bd&e=1050d051da)
---
| [**CLICK HERE TO WATCH THE FULL NEWSMAX INTERVIEW**](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=5ace8ca3de&e=1050d051da)
---
| Joe Biden stored classified, highly sensitive documents in his **GARAGE**! Given everything we know about Hunter Biden, it is extremely concerning that he lived in the same house where Joe Biden stored the documents.

To make matters worse, the Biden administration found the documents **MONTHS AGO** and only told the American people after the midterm elections.

As a member of the Oversight Committee, I am working with my colleagues to demand answers from the National Archives and the Biden administration to find out how this happened. I joined Newsmax to discuss my thoughts. [**Click here to watch the interview. **](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=ca1f1f8850&e=1050d051da)
---
|
---
| **HOLDING JOE BIDEN ACCOUNTABLE**
I am proud to serve on the Oversight Committee led by Chairman James Comer. Nancy Pelosi and her army of liberal Democrats in Congress conducted virtually **ZERO OVERSIGHT** of the Biden administration.

That is all about the change under Republican leadership. We have already had three hearings to hold this reckless White House accountable.
---
|
---
| [ ](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=4b2eee7e47&e=1050d051da)
---
| Over **5 MILLION** illegal immigrants have attempted to cross the southern border under Joe Biden. That includes 1 million migrants who evaded law enforcement completely and entered our country undetected.

For two years, Democrats turned a blind eye to this worsening crisis. Cartels have complete operational control of the southern border, fentanyl is pouring into our communities and killing our children, and terrorists are using this crisis as a way into America. It's time for action.

Republicans heard directly from Border Patrol agents fighting this crisis on the front lines. We learned what actions we can take immediately to help secure America's southern border.
---
|
---
| [ ](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=be1b09048f&e=1050d051da)
---
| Back in 2020, the New York Post published a story about Hunter Biden's laptop that exposed the Biden family's dirty business schemes. Government officials then worked with Twitter to censor the story days before the 2020 elections.

This is a clear attack on our **FIRST AMENDMENT** rights. No government official should be colluding with **BIG TECH** to hide legitimate reporting from the public.

I demanded answers from former Twitter executives who are responsible for censoring the story. The American people deserve accountability.
---
|
---
| [ ](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=13b38bb2eb&e=1050d051da)
---
| After Nancy Pelosi and Chuck Schumer spent **TRILLIONS** of federal dollars under the guise of COVID-19 with little to no guardrails, Joe Biden turned a blind eye to rampant waste, fraud, and abuse in these pandemic programs.

As a result, **BILLIONS** of taxpayer dollars were stolen from hard-working families. I questioned Biden bureaucrats on how this happened and what the President could have done to prevent this.
---
|
---
| **HOUSE REPUBLICAN LEGISLATIVE UPDATE**
---
| I am proud to have voted in favor of legislation on the House Floor that **REVERSES** Joe Biden's far-left policies and puts **AMERICA FIRST** :

✅ Defund Joe Biden’s IRS army
✅ Create a committee to hold Communist China accountable
✅ Create a subcommittee on the weaponization of government
✅ Push back on Democrats' extreme pro-abortion agenda
✅ Protect America’s emergency oil reserves
✅ Unleash domestic energy production
✅ Officially end the COVID-19 national emergency
✅ End COVID-19 vax mandates for healthcare workers
✅ Condemn socialism

---
|
---
| **KANSAS GOP CONVENTION**
---
|
---
---
|
---
---
| Great seeing so many patriots at the Kansas GOP Convention this past weekend! I am happy to report that grassroots excitement in Kansas for **AMERICA FIRST** policies is **STRONG.**

I will do **EVERYTHING** I can to get our nation off the path toward socialism and back on the road to freedom.
---
| [DONATE NOW TO DEFEND THE HOUSE GOP MAJORITY](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=b97a2223e3&e=1050d051da "DONATE NOW TO DEFEND THE HOUSE GOP MAJORITY")
---
| | Paid for by Kansans for LaTurner
---
|
---
| | |
---
| _Copyright © 2022 LaTurner for Congress, All rights reserved._

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/profile?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=a58a1fbbbe&e=1050d051da&c=a7faed0ceb) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=a58a1fbbbe&e=1050d051da&c=a7faed0ceb).
---
|
---

clean_body: I have to ask, folks! | | | Team Ruiz hopes that you and your family are safe and healthy. Public health across the country is our top concern during this unprecedented time. To view the most up to date CDC COVID-19 safety recommendations, And if you have a moment, please read our message below. Friend, Raul Ruiz here. | Look, I know it may seem odd to ask for just $1. In the grand scheme of things, it can be hard to see how a dollar can even make a difference. But here’s the difference, team: My campaign doesn’t run on dark money contributions or wealthy mega-donors. It’s built by hard-working folks like you. Supporters who come from families like mine. Families who want to leave their communities better than they found it. Everyday people coming together to build something greater than themselves. And though $1 may seem symbolic, the movement it grows will be able to move mountains. And it all starts with $1. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: Thank you for standing with us! name: Judicial Watch Corruption Chronicles
subject: Texas Border Operation Catches 348,000 Illegal Immigrants, 361 million Lethal Fentanyl Doses
body:
In the absence of adequate federal enforcement a Texas border
security initiative heavily criticized by Democrats and the media has
apprehended hundreds of thousands of illegal immigrants—including
thousands of criminals—and seized millions of lethal doses of
fentanyl.

[alt_text]

[*****]
February 15, 2023

[article-image]
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62211&L=28889&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvdGV4YXMtYm9yZGVyLW9wZXJhdGlvbi8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249Y29ycnVwdGlvbitjaHJvbmljbGVzJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=f81cb45389d4a7655570afb3a02f3a7031162ef72da73135c87f628e0f48e57c]

In the absence of adequate federal enforcement a Texas border
security initiative heavily criticized by Democrats and the media has
apprehended hundreds of thousands of illegal immigrants—including
thousands of criminals—and seized millions of lethal doses of
fentanyl. Known as Operation Lone Star, the project was launched by
Governor Greg Abbott in March 2021 as the illegal immigration crisis
gripped his border state. Essentially the Texas Department of Public
Safety (DPS) and the Texas National Guard are picking up the slack for
the federal government, which is charged with protecting the famously
porous southern border.

clean_body: In the absence of adequate federal enforcement a Texas border security initiative heavily criticized by Democrats and the media has apprehended hundreds of thousands of illegal immigrants—including thousands of criminals—and seized millions of lethal doses of fentanyl. [alt_text] [*****] February 15, 2023 [article-image] [] In the absence of adequate federal enforcement a Texas border security initiative heavily criticized by Democrats and the media has apprehended hundreds of thousands of illegal immigrants—including thousands of criminals—and seized millions of lethal doses of fentanyl. Known as Operation Lone Star, the project was launched by Governor Greg Abbott in March 2021 as the illegal immigration crisis gripped his border state. Essentially the Texas Department of Public Safety (DPS) and the Texas National Guard are picking up the slack for the federal government, which is charged with protecting the famously porous southern border. subject: Before we know it...

body:
Things will pick up soon, and we can't afford to miss our fundraising benchmarks as the early narratives of the cycle take shape.

Friend, tonight is our first mid-quarter deadline of the year. In addition to helping us fund our early field outreach, it's an important benchmark as we work to keep pace for a strong public fundraising result in just a few weeks — one that will set the narrative for how our race unfolds.

[**I'm reaching out to ask personally for your help, because we're still short by $1,510 of where we need to be. Can you rush $10 before midnight to help us make up the gap?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58772355/392196821/-772585877?refcode=EM_FR_230215MM_MM_JW_FULL_5_NG_N_L1&fn=&ln=&em=dpwillis67@gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=PA&pc=18326&oc=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNTFlZGI2Zi03OWFkLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=adnKdxMXhThlrSRBREV9LwCeT8hxxOkavpssnQaLyqE=)

Republican opponents could announce against me at any time, and the pace of the election cycle will quickly pick up before we know it. If we miss our early goals, the GOP will be able to smear me and gain ground in a seat that Democrats have to hold if we want to win back the House.

I'm working to make sure voters know the story of our successes – from expanding broadband access, to delivering relief that has set our economy back on track, to taking on big special interests so we could lower the cost of prescription drugs for families. I'm proud of this record, and I'll fight every day to defend it and work to build upon it.

**It's through the support of grassroots donors like you that we are able to get our message out. So if you can, please donate $10 before midnight by clicking here:** [**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jw_em**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58772356/392196822/-772585877?refcode=EM_FR_230215MM_MM_JW_FULL_5_NG_N_L2&fn=&ln=&em=dpwillis67@gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=PA&pc=18326&oc=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNTFlZGI2Zi03OWFkLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=adnKdxMXhThlrSRBREV9LwCeT8hxxOkavpssnQaLyqE=)

Thank you so much,

Jennifer

name: Speaker Kevin McCarthy
subject: Omar- FIRED. Swalwell- FIRED. Schiff- FIRED.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McCarthy for Congress
body:
Let's set the record straight.

| |
---
| | | Let's set the record straight.

I fired Ilhan Omar because she was hurling anti-semitic and anti-American Remarks across social media. This is UNACCEPTABLE behavior for a member of a committee representing America on the world stage.

I fired Eric Swalwell from the intelligence committee because he became entangled with a spy for the Chinese Communist party. I do not have to explain to you why this would be a conflict of interest for someone sitting on the Intelligence Committee.

I fired Adam Schiff from the Intelligence Committee because he spread lies about Donald Trump's supposed involvement with Russia despite knowing them to be untrue at the time.
Adam Schiff leaked it?

I promised you that if we took back the majority, I would bring decency and justice to the people's House.

I have fought tirelessly to ensure good-paying jobs and training opportunities designed to modernize the manufacturing sector. My focus has never wavered from ensuring that the working families of the Heartland have a high quality of life.

My service in Congress is fully dedicated to the continued success and prosperity of our nation’s workers. **As a strong voice for Ohioans, I’m ready to keep working for you in Congress.**

There’s a long road ahead of us, but the best way we can keep making progress is by taking back the House majority in 2024. And that work starts today.

**[I’m asking you to pitch in $5 or whatever you can to stand alongside me in the fight. Together, we can keep making progress for Ohio.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58773353/392199734/-1372990689?refcode=EM_FR_230215MM_N_MK_45DA_3_NG_N_L1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNjA0MDNhNy03Y2FkLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dmJkU3uCSj-xLrSG5mviATip8QlrkaDM8Ny6VlaiwAI=)**

Marcy Kaptur

clean_body: I’ve been fighting for Ohio my entire career, and I’m not stopping now. | | = I have fought tirelessly to ensure good-paying jobs and training opportunities designed to modernize the manufacturing sector. My focus has never wavered from ensuring that the working families of the Heartland have a high quality of life. My service in Congress is fully dedicated to the continued success and prosperity of our nation’s workers. As a strong voice for Ohioans, I’m ready to keep working for you in Congress. There’s a long road ahead of us, but the best way we can keep making progress is by taking back the House majority in 2024. name: Candace Owens
subject: The ugly truth about Black History Month
body:
It’s Black History Month. . . The month when a bunch of people who know nothing about black history take the time to celebrate people like Frederick Douglas — but have never read any of his works.
The month when a bunch of people who know nothing about black history take the time to celebrate people like Frederick Douglas -- but have never read any of his works.

[](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=3137d6c9f6db4d1bbf1408acbcff34ff&_e=xVliGoJTBwRi_qx291XINip88WXYcz6h5hWq6Nju0GR06etMF5yOg3aTQYP7tphFrfNnA2r3NwCaHAmFuYeQ__EcdIpKBxaCQ9klHJbUrWm2TjDknwqM19zloB9_CU2HCks-cf36exbPbyFkXg43g_9R7wGN5gPfUKzuDaEFMgHFTCGvrEKEJd6R0QX93VVc6OqLOk24ny20ZKDtmFeYi65yeKjArIIXGCmS0VmEVzR2XY1-31gwRXzRMsqvA_GZ5k5ztUrFWfmSITkkYBF74XWjPc2Rn6YGyQPp-XVaYEM%3D)
Friend,

It's Black History Month. . . The month when a bunch of people who know nothing about black history take the time to celebrate people like Frederick Douglas -- but have never read any of his works.

Black History Month isn't about celebrating the Black men and women who've changed the world for the better.

It's nothing more than a way for woke radicals to push identity politics and glorify division in America.

I don't want a Black History Month, and I can't say "why" better than Morgan Freeman did:

_" You're going to relegate my history to a month? **Black history is American history.** "_

My name is Candace Owens, and I am a co-founder of the BLEXIT Foundation. One of the reasons I helped found BLEXIT was to teach REAL history to Black and minority communities.

To teach true American history -- _and not the socialist, woke version that 's pushed today_ -- I've set a goal to raise $50,000 this month.

[_**Will you join me in the push for TRUE history, Friend, by sending a gift of $10, $35, $50, or any amount? Click here to show your support >>>**_](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=3137d6c9f6db4d1bbf1408acbcff34ff&_e=xVliGoJTBwRi_qx291XINip88WXYcz6h5hWq6Nju0GR06etMF5yOg3aTQYP7tphFrfNnA2r3NwCaHAmFuYeQ__EcdIpKBxaCQ9klHJbUrWm2TjDknwqM19zloB9_CU2HCks-cf36exbPbyFkXg43g8edNmp-s64lFEhv7h0OmwXZ-rrgX0i02V0clxS8W7MsRmoL7mqEir_MBxWRUd-RAatzOfO6jPWsAhV1yLkXHDB4o9pW3Uu-UaPjISwwxnqVJ0CYQdyv7AJWr_vlMZuS8Ej97kvwyjPkGz2MLz4SeUs%3D)

BLEXIT honors independent black voices like. . .

. . . Thomas Sowell, a well-known American conservative and is considered one of the most influential black conservatives who has authored over 40 books.

. . . Clarence Thomas, a Constitutional originalist and Associate Justice of the Supreme Court of the United States.

. . . Walter Williams, an American economist, commentator, author, and academic and former John M. Olin Distinguished Professor of Economics at George Mason University.

That's why I hope you'll join me in our effort to celebrate Black Excellence and work to build a better future for Black and minority communities. [_**Click here to send a gift of $10, $35, $50, or any amount >>>**_](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=3137d6c9f6db4d1bbf1408acbcff34ff&_e=xVliGoJTBwRi_qx291XINip88WXYcz6h5hWq6Nju0GR06etMF5yOg3aTQYP7tphFrfNnA2r3NwCaHAmFuYeQ__EcdIpKBxaCQ9klHJbUrWm2TjDknwqM19zloB9_CU2HCks-cf36exbPbyFkXg43gyj-wTQ7Pr4AWXKNGp8okxSKyqhmpKxgrCKmBtGb43Syr9bW1VlikIWQ3mWq1P_MRfL-cxLP5gYG_XGhtufnCtq_Otj4DZC26kbBjuOMBpwcSJ5c57nr3CAuuTVEUHslqfIjf4IAmV-QES32bh6rFzA%3D)

Here's how we're reaching Black and minority communities with American history:

**BLEXIT 's Liberation Camps** provide an American History curriculum to children in Kindergarten through 8th grade who live in low-income communities. We also teach key life skills and character development.

The children experience 18 weeks of after-school programming, six weeks of full-day summer camp programming, 25 full-day programs when schools had in-service days, and 20 parents-night-out programs and field trips.

**And through our 43 State Chapters made up of more than 14,000 volunteers! **

Our chapter members bring BLEXIT's five pillars to life through events and outreach efforts to places where no other organizations can effectively reach to combat the victimhood mentality.
1. **Advocating** for School Choice.
2. **Promoting** criminal justice reform by developing positive relationships between police and minority communities.
3. **Championing** entrepreneurship and free enterprise.
4. **Developing** history programs that will inspire minority children.

Presenting the message of BLEXIT through art and live experiences.

BLEXIT State Chapter members work within their local communities to help change the narrative that surrounds America's minority communities.

Friend, can you help us reach our goal of raising $50,000 this month? **Click below to send your support.**

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=3137d6c9f6db4d1bbf1408acbcff34ff&_e=xVliGoJTBwRi_qx291XINip88WXYcz6h5hWq6Nju0GR06etMF5yOg3aTQYP7tphFrfNnA2r3NwCaHAmFuYeQ__EcdIpKBxaCQ9klHJbUrWm2TjDknwqM19zloB9_CU2Hqm6PMCUGN0bwBhqBAPaHv5WWj4R_Rij3tVAAV2ChgilWmAxc5ug9FDz3vtIk2QB0g9V22hIbyCOyK7EbTClJo_VcSkKPY8_8XrhbA2P9S2TiKPAkJgzWSTH5V63a2cLud1qLfgqlQhftZlbszck6TkOFdeieIBr60sCzXJbHYBM%3D)

clean_body: It’s Black History Month. . . The month when a bunch of people who know nothing about black history take the time to celebrate people like Frederick Douglas — but have never read any of his works. The month when a bunch of people who know nothing about black history take the time to celebrate people like Frederick Douglas -- but have never read any of his works. Friend, It's Black History Month. . . The month when a bunch of people who know nothing about black history take the time to celebrate people like Frederick Douglas -- but have never read any of his works. Black History Month isn't about celebrating the Black men and women who've changed the world for the better. It's nothing more than a way for woke radicals to push identity politics and glorify division in America. I don't want a Black History Month, and I can't say "why" better than Morgan Freeman did: " You're going to relegate my history to a month? Black history is American history. " My name is Candace Owens, and I am a co-founder of the BLEXIT Foundation. One of the reasons I helped found BLEXIT was to teach REAL history to Black and minority communities. To teach true American history -- and not the socialist, woke version that 's pushed today -- I've set a goal to raise $50,000 this month. BLEXIT honors independent black voices like. . . . . . Thomas Sowell, a well-known American conservative and is considered one of the most influential black conservatives who has authored over 40 books. . . . Clarence Thomas, a Constitutional originalist and Associate Justice of the Supreme Court of the United States. . . . Walter Williams, an American economist, commentator, author, and academic and former John M. Olin Distinguished Professor of Economics at George Mason University. That's why I hope you'll join me in our effort to celebrate Black Excellence and work to build a better future for Black and minority communities. Here's how we're reaching Black and minority communities with American history: BLEXIT 's Liberation Camps provide an American History curriculum to children in Kindergarten through 8th grade who live in low-income communities. We also teach key life skills and character development. The children experience 18 weeks of after-school programming, six weeks of full-day summer camp programming, 25 full-day programs when schools had in-service days, and 20 parents-night-out programs and field trips. And through our 43 State Chapters made up of more than 14,000 volunteers! Our chapter members bring BLEXIT's five pillars to life through events and outreach efforts to places where no other organizations can effectively reach to combat the victimhood mentality. 1. Advocating for School Choice. 2. Promoting criminal justice reform by developing positive relationships between police and minority communities. 3. Championing entrepreneurship and free enterprise. 4. Developing history programs that will inspire minority children. Presenting the message of BLEXIT through art and live experiences. BLEXIT State Chapter members work within their local communities to help change the narrative that surrounds America's minority communities. Friend, can you help us reach our goal of raising $50,000 this month? Click below to send your support. Thank you, Candace Owens President BLEXIT Foundation BLEXIT is a 501(c)3 tax-exempt organization. All contributions are tax-deductible to the extent provided by law. Sent to Reclaiming American Freedom subscribers. 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: What happened in Ohio
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

Some are calling the railroad derailment in Ohio — and the government’s
shameful response — one of the worst environmental disasters in decades.

Railroad workers have been warning us about this for years, but the
powerful political establishment, run by its corporate donors, has done
nothing. This disaster is the result of the railroad corporations’
intentional neglect and they must be held accountable.

We must demand our government put people over profit, reign in these
industries, and finally listen to the communities most at risk.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/126989?refcode=em20230215-27555&t=1001&akid=27555%2E1203867%2EU9_bmM ][IMG]

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/126989?refcode=em20230215-27555&t=1002&akid=27555%2E1203867%2EU9_bmM ][IMG]

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/126989?refcode=em20230215-27555&t=1003&akid=27555%2E1203867%2EU9_bmM ]Enough is enough — we can’t allow business to continue as usual. We’re
counting on you to chip in so we can keep fighting the establishment until
they finally put people over profit.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/126989?refcode=em20230215-27555&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=27555%2E1203867%2EU9_bmM ]Contribute $3

Railroad companies have held workers hostage in protracted negotiations
for years over the most basic changes to their contracts while allowing
their standards to fall, forcing fewer workers to do more work, and
cutting corners at every turn to save costs. And this is all while making
record profits — we’re talking about billions of dollars.

Let’s be clear: workers knew this was coming, and now communities in Ohio
will suffer the toxic effects of this derailment for years to come because
companies decided cutting corners was more important than public safety.
If we don’t act now, it could happen again. It’s on us to stand up and
demand the political establishment finally hold the railroad industry
accountable.

Justice Democrats and our candidates are standing up to greedy
corporations and their harmful, exploitative practices. [ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/126989?refcode=em20230215-27555&t=1023&akid=27555%2E1203867%2EU9_bmM ]Will you join
us and contribute $3 today so we can continue to challenge
the political establishment and elect candidates who will fight for us in
Congress?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/126989?refcode=em20230215-27555&t=1024&akid=27555%2E1203867%2EU9_bmM ][IMG]

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/126989?refcode=em20230215-27555&t=1025&akid=27555%2E1203867%2EU9_bmM ][IMG]

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/126989?refcode=em20230215-27555&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1026&akid=27555%2E1203867%2EU9_bmM ]Contribute »

Always in solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1027&akid=27555%2E1203867%2EU9_bmM ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1028&akid=27555%2E1203867%2EU9_bmM ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20230215-27555-footer&t=1029&refcode2=27555_1203867_U9_bmM&akid=27555%2E1203867%2EU9_bmM

name: AZ Dems
subject: Our reproductive rights are still under attack
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Arizona Democratic Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
| | | The only way to end this is to flip the AZ legislature | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wQpY1a341A1VHA4zshCKNsslRc9JABDNIhIQxjbCLSL1gY4tMBcQy9FEGz9CXoLPOvj1YrFHKx7gG0ypsWTaP1O4gIlmGrBD1ucVVVDtjYhDKS24R0szahAvBIBa89KG-rCuLUXBs60z0K3ET_XwBEqsLkeAZXFQCxRvJ4CpxckjO_-9PPLJIaKCzmEjnPDeD1cqce7Bei0AlWZoX42kax1ZqC6pUcAQ8yiqP2mlLAXf1myFchYvC6Jocw0bu9Ku38lGQ7OMxGKtBXak2EaayAQ6ZiD2w4tcbP1AnGzaeOuyRFcoGGYqiTnON21dQItz8luSAHyrN1iIfUJ8sxz2bw4xCwDvvNIz_gk8PhIgsr84zLeK3As3K471FbBGxd9wPbsxtT3j_s92bt_d6jL26t_3F3SpQ4pGMcnVd-UNPII7PaBrKe0PpBmihjQuZ0hhKNcIqUq_uCzbQD6YPk9xvH/3tq/mxcJlhfDTQ-gW6ZZrMGMsA/h0/4g0_hNkzRE-k96Alyahoefo4O43PlOfdVSC76TGJTg0)

---
| Team,

If you haven’t paid close attention, **you may have missed that the AZ GOP is once again attacking our reproductive rights** by trying to pass a new version of a “personhood” bill even though courts ruled against their previous attempts.

| [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wQpY1a341A1VHA4zshCKNsslRc9JABDNIhIQxjbCLSL1gY4tMBcQy9FEGz9CXoLPOvj1YrFHKx7gG0ypsWTaP1pu1CLsjX-A2WH635S8CuOF0v3QOgXQIPCXt-kUcyAe6Fdu0gKpj2IjAiph34eT3w-Ov15CZItoVyPQ1eYptAPbMzcUVMp6YxZ83wlI6djLn26gKjtqSgojyqiLzCrwVE1z-i9_Uea-2Hpqhq31-GNwyYdhzosJFu02Y6ljBhJfd02CwZ3k0H0XFyr6tMi9cvlhU0C_h9V1wvAvJfTqymHRHchA-yZo9DDkPmVPNJMMFDu6hJhM6YNaSU4Qi-G8T2ZqljkaAbBt1C9HR2znduIoMyR4NWCBTtVc3gSBh72UkkWuYgcm9zZ4JksAZTJtXLwyQIA5TARk0XmankQfK5HnpdIyoBgzyfXgy9P_ugjK-iGBLrlxGuHPbTKo7S7UVQ/3tq/mxcJlhfDTQ-gW6ZZrMGMsA/h1/GadzifO0b73SwipzOym4PJgXDAb56F-87R8XTqfKhOI) [](?link_id=2&can_id=12471c8e444f80358077c9724aea85a0&source=email-the-difference-winning-makes-4&email_referrer=email_1811124___subject_2314821&email_subject=our-reproductive-rights-are-still-under-attack)
Thanks to your support, we elected two Democrats – Governor Katie Hobbs and Attorney General Kris Mayes – who can fight back against these repeated attempts to take away reproductive rights.

But if we want to stop the attacks for good – and restore the rights the AZ GOP-led legislature already took away – we have to flip the Arizona legislature completely blue. **_We’re just two seats away from doing that._**

**[Team, 2022 showed Democrats can win big in Arizona. Now we need to take the final steps and flip the legislature – and Arizona – completely blue. name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: The first immigrant in Congress to hold this role
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cori Bush for Congress
body:
I’m the newest Ranking Member of the House Judiciary Committee’s Subcommittee on Immigration Integrity, Security, and Enforcement.
#
Peter, I’m honored and humbled to share with you that **I’ve been named the _Ranking Member_ for the Judiciary’s Committee’s Subcommittee on Immigration.**
I came to this country when I was 16, alone, and with nothing in my pockets. After 17 years on an alphabet soup of visas to become a U.S. citizen, I was lucky enough to have the opportunity to live the American Dream, a dream that is out of reach for too many immigrants today. It’s time for that to change.
**As the first South Asian woman elected to the U.S. House of Representatives and one of only two dozen naturalized citizens in Congress,** I’m ready to serve and bring my own life experiences to this critical role.
**[I ran for Congress because I saw a need for genuine leadership from people like me — and because of you, this is all possible. In light of this historic news, will you share your support and split a contribution between myself and Cori Bush?](https://act.coribush.org/go/238?c0=cori-em-20230215.zct6mT&refcode=em20230215-2181&t=1&akid=2181%2E1082990%2Eut7AxE)**
**[Donate »](https://act.coribush.org/go/238?c0=cori-em-20230215.zct6mT&refcode=em20230215-2181&t=20&akid=2181%2E1082990%2Eut7AxE)**
I have been fighting to reform our immigration laws from the moment I first set foot in Congress, and I am proud of the landmark bills I’ve introduced, including:
_
* Roadmap to Freedom Resolution
* Access to Counsel Act
* Dignity for Detained Immigrants Act
* WISE Act
* Protection of Kids in Immigrant Detention Act
* HEAL Act
_

But for me, this work started long before I was elected to the House of Representatives. For many years, I organized as an activist for immigrants’ rights.
I sued George Bush’s administration and was recognized by President Obama — in other words, I’m not afraid to get in the trenches and I know what’s worth fighting for. I fought **unjust deportations** , advocated for newly **naturalized and immigrant Americans** , and mobilized women against **cruel family separation policies.**
**[As Ranking Member, I intend to do everything in my power to stop the GOP’s cruel agenda and fight for our communities. Will you stand with me and split a donation between me and Cori Bush today?](https://act.coribush.org/go/238?c0=cori-em-20230215.zct6mT&refcode=em20230215-2181&t=21&akid=2181%2E1082990%2Eut7AxE)**
**[Donate »](https://act.coribush.org/go/238?c0=cori-em-20230215.zct6mT&refcode=em20230215-2181&t=22&akid=2181%2E1082990%2Eut7AxE)**
It’s clear that the Republican leadership of the Judiciary committee has no intention to engage in good faith or reform our immigration laws for the better. It is up to us to stand up to the GOP’s extreme agenda and protect our people — and I will. **This is the work that I came to Congress to do.** Along with the rest of our movement for all forms of social, racial, economic, and environmental justice, I promise you to never stop fighting.
In solidarity,
Pramila

**[Contribute ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cori-em-20230215?refcode=em20230215-2181-footer&t=23&refcode2=2181_1082990_ut7AxE&akid=2181%2E1082990%2Eut7AxE) **
---
Follow us on **[Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/VoteCoriBush/)** , **[Twitter](https://twitter.com/CoriBush)** , **[Instagram](https://www.instagram.com/coribush/)** , and **[visit our website](https://coribush.org/)**. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Mail us: Cori Bush for Congress, 75 North Oaks Plaza, St. Louis, MO 63121.
Paid for by Cori Bush for Congress
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.coribush.org/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.coribush.org/signup/update-your-information?t=24&akid=2181%2E1082990%2Eut7AxE)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.coribush.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=25&akid=2181%2E1082990%2Eut7AxE)

Peter Willis,

Starbucks founder and CEO Howard Schultz was
personally named in complaints filed by the general counsel of the
National Labor Relations Board for union busting.

After years of posturing as an employee-friendly company, Schultz led
Starbucks’ union busting efforts — closing stores, firing staff supportive
of unionization, withholding pay raises, and even going as far as to hire
notorious former CIA and Pinkerton operatives to disrupt organizing!

Bernie Sanders called on Schultz to testify before the Health, Education
Labor and Pensions Committee in the US Senate. And, now, despite the
likelihood of a legally binding subpoena to answer questions about
Starbucks’ questionable labor practices, Howard Schultz is refusing to
testify.

After years of posturing as an employee-friendly company, Schultz led Starbucks’ union busting efforts — closing stores, firing staff supportive of unionization, withholding pay raises, and even going as far as to hire notorious former CIA and Pinkerton operatives to disrupt organizing! Bernie Sanders called on Schultz to testify before the Health, Education Labor and Pensions Committee in the US Senate. name: Vice President Kamala Harris
subject: Momentum is on our side, Derek.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, **[www
body:
This is not the time to let up. It’s the time to finish the job. | |
---
At the start of this year, I was asked, _"What’s your one word for 2023?"_ And without any hesitation, I said, _"Momentum."_ This team has helped accomplish so much, from passing the biggest investment in tackling the climate crisis in history to creating 12 million new jobs -- the strongest two years of job growth _by a longshot._ Let me tell you: _Momentum is on our side, Derek._ This is not the time to let up. It’s not the time to pat ourselves on the back. It’s the time to finish the job. **To build on the progress we’ve made, we need the full support of this grassroots team to keep pushing our agenda forward. Will you donate $7 to help fund the resources Democrats are relying on to win races nationwide?**

clean_body: This is not the time to let up. It’s the time to finish the job. | | At the start of this year, I was asked, "What’s your one word for 2023?" And without any hesitation, I said, "Momentum." This team has helped accomplish so much, from passing the biggest investment in tackling the climate crisis in history to creating 12 million new jobs -- the strongest two years of job growth by a longshot. Let me tell you: Momentum is on our side, Derek. This is not the time to let up. It’s not the time to pat ourselves on the back. It’s the time to finish the job. To build on the progress we’ve made, we need the full support of this grassroots team to keep pushing our agenda forward. Will you donate $7 to help fund the resources Democrats are relying on to win races nationwide? It is incumbent now on all of us to keep working hard, but first I want to thank you personally, Derek. We could not have made these great strides were it not for you putting in so much effort, sacrifice, and faith in the goodness of who we are as a nation and what we are capable of achieving. This team’s generous support is funding the programs Democratic candidates across the country need to win elections. Thank you for your support, Kamala Kamala Harris Vice President of the United States Kamala Harris: Derivative of Adam Schultz / Biden for President Photo. name: Wiley Nickel
subject: Bumping Caroline’s Message
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Wiley Nickel for Congress
body:
Hey there,
I only have a few minutes in between meetings, but I wanted to make sure you saw Caroline’s email from yesterday.
Just like I’m short on time to write this email, we’re short on time to reach our fundraising goal by tonight.
Since my team set this goal, we have brought in $1,835! That means we still have $665 left to raise before midnight. Can you rush in a $15 donation right now to help us close this gap and reach our goal?! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2302-q1-wn?refcode=230215-email]
Thank you so much for your unwavering support.
Wiley
—- Original Message —--
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2302-q1-wn?refcode=230215-email [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2302-q1-wn?refcode=230215-email]Friend –
I’m reaching out to you today, on Valentine's Day, to personally to give you an update on where everything stands this month! Wiley has been in DC, and being up there with him for a part of it was so exciting.
He is doing exactly what he was meant to do, and seeing him take this next step in public service has been incredible.
http://secure.actblue.com/donate/2302-q1-wn?refcode=230215-email [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/2302-q1-wn?refcode=230215-email]
His campaign team let me know that they set a $2,500 mid-month fundraising goal, and I’m reaching out with a special ask.
Are you able to make a monthly recurring donation to Wiley’s campaign? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/2302-q1-wn?refcode=230215-email]
Monthly contributions help us plan ahead, and with the state of this race, we need to be prepared for whatever comes our way. Bo Hines is running again, and we'll be up against an anti-choice extremists for the second time. We can’t risk losing all of the progress we’ve made, and that’s why we have to plan ahead.
I’m excited to see all that Wiley can accomplish, but we know he would not be able to serve our community in this way if it wasn’t for your support. February is only 28 days, so the fact that we’re halfway through the shortest month of the year means we need to hustle! No time to waste when it comes to fundraising.
If you can chip in a monthly recurring donation to support our efforts every month, you can do so through this link. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/2302-q1-wn?refcode=230215-email]
Thank you kindly,
Caroline Nickel
Wiley Nickel is the Congressman for NC-13. His 2022 opponent, Bo Hines, has announced he'll run against Wiley in 2024. Support #TeamWiley with a monthly donation today!
CONTRIBUTE MONTHLY >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2302-q1-wn?refcode=230215-email&recurring=true]
Follow Wiley Online:
https://www.facebook.com/WileyNickelNC [https://www.facebook.com/WileyNickelNC] http://twitter.com/wileynickel [http://twitter.com/wileynickel] http://www.instagram.com/wileynickelnc [http://www.instagram.com/wileynickelnc]

Wiley Nickel for Congress
PO Box 563
Raleigh, NC 27602
United States

clean_body: I rely on the support of people like you who believe that Pennsylvanians deserve a strong advocate in Congress. | = | | | = At nearly $14M, fight for 7th Congressional District was Pa.’s priciest House race | = You read that right, Peter: in 2022, our race was the most expensive in the state. So much of the $14 million spent on my race came from my self-funding millionaire opponent and the countless Republican Super PACs willing to spend big in their attempts to flip this seat RED. With experts already calling our district a TOSS-UP for 2024, you can bet Republicans are preparing to spend even more in the coming election. Frankly, our fundraising is off to a slow start, and if it doesn’t pick up soon we could be in real trouble. I don’t take corporate PAC money; I rely on the support of people like you who believe that Pennsylvanians deserve a strong advocate in Congress.= | | | = | = | = | = | = Thanks so much, Susan | | = Paid for by Susan Wild for Congress Susan Wild for Congress 1636 N Cedar Crest Blvd. #183 Allentown, PA 18104 United States If you wish to contribute by check, you can do so at the address above. We’re halfway through the month, but _less than halfway_ to meeting our goal. I just wanted to email you one more time before our mid-month deadline.

It is critical we stay on track to hit our fundraising goals each and every month. We’re not even two months into 2023, and yet the democrats are already fielding a left-wing activist in the Missouri Senate race, and they are _POURING_ money into his campaign. In the first week of launching, my opponent pulled a fundraising haul of over $350,000 from nearly 10,000 donors.

If Democrats are good at one thing, it’s raising money. We need to make up the lost ground, and I need your help with that. If you can, please rush a donation to keep us on track for our February goal. [**$25, $10— even just $5 makes a difference. Please, if you can, donate >>> HERE**](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=6daaadb7af58432287bddd47c9081803&_e=bmOf42j_403G_aTRFeh_DdKVTh-x2cbOSIBXTBPiesAHPI7x-5dn3AiqrwQfjZSemPjFttimUo4zc1bU6nBtbxG1QzrOp4YJcw3s9vPZWL4jOZtzyrmVjicX4V1hbW3JSNLpFACYoigMwTbEKzFE5AJvpHlD6PXXILHzwMc-X1yczqxJBKnqLV_cX0UicmwkLTS_ggK2sVz2c2T6u4QuyStrZDROCoBEfJJrOtB71j31RJLl6ACvHg6sIE25hQzkRpw67K5Ks7LyrX9s80ndJ3OQ0J-ZETeXQLITuwAh2b5b5uI7Emr9BuGElp79_l3Er-I-4Wbu4mr4X3GjAVxL7jk9fEI4HwCHBtWNXZrrJoo%3D)

God Bless,

Josh

clean_body: | | | Peter, We’re halfway through the month, but less than halfway to meeting our goal. I just wanted to email you one more time before our mid-month deadline. It is critical we stay on track to hit our fundraising goals each and every month. We’re not even two months into 2023, and yet the democrats are already fielding a left-wing activist in the Missouri Senate race, and they are POURING money into his campaign. In the first week of launching, my opponent pulled a fundraising haul of over $350,000 from nearly 10,000 donors. If Democrats are good at one thing, it’s raising money. We need to make up the lost ground, and I need your help with that. If you can, please rush a donation to keep us on track for our February goal. God Bless, Josh | Begin forwarded message: From : Tyler, Team Hawley Subject : Josh is counting on us Date : February 15, 2023To :dpwillis67@gmail.com Peter, It’s Tyler from Team Josh Hawley. Right now, Josh has a major deadline coming up, and he’s counting on patriots like you to help him meet it. Our mid-month deadline is and right now, we’re still not at our goal. Peter, it’s no secret: Washington has launched an all-out war on ANYONE who takes on the establishment. And Josh has been fighting for an end to business as usual in the GOP and beyond since he got to Washington. This deadline is more important than ever, and we can’t do it without you. I know 2024 seems far away, but we have to start building our war chest now if we’re going to be ready for the heat of the campaign next year, Peter. Democrats are already lining up to kick Josh out of his seat with the help of million-dollar donors from New York and California. Between taking on the establishment in Washington and the 2024 field for Senate in Missouri, our team is spread thin - and we need all the reinforcements we can get from dedicated patriots like you. Thank you, Tyler Team Josh Hawley | | | | Paid for by Josh Hawley Victory Committee | |

name: Ruben Gallego for Senate
subject: Humbly asking for $3 before midnight. Yes, just $3.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
We are still short of our goals. These are not arbitrary. They are what we need to WIN.
#

Peter -
$3.
That is the contribution Ruben Gallego is HUMBLY asking you to make before midnight tonight. Yes, just $3. One time. Please.
$3 to help us catch up on the fundraising shortfall we’ve experienced in the last week.
$3 because Kyrsten Sinema is ramping up her fundraising and Kari Lake looks like she’s ready to get into the race.
$3 because Ruben will be a target for both and this campaign is funded by lots and lots of people giving $3.
Today, more than 1,000 people have given their $3, but we’re still short of our goals. So they’re really hoping you’ll join them and do the same. Please.

Hello,

**I am officially running again against Lauren Boebert!**

In 2022, we came just 546 votes short of kicking Boebert out of Congress. It was the closest race in the __entire__ country. Now, I’m running again to finish the job, but I need you with me from day one:

[**Please, will you make a donation now – split between my campaign and American Bridge PAC – and become a Founding Donor to my 2024 campaign to defeat Boebert?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/58782020/392210325/-321553144?amounts=15,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2267-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Nzc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImUzMzBhMDVkLTg5YWQtZWQxMS05OTRkLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=aGy23pqJrOpMN1kVmorsBLlGGhdawNKgzLbXri5jlL0=)
No one believed we could pull it off in 2022. All of the pundits said Colorado’s 3rd Congressional District was a “Safe Republican” seat. The national Democrats and the national Republicans wrote us off.

But we proved them all wrong.

With Lauren Boebert now on notice, this campaign is going to get even nastier. Her super PACs and supporters are going to spin lie after lie against me on TV. **I’m counting on you to be able to correct the record and hold Boebert accountable.**
**[No amount is too small: Click here now and make a donation to my campaign and American Bridge PAC of whatever you can afford today. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58784468/392211686/-2113420158?refcode=EM_NBI_JP_20230201_PT_NA_0_3MO_JimmyPanetta_NA_NA_NA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMDVkYmU4Yi04YmFkLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zG1iAVEBjgT7LfHyUe86AJP4TXXvV3stsv4g9gcnxSs=&emci=945dbe8b-8bad-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=a05dbe8b-8bad-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=6108787) | Peter,

I was proud to join President Biden as he made a visit to Santa Cruz County in the newly formed 19th Congressional District to see and deliver remarks on the storm damage.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58784469/392211687/1766609798?refcode=EM_NBI_JP_20230201_PT_NA_0_3MO_JimmyPanetta_NA_NA_NA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMDVkYmU4Yi04YmFkLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zG1iAVEBjgT7LfHyUe86AJP4TXXvV3stsv4g9gcnxSs=&emci=945dbe8b-8bad-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=a05dbe8b-8bad-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=6108787)
The Federal Emergency Management Administration (FEMA) continues to be on the ground with me to provide assistance and resources. But Peter, I want long-term solutions that prevent damage caused by extreme weather events.

That’s why I’ve been a leading voice in urging the federal government to provide relief and protective measures to those affected by the storm. [Will you join me in calling on Congress to do more by adding your name now?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58784470/392211688/1766609798?refcode=EM_NBI_JP_20230201_PT_NA_0_3MO_JimmyPanetta_NA_NA_NA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMDVkYmU4Yi04YmFkLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zG1iAVEBjgT7LfHyUe86AJP4TXXvV3stsv4g9gcnxSs=&emci=945dbe8b-8bad-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=a05dbe8b-8bad-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=6108787) [ADD MY NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58784471/392211689/1766609798?refcode=EM_NBI_JP_20230201_PT_NA_0_3MO_JimmyPanetta_NA_NA_NA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMDVkYmU4Yi04YmFkLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zG1iAVEBjgT7LfHyUe86AJP4TXXvV3stsv4g9gcnxSs=&emci=945dbe8b-8bad-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=a05dbe8b-8bad-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=6108787) Although the Presidential Disaster Declaration is an important step forward in our recovery efforts, it’s surely not the end. I will continue to work around the clock with all levels of local, state and federal partners to mitigate these kinds of hazards in the future.

Thank you Peter, for being strong in times like this. Together, we can get through this.

Jimmy

subject: No Relief in Sight
body:
Haley for President No images? [Click here](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-e-qhdhjdt-trhiujldw-w/) [](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qhdhjdt-trhiujldw-r/)
